16.3: Lukela mpwagha, ‘Lalenu anakubya na iyula kwa ndandi kunani nde kukeli na mahundi ghajaghanile.’ Mwehapa mwaka ndumila kubheli, mumanyi kulinga pamihu ja kunani na kumanya ghaghipitalyaje, nambu bho, ngachemuweza kumanya nginyulila ja chikahi chenu?
16.4: Chibheleku kihakau na changa kummanya Chapanga, chipala nginyulila. Nambu ngachipati nginyulila jokapi jela, nambu nginyulila jaka Yona.” Yesu akabhalekiki, na kubhoka. Amila ja Mafalisayo na Masadukayo Mako 8:14-21
16.5: Bhabhulwa bhaka Yesu pabhakajomwi kulomboka mbaka kwihi ja kabheli ja nhwanga, bhakakombwiki kubha bhajewiki kutola mabumunda.
16.6: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Mulilingalyaje na amila ja Mafalisayo na Masadukayo.”
16.7: Bhakalochini bheni kwa bheni, bhakapwaghaje, “Apwagha bhenibhela kwa ndandi ngachetutotwi mabumunda.”
16.8: Yesu akamanyi maholalelu ghabhu, akabhapwaghile, “Mwenga mabhandu mwembi na uhobhalelu uchoku! Bho, maghambu kiki mlochana kwa ndandi ngachembi na mabumunda?
16.9: Bho, nkona pena ngachemmanye? Bho, ngachemkomboka mabumunda nhwanu ghala ghanakabhalehiki bhandu elufu nhwanu? Bho, mkatwelakili itonga hilenga ya mahighalilu?
16.10: Bho, bhelabhela ngachenkomboka mabumunda saba ghala ghanakabhalehiki bhandu elufu nchechi? Bho, mkabhongini hitonga hilenga ya mahighalilu?
16.11: Bho, kubhi bholi mlepale kumanya kubha ngachenakabhi nongalela malobhi gha mabumunda? Nambu mulilingalya na amila ja Mafalisayo na Masadukayo!”
16.12: Panihapa bhabhulwa bhakamanyi kubha Yesu ngachealongalya panane ja amila ja kulenganake mabumunda, nambu bhalilingalya na mabholu gha Mafalisayo na Masadukayo. Yesu nde Mwana waka Chapanga Mako 8:27-30; Luka 9:18-21
16.13: Yesu paakahikiki ku muchi wa ku Kaisalia Filipi, akabhalaluki bhabhulwa bhaki, “Bho, bhandu bhapwagha kubha Mwana waka Mundu nde nane?”
16.14: Bhakamuyangiki, “Bhakumu bhapwagha kubha nde Yohana Mbatizaji, bhangi bhapwagha nde Eliya, na bhangi bhapwagha kubha nde Yelemia au jumu wabhu wa bhalota baka Chapanga.”
16.15: Akabhalalukile, “Na mwehapa, bho, mpwagha kubha nepani nde nane?”
16.16: Simoni Petulu akamuyangiki, “Wehapa nde Kristo, Mwana waka Chapanga joabhi mwome.”
16.17: Yesu akampwaghile, “Upengaliki, Simoni mwana waka Baliyona, maghambu nga mundu jokapi joakuhyekulile leniheli, nambu nde Atati wangu joabhi kunani kumahunde.
16.18: Nanenga nukupwaghila, wehapa nde Petulu, na panani ja lindalaghu lendenu, ananjenga likanisa langu, wala makili gha kuwawa ngaghawezi kulishinda.
16.19: Ananukupekya funguo ya Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde, na lokapi leanaulikongaje pundema, analibya likongakiki kunani kumahunde, na lokapi leanaulibhopulaje pundema, analibya libhopuliwi kunani kumahunde.”
16.20: Panihapa Yesu akabhakanakili ngamaa bhabhulwa bhaki ngabhampwaghi mundu jokapi kubha jombi nde Kristo. Yesu alongalela panani ja mang'ahiku na kupotela kwaki Mako 8:31-9:1; Luka 9:22-27
16.21: Kutumbu chikahi chenihechi Yesu akatumbwi kubhalandila bhabhulwa bhaki hotuhotu, “Imbalika kujenda ku Yelusalemu, na kupata mang'ahiku ghamaheli kuhuma kwa bhazee, na bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa, na bhabhola bha Shelia, na konihoku anangomakikaje na lichobha la katatu niyokaje.”
16.22: Petulu akandohiki Yesu punkeghi na kutumbu kundakalila, akapwagha, “Ngawipwagha bhenibhela Bambo! Lijambu leniheli ngalikupati ng'o!”
16.23: Nambu Yesu akang'anambwiki na kumpwaghi Petulu, “Bhoka palongi jangu, Shetani! Wehapa nde kihibhalakilu kwangu. Kwa ndandi maholalelu ghaku nga ghaka Chapanga, nambu gha bhandu.”
16.24: Panihapa Yesu akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Mundu jokapi anaapala kunyengalela, impalika alikana mwene, na autolaye msalaba waki, na anyengalyaje.
16.25: Kwa ndandi mundu anaapala kukengalela womi waki, anaauhobhihaje, nambu mundu joanaauhobhiha womi waki kwa ndandi jangu, anaaupata kabhete.
16.26: Bho, mundu anapata kiki ngati anaaupatiki ndema wokapi na kuhobheha womi wake? Au mundu anabhoha chindu bhole chibya pandu pa womi wake?
16.27: Kwa ndandi Mwana waka Mundu anahikaje mu ulumbalilu wa Atati waki papamu na bhatumika bhaki bha kunani kwaka Chapanga, na panihapa nde anaandepa kila mundu kulengana na matendu ghaki.
16.28: Numpwaghi chakaka, bhabhi bhakumu bhinu pambane ngabhapotele mangane ja kumbona Mwana waka Mundu akahikaje mu Ukolongwa waki.”

17.1: Paghapetiki machobha sita, Yesu akabhatoliki Petulu, Yakobo na Yohana ndongu waki, akapiti nabhu kanjika jabhu panani ja chitombi chilachu.
17.2: Konihoku, Yesu akang'anambwiki ubhonikanu waki palongi jabhu, pamihu jaki pakang'anyiki ngati lyobha, na ingobhu jaki jakabhi jihuhu ngati unang'anu.
17.3: Palapala Musa na Eliya bhakapitalili, na kulongela na Yesu.
17.4: Panihapa Petulu akumpwaghi Yesu, “Bambo, nde wichu tepani kubha pambane! Anaupala anachenga indamba itatu, chimu chaku wehapa, chengi chaka Musa, na chimu chaka Eliya.”
17.5: Petulu paakabhi ajendale kupwagha, palapala lihundi leling'anya lakabhayekalile, na sauti jakapitalile kuhuma mulihundi lela, jakapwagha, “Hajoju nde Mwana wangu mpalu, nyambakiki naku, munjowanya jombe!”
17.6: Bhabhulwa bhala pabhakajowini sauti jela, bhakajowipi namaa, bhakahawiki ukutama mbaka pahi.
17.7: Yesu akahikiki, akabhapapihi, na kupwagha, “Njemanyaje, ngamwijoghopa!”
17.8: Pabhakajinwihi mihu ghabhu ngachebhakumbweni mundu, nambu Yesu kanjika jake.
17.9: Pabhakabhi bhahelela pachitombi, Yesu akabhakanakili, “Ngamwampwaghi mundu mambu ghamughawene, mbaka Mwana waka Mundu paiyokaje kuhuma kwa bhakuwa.”
17.10: Bhabhulwa bhakandaluki Yesu, “Bho, mbona bhabhola bha Shelia bhapwagha ipalika hoti Eliya ahikaje?”
17.11: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Chakaka, Eliya anahika hoti, na kulenganakela mambu ghokapi wichu.
17.12: Nambu numpwaghila, Eliya ajomwi kuhika, na bhombi ngachebhakammanyi, nambu bhandu bhakamuhengili ntundu mobhakapalile. Bhela Mwana waka Mundu anaang'ahakika bhelabhela mu mawoku ghabhu.”
17.13: Panihapa bhabhulwa bhakamanyiki kubha akabhi abhapwaghi mambu ghaka Yohana Mbatizaji. Yesu andamiha nkombu joakabbhi na lijobhi Mako 9:14-29; Luka 9:37-43
17.14: Pabhakaliheghalili kabheti lipogha la bhandu lela, mundu jumu akunjendi Yesu, na kunchikamila palongi jaki,
17.15: akapwaghaje, “Bambo, umbonila chiha mwana wangu kwa ndandi abhi na chitamu cha kuhinduka, kabheti ang'ahika namaa, mala pamaheli ahabhuka pamotu na mumachi.
17.16: Nakundetiki kwa bhabhulwa bhaku, nambu ngachebhakaweziki kundamiha.”
17.17: Yesu akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Mwenga chibheleku changakubha na uhobhalelu, na chechihobhike! Bho, anandama na mwehapa mbaka lile? Undeta pambane nkombu hoju.”
17.18: Yesu akalilakali lijobhi lela, na lombi lakumpitiki, na kutumbu chikahi chelachela nkombu jola akalamike.
17.19: Henu bhabhulwa bhakanjendi Yesu bhakabya kanjika jabhu, na kundalukila, “Bho, maghambu kiki tepani ngachetukaweziki kuliboha lijobhi lela?”
17.20: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Kwa ndandi ja uhobhalelu winu uchoku. Numpwaghi chakaka, anambi na uhobhalelu ngati imbeju njoku jejilowakeka haladali, anamuweza kuchipwaghi chitombi, ‘Ubhokaje pambane ujenda pala,’ na chombi anachibhokaje, na njeta chindu chokapi chechibya ngakuwezikana kwinu.
17.21: Nambu lijobhi la ntundu aghoghu ngaliwezi kubhohakeka nambu kwa malobhu na kukonga.” Yesu alonge kabhete panani ja kupotela kwaki Mako 9:30-32; Luka 9:43-45
17.22: Bhabhulwa bhaka Yesu pabhakabhi papamu ku Galilaya, Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Mwana waka Mundu anaabhohakikaje mu mawoku gha bhandu,
17.23: anabhunkomaje, nambu lichobha la katatu anaayoka kabhete.” Bhabhulwa bhaki jakabhabhiniki namaa mitima jabhu. Kulepa kode ja Nyumba jaka Chapanga
17.24: Yesu na bhabhulwa bhaki pabhakahikiki ku Kapelenaumu, bhajopa kode bha Nyumba jaka Chapanga bhakanjendi Petulu na kundalukila, “Bho, mbola winu le alepa kode ja Nyumba jaka Chapanga?”
17.25: Petulu akabhayangiki, “Ena, alepa.” Petulu paakajingi mu nyumba, mangane ja kupwagha lilobhi, Yesu akandalukile, “Simoni, wehapa ubhona bhole? Bhakolongwa bha pundema bhabhongana ushulu au kode kuhuma kwa akanane? Bho, kuhuma kwa bhana bhabhu au kwa bhaghene?”
17.26: Petulu akamuyangiki, “Kuhuma kwa bhandu bhaghene.” Yesu akampwaghile, “Bhela, bhana inchi jabhu bhalekakiwi.
17.27: Nambu nahuli ngatubhang'aha, ujendaje kunhwanga ukajembalakya ndowana, ukatolaje homba ja kutumbula kutangila, hoghula mundomu waki, na mkati ja ndomu hoghu, anaujihimanya mbija ja kujaghanila ja kode. Jitolaje ukabhapekya jangu nepanu na jaku wehapa.”

18.1: Chikahi hechi bhabhulwa bhakanjendi Yesu, na kundalukila, “Bho, nde nane joabhi nkolongwa nakanopi mu Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde?”
18.2: Yesu akandohiki mwana jumu nchoku na kunjemeka pachilanda jabhu.
18.3: Yesu akapwaghike, “Numpwaghi chakaka, nangakung'anambuka, na kubha ngati bhana, ngamwijingili mu Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde ng'o.
18.4: Mundu jokapi joaliheleha ngati mwana ajoju, jonihoju nde joanaabya nkolongwa mu Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde.
18.5: Mundu jokapi joanjopalela mwana jumu ngati ajoju kwa lihina langu, anyopalela nepane. Kulengakeka kutenda mahoku Mako 9:42-48; Luka 17:1-2
18.6: “Nambu mundu jokapi joanaantenda jumu wa bhachoku abhabha bhabhanhobhalela nepanu kuhenga mahoku, ikabya mbaka kwaka mundu hoju kukongakeka liganga likolongwa la kuyaghila, na kujwihakika kulochi ja nhwanga.
18.7: Anamuchibhonaje bhandu bha pundema, kwa ndandi kubhi na hindu yamaheli yeyatenda bhandu kutenda mahoku, mambu ghanihagha ghapalika ghapitilaje! Nambu anaachibhona mundu jola joaghaleta.
18.8: “Ngati chiwoku chaku au chiwolu chaku anachikutehi kutenda mahoku, uhekataje na kulekela kutali na wehapa! Mbanga kwaku kujingila mu womi wa mileli panga chiwoku au chiwolu, kuliku kulekaleka mu moto wa mileli ukabya na mabhoku ghabheli na magholu ghaku ghabheli.
18.9: Lihu laku analikutehi kutenda mahoku, litupulaje na kulilekela kutali na wehapa! Mbanga kwaku kujingila mu womi wa mileli ukabya na lihu limu, kuliku kulekaleka mu Jehanamu ja moto ukabya na mihu ghaku ghokapi ghabheli. Ulenganesu wa limbeleli lelihobhiki Luka 15:3-7
18.10: “Mulilingalyaje ngamwanzalau jumu wa bhachoku abhabha. Numpwaghila, bhatumika bhabhu bha kunani kwaka Chapanga bhabhi machobha ghokapi palongi ja Atati wangu joabhi kunani kumahunde.
18.11: Maghambu Mwana waka Mundu ahikiki kubhakengalela bhala bhabhahobhike.
18.12: “Bho, mbona bhole? Mundu anabhi na mambeleli mia moja, na limu analihobhiki, bho, atenda kike? Aghaleka tisaini na tisa ghala kuchitombi, na kujenda kulilonda lelihobhiki lela.
18.13: Anaalipatiki, numpwaghi chakaka, anaahekalya nakanopi kwa ndandi ja limbeleli limu kupeta ghala tisaini na tisa ghaghahighalile.
18.14: Bhelabhela Atati winu wa kunani kumahunde, ngacheapala hata jumu wa bhachoku abhabha ahobhaje. Ndongu waku anaakuhokihi
18.15: “Ngati ndongu waku anaakuhokihi, ujendaje kwaki ukumpwaghila lihoku laki koni mukabya mwabheli pena. Anaakujowanili, anaubya umpatiki kabheti ndongu waku.
18.16: Nambu ngati anaakaniki kukujowanela, ujendaje kwaki na mundu jongi jumu au bhabheli nahuli kwa ulandilu wa bhalandilu bhabheli au bhatatu kila litatizo lijomulikaje, ngati moghapwaghi Malembu gaka Chapanga.
18.17: Anaakaniki kubhajowanela bhandu bhanihabha, ulipwaghila likanisa. Ngati anaakaniki kubhajowanela bhandu habha, na abya kwaku ngati mundu wangakummanya Chapanga au njopa kode. Kukanakila na Kulekakela ghahengakikaje
18.18: “Numpwaghi chakaka, ghokapi ghamwikongaje pani pundema anaghabya ghakongakiki kunani kumahunde, na ghokapi ghamwibhopulaje pani pundema anaghabya ghabhopuliwi kunani kumahunde.
18.19: “Kabheti numpwaghi kubha, bhandu bhabheli pabhijongana pundema kubhokana na lijambu lokapi lebhilobhaje kwaka Chapanga, anabhatendiwaje na Atati wangu joabhi kunani kumahunde.
18.20: Maghambu pokapi pala pabhahimangana bhandu bhabheli au bhatatu kwa lihina langu, nepani mili panihapa pachilanda jabhu.” Ulenganesu waka mtumika jwangakulekakela
18.21: Panihapa Petulu akanjendi Yesu na kundalukila, “Bambo, bho, ndongu wangu anaanihoki mala palenga nyendalya kundekakela? Bho, nundekakya mala saba?”
18.22: Yesu akamuyangiki, “Ngachembwagha mala saba pena, nambu saba mala sabini.”
18.23: Kwa ndandi Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde ulengini na nkolongwa jumu joapalika kutenda mabhalangiku gha bhatumika bhaki.
18.24: Paakatumbwi kulonda mabhalangiku ghaki, mundu jumu joakabhi andahi mbija mamilioni gha ghamaheli, bhakampeliki kwake.
18.25: Mtumika jola ngacheakabhi na chindu cha kulepa lideni lela, nkolongwa akalaghalaki kubha ahemaliwaje ngati mtumwa, jombi na nhwanu waki, na bhana bhaki, na hindu yokapi yeakabhi nayu, nahuli ipatikanaye mbija ya kulepa lideni lake.
18.26: Bhela, mtumika jola akachikimi palongi jaka nkolongwa jola, na kupwagha, “Pepakoku Bambo, nukulobha unhinakalyaje, ananukulepa lideni laku lokapi.”
18.27: Nkolongwa jola akamboni chiha, akandekakili lideni lela, na kundeka ajendaje.
18.28: “Nambu mtumika jola paakabhokiki, akahimangini na mtumika njaki joakabhi andahi mbija ichokope. Akankamwili, na kunhinya pahingu, akapwagha, ‘Unepaje lideni langu!’
18.29: Mtumika njaki jola akanchikamili na kundobha, akapwagha, ‘Pepakoku, nukulobha unhinakalyaje, ananukulepa lideni laku lokapi!’
18.30: Jombi akakaniki, nambu akampeliki muchifungo mbaka paanalepa lideni lela.
18.31: Bhatumika bhajaki pabhakaweni mambu ghanihagha, bhakayomiki namaa. Bhakapiti kumpwaghila nkolongwa mambu ghala ghaghapitalile.
18.32: Panihapa nkolongwa jola akandohiki mtumika jola, akampwaghile, ‘Wehapa nde mtumika muhakau namaa! Ukanobhiki, na nepani nikakulekakile lideni laku lokapi.
18.33: Bho, ngacheikapalakiki na wehapa kumbone chiha mtumika njaku ngati nepani monakakubhoni chiha wehapa?’
18.34: Bhela, nkolongwa jola akayomiki namaa, akampeliki mtumika hoju muchifungo na kung'ahakika, mbaka paanajomula kulepa lideni laki lokapi.”
18.35: Yesu akajomulili kupwagha, “Anana nde Atati wangu wa kunani kumahunde moanaantendila mwehapa, ngati kila jumu winu ngacheandekakela ndongu waki kwa mtima waki wokapi.”

19.1: Yesu paakajomwi kupwagha malobhi ghanihagah, akabhokiki ku Galilaya, na akapiti ku inchi ja ku Yudea, kwihi ja Nkoka Yoludani.
19.2: Bhandu bhamaheli bhakanjengalili konihoku, na Yesu akabhalamihi hitamu yabhu.
19.3: Mafalisayo bhakumu bhakanjendi Yesu, bhakandalukili kwa kumpendakela, “Bho, wichu le nkambaku kumpekeha baluwa ja kundeka nhwanu waki kwa ndandi jokapi jela?”
19.4: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Bho, ngachemsomiki mu Malembu ghaka Chapanga kubha, Chapanga nde joambombiki mundu kutumbula pakutumbulila akuntendiki nkambaku na mbomba?
19.5: Chapanga apwagha, ‘Kwa ndandi jeniheji mwanalomi anaandeka atati waki na mabhu waki, na kulombana na nhwanu waki, na bhombi bhabheli habha anabhakubha hyegha jimu?’
19.6: Henu bhanihabha nga bhabheli kabheti, nambu nde hyegha jimu. Henu, cheachilombanishi Chapanga, mundu ngaachilombola.”
19.7: Nambu Mafalisayo bhakandaluki Yesu, “Bho, maghambu kiki, Musa akatulaghalaki kubha mundu aweza kumpekeha nhwanu waki baluwa ja kulekana na kundeka?”
19.8: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Musa akampwaghili kubhaleka akahanu bhinu kwa ndandi ja kunonopa kwa mitima jinu kubholakeka. Nambu kutumbula kubhombakeka kwa ndema ngachekukabhi bhenibhela.
19.9: Henu, nepani numpwaghi mwehapa, mundu jokapi joandeka nhwanu waki, nanga kubha kwa ndandi ja ugone, na kuntoghola mbomba jongi, ahenga ugone, bhelabhela mundu joantoghola mbomba joapekiwi baluwa ja kulekana jola, najombi atenda ugone.”
19.10: Bhabhulwa bhaki bhakumpwaghile, “Ngati bhenibhela nde mokubheli mambu ghaka nkambaku na nhwanu waki, mbanga mundu kukotoka kutoghola.”
19.11: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Nga kila mundu joaweza kulijopalela lilobhi lenu lempwagha, nambu bhala pena Chapanga bhaahagwile.
19.12: Maghambu bhabhi bhandu bhangakuweza kutoghola kwa ndandi bhabhelakiki bhenibhela, na bhangi bhatendakiki ghanihagha na bhandu, na kabheti bhabhi bhangi ambabhu bhapaliki bheni ngabhitoghola kwa ndandi ja Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde. Joaweza kulijopalela lilobhi lenu na alijopalyaje.” Yesu abhapengalela bhana Mako 10:13-16; Luka 18:15-17
19.13: Bhandu bhakumu bhakandetili Yesu bhana nahuli abhabhekila mabhoku panani jabhu na abhalobhilaje. Nambu bhabhulwa bhaki bhakabhalakalile.
19.14: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Mwaleka bhana bhahika kwangu, ngamwahibhalila, maghambu Ukolongwa wa kunane kumahunde nde wa bhandu bhabhabhi ngati bhana abhabha.”
19.15: Paakajomwili kubhabhekela mabhoku panani ja bhana bhanihabha nahuli kubhapengalela, Yesu akabhokiki pandu pala. Nkombu joabhi na hindu yamaheli Mako 10:17-31; Luka 18:18-30
19.16: Mundu jumu akanhiki Yesu na kundalukila, “Mbola Wambone, bho, ndenda chindu bhole chambone nahuli niupataje womi wa mileli?”
19.17: Yesu akamuyangiki, “Bho, maghambu kiki unoha wambone?” “Kubhi na jumu pena joabhi wambone, yani Chapanga. Nambu ngati anaupala kujingila mu womi wa mileli, kamula amuli yaka Chapanga.”
19.18: Mundu jola akundalukile, “Bho, amuli bhole?” Yesu akamuyangiki, “Ngawikoma, ngawihenga ugone, ngawijibha, ngawilandila upuhi,
19.19: watopila atati waku na mabhu waku, na umpala njaku ngati moulipali wamwene.”
19.20: Nkombu jola akampwaghile, “Niikamwi amuli yeniheyi yokapi kutumbula uchoku wangu. Bho, ngepakiwi na chindu bhole kabheti?”
19.21: Yesu akampwaghile, “Ngati anaupala kubha mundu wambone chakaka, ujenda ukalombisa hindu yokapi yeubhi nayu, na mbija yeanaupataje ukabhapekya bhahochu, na wehapa anaubya ulibekili chikoku kunani kumahunde, na anaujomwili kutenda ghanihagha, uhika unyengalyaje.”
19.22: Nkombu jola paakajowini malobhi ghanihagha, akabhokiki kwa kung'ong'uteka, maghambu akabhi na hindu yamaheli namaa.
19.23: Panihapa Yesu akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Numpwaghi chakaka, anakunonupa namaa kwaka mundu joabhi na hindu yamaheli kujingila mu Ukolongwa wa kunane kumahunde.
19.24: Numpwaghi kabeti kubha, kupepwiki nakanopi kwa chinyama chechilowakeka ngamia kupeta mu limboghi la sindano, kuliku kwaka mundu joabhi na hindu yamaheli kujingila mu Ukolongwa waka Chapanga.”
19.25: Bhabhulwa bhaka Yesu pabhakajowini ghanihagha bhakakangichi namaa, bhakandalukile, “Bho, nde nane henu joanaweza kukengaleka?”
19.26: Yesu akabhalingalili na kubhapwaghila, “Kwaka mundu lijambu lenu ngacheliwezikana, nambu kwaka Chapanga mambu ghokapi ghawezikana.”
19.27: Petulu akandalukile, “Lingalya! Tepani tuilekiki hindu yokapi na kukujengalela wehapa! Henu bho, na tepani anatupata kike?”
19.28: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Numpwaghi chakaka, Mwana waka Mundu paitamaje pa mpandu waki wa kikolongwa cha ulumbalilu mu Ndema Wahenu, mwehapa komi na bhebheli mwemnyengalile anamtamaje panani ja mipandu ja ukolongwa komi na jibheli, mkaghatemulaje makabila komi na ghabheli gha Izilaeli.
19.29: Kila mundu joajilekiki nyumba au ndongu au ndombu au atati au mabhu au bhana au mighonda kwa ndandi jangu nepani, anaajopalyaje mala mia, na kujopalela womi wa mileli.
19.30: Nambu bhamaheli bhabhabhii bhakutumbula, anabhabya bha kujomukela, na bhamaheli bhabhabhi bha kujomukela, anabhabya bha kutumbula.

20.1: “Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde ulengana na mundu joabhi na ngonda wa mizabibu joakabhokiki lukela pachibhombu kubhapeleka bhahengalihengu mungonda waki.
20.2: Akajongini nabhu kwa kubhalepa chipandi chimu cha madini gha feza kwa lichobha, na akabhapeliki kungonda wa mizabibu.
20.3: Pajahikiki saa tatu ja lukela, akabhokiki kabheti na akabhahimani bhandu bhangi bhajemiki paligulio bhanga na lihengu.
20.4: Akabhapwaghile, ‘Njendanyaje na mwenga mkahenga lihengu mungonda wangu wa mizabibu, na nepani ananundepa ngati mokupalakila.’ Na bhombi bhakapiti.
20.5: Pajahikiki saa sita ja muhi na saa tisa pakamihi, akabhokiki kabheti na kutenda bhelabhela.
20.6: Pajahikiki saa komi na moja pakamihi akabhokiki kabheti na akabhahimanili bhandu bhangi bhajemiki pandu paligulio pala. Akabhalalukile, ‘Bho, mbona njemiki pambane muhi jokapi panga na kuhenga lihengo?’
20.7: Bhakamuyangiki, ‘Maghambu njeta mundu joatupeki lihengo.’ Akabhapwaghile, ‘Na mwehapa nanamu njendanyaje mkahenga lihengo mu ngonda wangu wa mizabibu.’
20.8: “Pakwahikiki pakamihi, mweni ngonda jola akandohiki njemalela wa bhahengalihengo bhala, na kumpwaghila, ‘Ubhalohaje bhahengalihengo na ubhalepaye mbija yabhu, ukatumbula na bhakujomukela na kujomulela na bhakutumbula.’
20.9: Pabhakahikiki bhala bha saa kumi na moja, kila jumu wabhu akapatiki chipandi chimu cha madini gha feza.
20.10: Bhala bhabhakatumbwi kuhenga lihengo pabhakahikiki, bhahambukya anaabhalepa nakanopi, nambu kila jumu wabhu akapatiki chipandi chimu cha madini gha feza.
20.11: Bhandu bhala bhakajopiki mbiya yabhu, na bhakatumbwi kung'ong'utakela mweni ngonda,
20.12: bhakapwaghaje, ‘Bhandu bha kujomukela abhabha bhahengiki lihengu kwa lisaa limu pena, nambu bho, maghambu kiki wehapa wapeki malepu kulengana na tepani tetuhengiki lihengu lelinonwipi na kujochakeka na lyobha muhi jokapi?’
20.13: “Mweni ngonda jola akamuyangiki jumu waki, ‘Nkoche, ngachenukuponjiki chindo. Bho, ngachetukajongini kubha anauhenga lihengu kwa chipandi chimu cha madini gha feza?
20.14: Utola mbiya jaku ujendaje. Mbala kumpekeha wa kujomukela ajoju kulengana na wehapa.
20.15: Bho, ngacheniweza kuhenga chenichipala na hindu yangu namwete? Au bho, umonela wihu kwa ndandi nepani wambone?’ ”
20.16: Yesu akajomuli kwa kupwagha, “Bhelabhela wa kujomukela anaakubha wa kutumbula, na wa kutumbula, anaakubha wa kujomukela.” Yesu alongela mala ja katatu malobhi gha kupotela kwaki Mako 10:32-34; Luka 18:31-34
20.17: Yesu paakabhi akwela kujenda ku Yelusalemu, akabhalohiki bhabhulwa bhaki komi na bhabheli bhala, na pabhakabhi bhajenda mwindela, akabhapwaghile,
20.18: “Njowanyaje, tujenda ku Yelusalemu, na konihoku Mwana waka Mundu anajeghalika mu mabhoku gha bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa na bhabhola bha Shelia. Na bhombi anabhuntemula kupotela,
20.19: anabhumboha kwa bhandu bhangakubha Bhayahude, nahuli bhundongamaje, na kundapu iboku, na kumuwamba panani pa msalaba, nambu lichobha la katatu anahyokaje kabheti.” Amabhu andobha Yesu Mako 10:35-45
20.20: Panihapa mabhu wabhu bhana bhaka Zebedayo akanjendi Yesu papamu na bhana bhaki, akachikimi palongi jaki, na kundobha anhengila chela cheachipala.
20.21: Yesu akandalukile, “Bho, upala kike?” Amabhu hoju akampwaghile, “Pepakoku, laghalakya kubha bhana bhangu bhabheli abhabha bhatama jumu upambala waku wa kumalelelu, na jumu upambala waku wa kumangeja, mu Ukolongwa waku.”
20.22: Yesu akamuyangiki, “Ngachemmanyi chemuchilobha. Bho, muweza kunywele chikombi cheananywelila nenga, na kubatizwa ubatizo ghonibatizwe?” Bhakamuyangiki, “Tuweza.”
20.23: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Chakaka ananywelilaje chikombi changu, na kubatizwa ubatizo ghonibatizwe, nambu kutama chiwoku changu cha kumalelelu na chiwoku changu cha kumangeja nga lihengu langu kumpekeha, nambu lijambu heli anabhapekiwa bhala bhabhabhekakiwi tayali na Atati wangu.”
20.24: Bhabhulwa bhangi komi bhala pabhakajowini ghanihagha, bhakabhayomile bhalongu bhabheli bhala.
20.25: Nambu Yesu akabhalohiki bhabhulwa bhaki papamu, na kubhapwaghila, “Mmanyi kubha bhatawala bha bhandu bhangakubha Bhayahude bhajemalela bhandu bhabhu kwa makili, na ihongozi habha bhahenga bhandu habha kubha bhabhu.
20.26: Nambu kwinu mwenga ngakwikubha bhenibhela, nambu mundu jokapi joapala kubha nkolongwa kwinu, impalika abya mtumika winu.
20.27: Joapala kubha wa kutumbula pachilanda jinu, ipalika abya mtumika winu,
20.28: maghambu Mwana waka Mundu ngacheahikiki nahuli kutumikiwa, nambu kutumika, na kuubhoha womi waki nahuli kubhakombola bhandu bhamaheli.” Yesu abhalamiha akangalola bhabheli Mako 10:46-52; Luka 18:35-43
20.29: Yesu na bhabhulwa bhaki pabhakabhi bhabhoka ku Yeliko, lipogha likolongwa la bhandu, bhakunjengalile.
20.30: Akangalola bhabheli bhabhakabhi bhatemi punkeghi ja indela, na pabhakajowini kubha Yesu apeta, bhakajamalili, “Bambo, Mwana waka Daude, utubhonila chiha!”
20.31: Lipogha la bhandu lela lakabhalakalili na kubhapwaghila mtumbalaje, nambu akangalola bhala bhakajonjuki kujamalila nakanopi, bhakapwaghaje, “Bambo, Mwana waka Daude, utubhonila chiha!”
20.32: Yesu akajemiki, na kubhaloha na kubhalalukila, “Bho, mpala nuntendila kike?”
20.34: Yesu akabhabhoni chiha, akaghapapihi mihu ghabhu, na palapala bhakapatiki kulola, na bhakanjengalile.

21.1: Yesu na bhabhulwa bhaki pabhaheghali ku Yelusalemu na kuhika ku Besifage pachitombi cha Mizeituni, akabhatumiki bhabhulwa bhaki bhabheli,
21.2: akabhapwaghile “Njendanya mpaka ku chijiji chechibhi palongi jinu na anamulihimanya liponda likongakiki na mwanaliponda papamu naku. Mkaghabhopula na mkaghaleta kwango.
21.3: Ngati mundu anandaluki chokapi, mumpwaghilaje, ‘Bambo alipala,’ najombi anaandekilaje.”
21.4: Lijambu haleli likahengakiki nahuli ghala ghaghakapwagakiki na mlota waka Chapanga ghatimilaje.
21.5: “Mubhapwagila bhandu bha muchi wa Sayuni. Lingalya, Nkolongwa waku ahika kwaku! Nde mpole, na akweliki paliponda. Ahika panani ja mwanaliponda.”
21.6: Bhela, bhabhulwa bhala bhakapiti, na kuhenga ngati Yesu moakabhalaghalakile.
21.7: Bhakaliletiki liponda lela, na mwana waki, bhakajaliki ingobhu yabhu panani ja liponda, na Yesu akatemi panani jaki.
21.8: Lipogha likolongwa la bhandu lakajaliki ingobhu yabhu mwindela, na bhandu bhangi bhakahekiki mambandi gha mikongu, na kughajala mwindela.
21.9: Lipogha la bhandu lelundongulile na lela lelunjengalyaje lakajamalili kwa sauti ngolongwa, “Alumbalikaje Mwana waka Daude! Apengalika hoju joahika kwa lihina laka Bambo! Ulumbalilu kwaka Chapanga kunani kumahunde!”
21.10: Yesu paakabhi ajingi ku Yelusalemu, muchi wokapi ukatweli kukenyamuka, na bhandu bhakabhi bhalalukila, “Bho, ajoju nde nane?”
21.11: Lipogha la bhandu lela lakapwaghike, “Ajoju nde mlota Yesu, kuhuma ku Nazaleti muchi wa ku Galilaya.” Yesu pa Nyumba jaka Chapanga Mako 11:15-19; Luka 19:45-48; Yohana 2:13-22
21.12: Bhela, Yesu akajingili muliwangala la Nyumba jaka Chapanga, akabhatopuli kunja bhandu bhabhatendika kulombesa na kuhemela hindu pa Nyumba jaka Chapanga pala, akaipendwi meza ya bhala bhabhakabhi bhang'anambu mbija, na hitehu ya bhabhabhi bhalombesa ngunda.
21.13: Akapwaghile, “Ilembakiki mu Malembu Mahuhu, ‘Nyumba jangu jikemakeka nyumba ja malobhu.’ Nambu mwanganya mjitendiki kubha likolu la bhanyaghula.”
21.14: Akangalola na ilema bhangi bhakunjendili ku Nyumba jaka Chapanga hoku, na Yesu akabhalamihe.
21.15: Bhela, bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa na bhabhola bha Shelia pabhakaiweni hindu ya kukangacha yeakatehi Yesu, na kabhe bhana pabhajamalya pa Nyumba jaka Chapanga bhakapwaghaje, “Ulumbalilu kwaka Mwana waka Daude,” bhombi bhakayomiki namaa.
21.16: Bhela bhakampwaghile, “Bho, ngacheujowana chebhapwagha?” Yesu akabhayangiki, “Ena, nyowana! Bho, ngachendabhali kusoma lilembelu aleli, ‘Kwa milomu ja bhana na bhana bhang'eng'a anaulipatila ulumbalilu wa chakaka?’ ”
21.17: Bhela, Yesu akabhalekiki, na akabhokiki kunja ja muchi na kujenda ku Besania, na kughonela konihoku. Yesu aupeke masolu nkongu wa mtini Mako 11:12-14,20-24
21.18: Yesu paakabhi akelebhuka kuhuma ku muchi ghonihoghu lukela pachibombu, jakumbiniki injala.
21.19: Akauweni nkongu ghumu wa mtini punkeghi ja indela, akaujendile nambu akauketanili ngacheubhi na lipambiku lokapi, nambu mahamba pela. Bhela, akaupwaghile, “Ngawipambika kabheti mapambiku mileli!” Palapala nkongu ghola ukajomike.
21.20: Bhabhulwa pabhuweni bhakakangichi namaa, bhakapwaghaje, “Bho, maghambu kiki nkongu wa mtini aghoghu ujomiki pe mala punkamo?”
21.21: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Numpwaghi chakaka, ngati anambi na uhobhalelu panga kubha na choghohi, muweza kuhenga nga la nkongu wa mtini aghoghu pela, nambu hata ngati anamuchipwaghi chitombi achechi, ‘Tupukaje, ukalilekala mubahali,’ analitendika bhenibhela.
21.22: Ngati anamuhobhalela, chokapi chemwilobhaje kwa malobhu, anampataje.” Lilalukilu panani ja lujiniku lwaka Yesu Mako 11:27-33; Luka 20:1-8
21.23: Yesu akajingi paliwangala la Nyumba jaka Chapanga, na kubhola. Paakabhi akabholaje, bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa na bhazee bhakahiki kundalukila, “Bho, uhenga mambu aghagha kwa lujiniku bhole? Bho, nane joakupeki lujiniku loniholo?”
21.24: Yesu akabhayangike, “Na nenga ananundalukya lilaluki limu, anamuniyangiki, bhela nanatu ananumpwaghila nhenga aghagha kwa lujiniku bhole.
21.25: Bho, lujiniku lwaka Yohana lwa kubatiza lukahumiki kwaka nane? Bho, lukahumiki kunani kumahunde au lukahumiki kwa bhandu?” Nambu bhakaloghulani bheni kwa bheni ana, “Bho anatupwagha bhole? Anatupwagiki, ‘Lukahumiki kwaka Chapanga,’ anaatupwaghila, ‘Mbona henu ngachemunhobhalile?’
21.26: Ngati anatupwaghiki, ‘Lukahumiki kwa bhandu,’ tujoghopa lipogha la bhandu ndandi bhokapi bhahobhalela kubha Yohana akabhi mlota waka Chapanga.”
21.27: Bhela, bhakamuyangiki, “Ngachetumanya!” Na Yesu akabhayangike, Na nepanu nganumpwaghile ndenda mambu aghagha kwa lujiniku bhole. Ulenganesu wa akakombu bhabheli
21.28: “Mwanganya mbona bhole, mundu jumu akabhi na akakombu bhabheli. Akumpwaghi jola wa kutumbula, ‘Mwanango, lalenu ujenda ukahenga lihengu mu ngonda wa mizabibu.’
21.29: Nkombu jola akampwaghile, ‘Ngachembala!’ Nambu panakatahi akang'anambwiki liholalelu laki, akapiti kuhenga lihengo.
21.30: Atati jola akumpwaghi nkombu waki wa kabheli bhelabhela, najombi akamuyangiki, ‘Ena atati!’ Nambu ngacheakapiti kulihengo.
21.31: Bho, nane panihapa pachilanda ja bhanganya bhabheli habha joahengiki ghala ghaapalika atati wabhu?” Bhakamuyangike, “Mwana wa kutumbula jola.” Bhela, Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Numpwaghi chakaka, bhajopa kodi na bhakemi anabhundongulya mwehapa kujingila mu Ukolongwa waka Chapanga.
21.32: Ndandi Yohana akahikiki kwinu na kundangiha indela jejipalika kutama, nambu mwehapa ngachemunhobhalile. Nambu bhajopa kode na bhakemi bhakunhobhalile. Papamu na kughabhona ghanihagha ghokapi, mwanganya ngacheng'anambwiki na kughaleka mahoku ghinu, na ngachemunhobhalile.” Ulenganesu wa ngonda wa mizabibu na bhandu bhabhajahike Mako 12:1-12; Luka 20:9-19
21.33: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Njowana ulenganesu ghongi. Mundu jumu mweni ngonda, najombi akalemiki ngonda wa mizabibu, akauyongalwi lubheghu, akalenganaki pandu pa kuminyila divai, na kuchenga mnala. Akabhajahiki bhalemi ngonda ghola, na akabhokiki kujenda mbaka ku muchi wa kutale.
21.34: Chikahi cha mahunu pachahikite, akabhatumiki bhatumika bhaki kwa bhalemi bhala, nahuli bhakatola pandu pa lifungu laki la mahuno.
21.35: Bhalemi bhala bhakabhakamwi bhatumika bhala, jumu bhakundapwili, jongi bhakunkomiki, na jongi bhakundapwi maganga.
21.36: Mweni ngonda jola akabhatumiki kabheti bhatumika bhangi, bhamaheli kupeta bhatumika bha kutumbula. Bhalemi bhala bhabhakajahiki ngonda, bhakabhatendi bhelabhela.
21.37: Pakujomukela jaki akantumiki mwana waki koni akaholakya, ‘Anabhuntopalya mwana wangu.’
21.38: Nambu bhalemi bhala pabhakumbweni mwana waki bhakapwaghani bheni kwa bheni, ‘Ajoju nde mpwelelu waki, henu tunkomaje nahuli tuutola upwelelu waki!’
21.39: Bhela, bhakunkamwili, na bhakumbohiki kunja ja ngonda wa mizabibu ghola, na bhakunkomiki.
21.40: “Henu, mweni ngonda wa mizabibu jola paanahikaje, bho, anaabhatenda kiki bhalemi bhala?”
21.41: Bhombi bhakamuyangike, “Chakaka anaabhakoma bhandu bhahakau habha, na ngonda ghola anaabhapekya bhalemi bhangi bhaanabhumpekya lifungu laki mapambiku kwa chikahi chaki.”
21.42: Panihapa Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Bho, ngachemwasomiki lijambu haleli mu Malembu Mahuhu? ‘Liganga lebhalikaniki bhachenga sajenu libhi liganga lelipalika nakanopi la luhuli. Bambo nde joatehi lijambu haleli, na lombi nde la ukangachu namaa kwitu!’ ”
21.43: “Kwa bhela numpwaghila, Ukolongwa waka Chapanga anaubhohakika kwinu, na kubhapekeha bhandu bhangi bhabhahenga mahengu ghala ghaaghapala Chapanga.”
21.44: Joanahabuka panani ja liganga leniheli anatunyukana ipandi ipandi, na analunhabuki mundu jokapi, analuntimbaje nakanopi.
21.45: Bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa na Mafalisayo pabhajowini malenganesu ghaki hagha, bhakamanyiki kubah abhapwaghika bhombe.
21.46: Bhela bhakabhi bhalonda indela ja kunkamula, nambu bhabhajoghupa bhandu, kwa ndandi bhombi bhakummanyi kubha Yesu nde mlota waka Chapanga.

22.1: Yesu akalongi nabhu kabheti kwa malenganesu,
22.2: “Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde ulengini na nkolongwa joakantendi mwana waki uwangalalu wa chilebhi cha ukwate.
22.3: Bhela akabhatumiki bhatumika bhaki kubhakema bhaakabhakokiki kuhika paukwate, nambu bhombi bhakakaniki kuhika.
22.4: Akabhatumiki kabheti bhatumika bhangi, akapwagha, ‘Mkabhapwaghila bhala bhanabhakokiki, kubha chilebhi chibhi tayale, njinjiki likambaku langu la ng'ombi, na ng'ombi yengi yeinenipe, na kila chindu chibhi tayale, muhikaye paukwati.’
22.5: Nambu bhombi ngachebhaholali ghanighala, bhakabohkiki, jongi akapiti kumighonda jaki, na jongi kumahengu ghaki,
22.6: na bhangi bhakabhakamwi bhatumika bhala na kubhalapula, na kubhakoma.
22.7: Nkolongwa jola akayomike, akabhatumiki manjolinjoli bhaki, bhakabhakoma bhala bhabhakomiki bhatumika bhaki, na kuuyonanga muchi wabho.
22.8: Kabhet akabhapwaghi bhatumika bhaki, ‘Uwangalalu wa chilebhi cha ukwati chibhi tayale, nambu bhabhakokakike ngechebhapalakikaje.
22.9: Bhela, njenda mwindela na bhokapi bhala bhamwabhonaje mubhakema bhahika paukwate.’
22.10: Bhala bhatumika bhakabhokike, bhakapiti mwindela, bhakabhaletiki bhandu bhokapi bhabahwene, bhahakau na bhambone. Nyumba ja ukwate jakatweli bhaghene.
22.11: “Nkolongwa paakajingi kwabhona bhaghene, akambweni mundu jumu jwangakuwata ingobhu ja ukwate.
22.12: Nkolongwa akundalukile, ‘Nkoche, bho, ujingi bholi pambane panga ingobhu ja ukwate?’ Nambu jombi akatemi chinunu.
22.13: Panihapa nkolongwa akabhapwagili bhatumika bhaki, ‘Munkonga magholu na mabhoku mukundekala kunja kulwihi. Konihoku analela na kuyagha mino.’ ”
22.14: Yesu akajomuli kwa kupwagha, “Bhamaheli bhabhakokakike, nambu bhahaghulika nde bhachokope.” Kulepa Kode Mako 12:13-17; Luka 20:20-26
22.15: Bhela, Mafalisayo bhakapiti, na kupwaghanila ntundu wa kunkamu Yesu kwa malobhi ghake.
22.16: Bhela, bhakabhatumiki bhabhulwa bhabhu papamu na bhahemba bhaka Helode kwaka Yesu. Bhakundalukile, “Mbola, tumanyi kubha wenga wa mundu wambone, na kubha ubhola indela jaka Chapanga kwa chakaka, ngacheunjoghopa mundu jokapi jola, panga kuholalela kubha bhandu bhapwagha kike.
22.17: Henu, utupwaghilaje maholalelu ghako, bho, wichu le kwitu au nga wichu kwitu, kulepa kode kwaka Kaisali?”
22.18: Nambu Yesu akaumanyi uhakau wabho, akabhapwaghile, “Mwenga mwakandumi kubhele, bho, mbona mnenga?
22.19: Mnangihaje mbija ja kulepela kode.” Na bhombi bhakumpeki lingengalema la mbija.
22.20: Bhela, Yesu akabhalalukile, “Bho, sula ajeji na lihina aleli yaka nane?”
22.21: Bhakamuyangike, “Nde yaka Kaisali.” Panihapa Yesu akabhapwagile, “Bhela, mumpekya Kaisali yeibhi yaki Kaisali, na mumpekya Chapanga yeibhi yaki Chapanga.”
22.22: Pabhajowini bhenibhela bhakakangichi namaa, bhakundekiki, na bhakabhokanile. Lilalukilu panani ja kuhyoka kuhuma kwa bhakuwa Mako 12:18-27; Luka 20:27-40
22.23: Lichobha lelalela, Masadukayo bhakumu bhabhapwagha bhabhawili ngachebhahyoka, bhakunjendi Yesu,
22.24: na kumpwaghila, “Mbola, Musa akapwaghiki mundu joatowili anaapotile panga na kundeka mwana, ipalika ndongu waki ampwelila mbomba joaweliwi na ndomi hoju, nahuli ambelakya ndongu waki bhana.
22.25: Henu, pitu pani pakabhi na bhalongu saba. Wa kutumbula akatowi mbomba, na akapotile, na maghambu ngacheakabhi na bhana, akandeki ndongu waki mbomba joaweliwi na ndomi jola.
22.26: Ikabi bhelabhela kwa ndongu wa kabhele, na wa katatu, mbaka wa saba.
22.28: Bho, lichobha bhakuwa pabhiyokaje, mbomba hoju anaabya nhwanu waka nane pachilanda ja bhalongu saba bhala? Kwa ndandi bhokapi saba bhakabhi bhuntogwile.”
22.29: Yesu akabhayangike, “Mwanganya muhobhike, kwa ndandi ngachemughamanyi Malembu ghaka Chapanga, wala makili ghaka Chapanga.
22.30: Ndandi bhakuwa pabhiyokaje ngabhitogholi wala kutoghuleka, nambu bhibya ngati bhatumika bhaka Chapanga bha kunani kumahunde.
22.31: Nambu kubhokana na kuyoka kwa bhakuwa, bho, ngachemsomiki ghala ghaampwaghi Chapanga? Akapwaghike,
22.32: ‘Nepani nde Chapanga waka Ibulahimu, Chapanga waka Isaka, na Chapnga waka Yakobo!’ Bhela, jombi nga Chapanga wa bhakuwa, nambu jombi nde Chapanga wa bhandu bhabhabhi bhome.”
22.33: Lipogha la bhandu lela palajowini ghanighala, bhakakangichi mabholu ghake. Amuli ngolongwa Mako 12:28-34; Luka 10:25-28
22.34: Bhela Mafalisayo pabhajowini kubha Yesu akabhi bhatumbalishi Masadukayo, bhakaketangini papamo.
22.35: Jumu wabhu, bambo Shelia, akandaluki Yesu kwa kundenga,
22.36: “Mbola, bho, amuli bhole nde ngolongwa mu Shelia jokapi?”
22.37: Yesu akayangiki, “ ‘Umpala Bambo Chapanga waku kwa mtima waku wokapi, na kwa roho jaku jokapi, na kwa malangu ghaku ghokapi.’
22.38: Jeniheji nde amuli ngolongwa na ja kutumbula.
22.39: Na ja kabheli jejilengana na jeniheji nde jenjenu, ‘Umpala njaku, ngati moulipali wamwete.’
22.40: Shelia jokapi na mabholu ghokapi gha bhalota bhaka Chapanga, ghategamela amuli ibheli hayeyi.” Bho, Kristo nde Mwana waka nane? Mako 12:35-37; Luka 20:41-44
22.42: “Bho, mwanganya mbona bholi panani jaka Kristo? Bho, nde mwana waka nane?” Bhakamuyangike, “Mwana waka Daude.”
22.43: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Bhela, bho, iwezikana bholi kupwaga kwa makili ghaka Roho Mhuhu, Daude ankema jombi Bambo? Ndandi akapwaghike,
22.44: ‘Bambo akampwaghi Bambo wangu. Utama upambala wangu wa kumalelelu, mbaka nabhabheka maadui bhaku pahi ja magholu ghako.’
22.45: Bhela, ngati anakubhi Daude ankema Kristo, ‘Bambo,’ bho, aweza bholi henu kubha mwana waki?”
22.46: Nga mundu nga jumu joakaweziki kumuyanga lilobhe. Na kutumbu lichobha leniheli nga mundu hata jumu joakalengiki kundalukila lilalukilu kabheti.

23.1: Kabheti Yesu akalongi na lipogha la bhandu papamu na bhabhulwa bhaki,
23.2: “Bhabhola bha Shelia na Mafalisayo nde bhabhabhi na uwezu wa kuilongalela Shelia yaka Musa.
23.3: Bhela mkamulaje malaghalakilu na kuhenga ghokapi ghabhumpwaghila. Nambu ngamwijigha matendu ghabhu, maghambu ngachebhahenga ghala ghabhumpwaghila.
23.4: Bhakonga hibwahila yeitopiki na kubhatweka bhandu mumabhegha ghabhu, nambu bhombi bheni ngachebhapala kuhatambula hata lukonji nahuli kujangatila kutotola.
23.5: Kabheti bhahenga matendu ghabhu ghokapi nahuli bhandu bhabhonaje, kwa ndandi bhawata hindu ikolongwa yeilembakiki Shelia pachibongi, na mumabhoku, na kujonjukela mahundwa gha hunjihunji mukona ja ingobhu yabhu,
23.6: bhapala hitehu ya kulongi pa uwangalalu wa chilebhi, na kutama kulongi mu manyumba ya kuhimangani Bhayahude.
23.7: Bhapala kulamukiwa kwa kutopela paligulio, na kulowakeka na bhandu, ‘Mbola.’
23.8: Nambu mwanganya ngamwilowakeka, ‘Mbola,’ kwa ndandi Mbola winu nde jumu, wala Kristo, nanamu mabhokapi nde bhalongu.
23.9: Ngamwandowa mundu ‘Atati,’ pundema, kwa ndandi Atati winu jumu, joabhi wa kunani kumahunde.
23.10: Kabheti ngamwilowakeka chiongozi, kwa ndandi Chiongozi winu nde jumu, najombi nde Kristo.
23.11: Nambu jola joabhi nkolongwa winu anaabya ntumika winu.
23.12: Mundu jokapi joalikweha anahelakikaje, na mundu joaliheleha anakwehakikaje.” Yesu akanakila kulitenda wambone Mako 12:40; Luka 11:39-42,44,52; 20:47
23.13: “Anamuchibhonaje bhabhola bha Shelia na Mafalisayo, mwemulitenda kubha bhambone! Kwa ndandi mujighila ndyangu wa Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde palongi ja bhandu, na mwabheni ngachenjingila, wala bhabhajingila ngachemwaleka bhajingalaje.
23.14: Anamuchibhonaje bhabhola bha Shelia na Mafalisayo, mwemulibhona kubha bhambone! Kwa ndandi mwanyaghula akamabhu bhabhaweliwi na bhalomi bhabhu hindu yabhu, na kwa kulitenda mwamboni koni ndobha malobhu malachu, bhela anampata utemulo ghoubhi ukolongwa nakanope.”
23.15: “Anamuchibhonaje bhabhola bha Shelia na Mafalisayo, mwemulitenda kubha bhamboni! Kwa ndandi muyongolota munhwanga na mumaheku nahuli kumpata mundu jumu ahobhalya mabholu ghinu, na kabheti anamumpatike, muntenda abya na uwezu mala pabheli nakanopi ja kujenda mu Jehanamu ja moto kupeta mabhene.
23.16: “Anamuchibhonaje akachiongozi ngalola, mwembola, ‘Mundu anaalapike kwa Nyumba jaka Chapanga, kulapa hoku nga chindu. Nambu ngati analapiki kwa zahabu jejibhi mu Nyumba jaka Chapanga, kulapa hoku kunkamula.’
23.17: Mwanganya mwang'ang'a na akangalola, kwa ndandi nde jaku jejibhi ngolongwa, zahabu jela, au Nyumba jaka Chapanga jela jejitenda zahabu heji jibya jihuhu?
23.18: Bhelabhela mpwagha, ‘Mundu joalapa kwa chihanja cha nyambiku, nga chindu, nambu mundu jola joalapa kwa nyambiku jelibhi panani ja chihanja cha nyambiku, kulapa hoku kubhi na makili.’
23.19: Chakaka mwanganya nde mwakangalola! Kwa ndandi nde jaku jejibhi ngolongwa, nyambiku jela, au chihanja cha nyambiku chela chechigholola nyambiku?
23.20: Bhela, jombi joalapa kwa chihanja cha nyambiku, alapa kwa jeniheje, na kwa hindu yokapi yeibhi panani jake.
23.21: Jombi joalapa kwa Nyumba jaka Chapanga, alapa kwa jeniheli, na kwaka Chapanga joatama mkati jake.
23.22: Joalapa kwa kunani kumahunde, alapa kwa chitehu cha ukolongwa chaka Chapanga, na kwaka jombi joatama panani jake.
23.23: “Anamuchibhonaje bhabhola bha Shelia na Mafalisayo, mwemulitenda mwambone! Kwa ndandi mboha lifungu la komi kuhuma kwa hata mahamba ghaghanungi wichu, hiliki na mdalasini, na koni nkotwiki kuhenga mambu makolongwa gha Shelia, ngati bhela kuhenga ghaghunyambiha Chapanga, chiha, na uhobhalelu. Aghagha nde ghaghumpalika kuhenga, na kabheti panga na kughaleka ghangi hagha.
23.24: Mwenga akachiongozi akangalola! Mboha lunjenjema mu chindu cha kunywa, nambu mmila ngamia!
23.25: “Anamuchibhonaje bhabhola bha Shelia na Mafalisayo, mwemulitenda mwamboni! Kwa ndandi ngolola chikombi na mbale kwa kunja, na mkati jaki itweli hindu yemuipatiki kwa unyagula na wime.
23.26: Wenga wa Falisayo ngalola, ugholulaji hoti mkati ja chikombi, na kunja jaki anakubya wichu!
23.27: “Anamuchibhonaje bhabhola bha Shelia na Mafalisayo, mwemulitenda kubha mwambone! Kwa ndandi ndengini na matengeli ghaghapakakiki chokaa kwa kunja, ghabhonikana kubha manyahi, nambu mkati jaki ghatweli mahupa gha bhabhawile, na uchafu wokapi.
23.28: Bhelabhela na mwanganya nanamu, kwa kunja mbonikana na bhandu kubha mwambone, nambu mkati mtweli kukopungane mwamboni na uhakau. Utemulo ghouhika Luka 11:47-51
23.29: “Anamuchibhonaje bhabhola bha Shelia na Mafalisayo, mwemulitenda kubha mwamboni! Kwa ndandi mghachengalela matengeli gha bhalota bhaka Chapanga, na kughapamba matengeli gha bhandu bhambone.
23.30: Kabheti mpwagha, ‘Ngati tepanu tukabhili mwandi wa akahokolu bhitu, ngatukajetanganili nabhu kubhakoma bhalota bhaka Chapanga!’
23.31: Bhela mlilandila hotuhotu kubha mwanganya nde mabhana wa bhala bhabhakomiki bhalota bhaka Chapanga!
23.32: Ena njomulyaje lihengu lela lebhakatumbwi akatati bhinu.
23.33: Mwenga chibheleku cha lijoka, na mabhana bha majoka! Bho, henu anantila bholi utemulu wa Jehanamu?
23.34: Kwa ndandi jeniheji, ndingalya, nepani nabhatuma kwinu bhalota bhaka Chapanga, na bhandu bhana mbulahu, na bhabhola. Mwehapa anamubhakomaje, na bhangi bhabhu kubhawamba punsalaba, na bhangi bhabhu kulapulika iboku mu manyumba ghinu gha kuhimangani Bhayahude, na bhangi kubhalonda pa kila muchi.
23.35: Bhela mwahi wokapi wa bhandu bhambone ghoujitiki panani ja pundema anaukubha panani ja mimutu jinu, kutumbu kujitika kwa mwahi waka Abeli, jola joakajetakaliwi palongi jaka Chapanga, mbaka mwahi waka Zakalia mwana waka Balakia, jomukankomiki pachilanda ja Nyumba jaka Chapanga na pachihanja cha nyambiku.
23.36: Numpwaghi chakaka, utemulo kwa ndandi ja bhandu bhabahkomakiki bhanihabha anauhika panani ja chibheleku chenjenu. Yesu abhalelela bhandu bha muchi wa Yelusalemu Luka 13:34-35
23.37: “Yelusalemu, Ee Yelusalemu! Weubhakoma bhalota bhaka Chapanga, na kubhalapula kwa maganga bhandu bhala bhabhatumakiki kwaku! Mala palenga nakapaliki kubhabhongana bhandu bhaku papamu, ngati bhela ingoku mojibhonganela ibhana yaki pahi ja mapapanila ghaki, nambu ngachemwapaile!
23.38: Ndingalyaje, Nyumba jaka Chapanga winu bhundeki mang'obha.
23.39: Bhela numpwaghila, ngamwimoni kabheti kutumbu sajeno, mbaka pamwipwaghaje, ‘Apengalika hoju joahika kwa lihina laka Bambo.’ ”

24.1: Yesu akabhokiki pa Nyumba jaka Chapanga, na paakabhi abhoka, bhabhulwa bhaki bhakanjendili kundangiha machengu gha Nyumba jaka Chapanga.
24.2: Yesu akabhayangiki, akabhapwaghile, “Bho, mughabhona ghokapi aghagha? Numpwaghi chakaka, ngalihighalili liganga panani ja liganga lelibya ngachelibombuliwe.” Kulagha na Mang'ahiku Mako 13:3-13; Luka 21:7-19
24.3: Hata paakabhi atami pachitombi cha Mizeituni, bhabhulwa bhaki bhakanjendi kwa kulihiya, bhakapwaghaje, “Tupwaghilaje, bho, mambu ghanihagha ghibya lile? Na jombi nde kyani nginyulila jejilangiha kuhika kwaku, na ujomukelu wa ndema?”
24.5: Kwa ndandi bhandu bhamaheli anabhahika kwa lihina langu, bhakapwaga, ‘Nepani nde Kristo!’ Na bhombi anabhakoluwa bhandu bhamaheli.
24.6: Nanamu mwijowana ngondu, na majojalanelu gha ngondu, ndingalya ngamwijoghopa, ndandi ghanihagha ghapalika kupitalila, nambu ujomukelu ghola wakona.
24.7: Kwa ndandi bhandu bha inchi jimu anabhabhoka kujenda kukomana na bhandu bha inchi jenge, na ukolongwa kukomana na ukolongwa ghongi, kwibya na injala, na hitamu ya kujambukila, na hinyukunyuku ya luhombe pandu patalipatali.
24.8: Ghanihagha ghokapi ghibya nde ngati utumbulilu wa mabinilu ghaka mabhu joabhi na chitumbu joapala kulibhopola mwana.”
24.9: “Chikahi chenihechi anabhung'anambukya mpata mang'ahiku na kukomakeka, nanamu mwibya bhandu bha kuhakaliwa na bhandu bha inchi yokapi kwa ndandi ja lihina langu.
24.10: Pa chikahi chenihechi bhandu bhamaheli anabhauleka uhobhalelu wabhu, na bhitenda kung'anambukana, na kuhakalilana bheni kwa bheni.
24.11: Bhalota bhamaheli bhicholi anabhapitalyaje, na kubhakolowa bhandu bhamaheli.
24.12: Kwa ndandi ja kujonjukeka mahakau, upalu wa bhandu bhamaheli anaupolaje.
24.13: Nambu joanahinakalya mbaka lichobha la kujomukela, jonihoju nde joanakengaliwaje.
24.14: Kabheti Malobhi Manyahi gha Ukolongwa waka Chapanga anaghatangazwa kwa bhandu bhokapi pundema, nahuli ubya ulandilu kwabhu, panihapa nde ujomukelu ghola pawihikaje.” Lihakalilu la uyonangeku Mako 13:14-23; Luka 21:20-24
24.15: “Bhela, panihapa pamwalibhola, ‘Lihakalilu la uyonangeku,’ lela lelalongaliki na mlota Danieli, lijemiki pandu pahuhu mu Nyumba jaka Chapanga, joasoma na amanyaje!
24.16: Panihapa joabhi ku Yudea na atililaje ku hitombe.
24.17: Joabhi panani ja chihaghala cha nyumba jaki, ngaihuluka kutola chindu munyumba jake.
24.18: Joabhi kungonda na ngaikelabuka kunyuma kutola ingobhu jake.
24.19: Anabhang'ahikaje namaa akambomba bhabhabhi na hitumbu, na bhabhajongeha mu machobha ghanihagha!
24.20: Ndobhaje kwaka Chapanga, nahuli kutila kwinu ngakwikubha chikahi cha imbepu, wala Lichobha la Sabato.
24.21: Ndandi chikahi chenihechi kwibya na ulale ukolongwa, ngacheulabhali kubha kutumbu pa kubhombakeka kwa ndema mbaka lalenu, wala ngawipitalili kabheti.
24.22: Ngati Chapanga ngaakapungwizi machobha ghanihagha nga mundu jokapi joakakengaliki, nambu machobha ghanihagha ghatehi kupunguzwa kwa ndandi ja bhala bhabhahaghulike.”
24.23: “Bhela, mundu anaampwaghili, ‘Kristo abhi pambane’ au ‘Abhi pala,’ ngamwanhobhalela.
24.24: Kwa ndandi anabhapitalya aka ‘Kristo’ bha ichole na bhalota bha ichole, na bhitenda nginyulila ikolongwa na ngangachu yamaheli nahuli bhakoluwaje, anaiwezakini, hata kubhakolowa bhahaghulika bhaka Chapanga.
24.25: Njowanyaje, nyomwi kumpwaghila mangani ja chikahi kuhika mambu ghaghipitalyaje kulongi.”
24.26: “Bhela, anabhumpwaghili, ‘Ndingalyaje, Kristo abhi kulipololu,’ ngamwijenda konihoko, au ‘Ndingalyaje, alihiiki mkati,’ ngamwihobhalela.
24.27: Kwa ndandi, ngati bhela unang'anu wa chitobhi mochimulakila kuhuma kolipita lyobha mbaka kolijibhi lyobha, bhenibhela nde mokwibhelila kuhika kwaki Mwana waka Mundu.
24.28: “Pala paubhi ntuhi, panihapa nde payalibhongana ngwahe.” Kuhika kwaka Mwana waka Mundu Mako 13:24-27; Luka 21:25-28
24.29: “Palapala pakwijomuka kulagha kwa machobh ghanihagha, lyobha analijeghalika lwihi, lubhalamwehi ngalwinang'ani, ndondwa anaihabhukaje kuhuma kunani kumahunde, na makili gha hindu ya kunani kumahunde anaghanyuhakikaje.
24.30: Kabheti, nginyulila jaka Mwana waka Mundu anajibhonikanaje kunani kumahunde, na panihapa makabila ghokapi pundema ghitenda kuombuleza, na anabhumbona Mwana waka Mundu akahelala panani ja mahundi gha kunani kumahunde akabya na makili na ulumbalilu ukolongwa.
24.31: Sauti ngolongwa ja lipenga anajijowanikaje, najombi anaabhatuma bhatumika bhaki bha kunani kumahunde, na bhombi anabhabhongana bhandu bhahaghulika bhaki kuhuma ipambala yokapi nchechi ya ndema, kutumbula ujomukelu aghoghu wa ndema mbaka ujomukelu ghonge.” Ulenganesu wa nkongu wa mtini Mako 13:28-31; Luka 21:29-33
24.32: “Kwa nkongu wa mtini mulibhola ulenganesu aghogho. Chikahi pela mahamba ghaki paghatumbu kutundulila na kupiha mahamba, mmanya kubha chikahi cha mahunu chiheghalile.
24.33: Bhelabhela nanamu pamwibhona mambu ghanihagha ghokapi ghahengakeka, mmanya kubha chikahi chibhi pambipi nakanope kuhika.
24.34: Numpwaghi chakaka, kibheleku chenjenu ngachipeti panga mambu aghagha kupitalila.
24.35: Kunani na pundema anaipetaje, nambu malobhi ghangu ngaghipeti ng'o.” Nga joamanya lichobha wala lisaa Mako 13:32-37; Luka 17:26-30,34-36
24.36: “Nambu, lichobha heli na lisaa heli, nga mundu joamanya libya lile, wala bhatumika bha kunani kumahunde, wala Mwana, nambu Atati kanjika jaki nde joamanya.
24.37: Kwa ndandi ngati mokwabheli chikahi chaka Nuhu, bhenibhela nde mokwibhelila kuhika kwaki Mwana waka Mundu.
24.38: Kwa ndandi chikahi chenichela mangani ja ndema kutwelakeka machi, bhandu bhakabhi bhakakulaje na kunywa, bhakatoghulaje na kutoghuleka, mbaka Nuhu paajingili mkati ja sitima ngolongwa jejilowakeka safina.
24.39: Ngachebhamanyi chibhi kyane mbaka machi paghatwelile pundema, na kubhajola bhokapi. Nde mokwibhelila chikahi cheanahika Mwana waka Mundu.
24.40: Chikahi chenihechi bhandu bhabheli bhibya kungonda, jumu anaatolikaji na jongi kuhighalila.
24.41: Akamabhu bhabheli bhibya bhayagha ulehi, jumu anaatolakikaje, na jongi kuhighalila.
24.42: “Bhela, mulilingalyaje na kubha tayale, kwa ndandi ngachemmanya lichobha leanahika Bambo winu.
24.43: Nambu nkombuka lijambu alele. Ngati mweni nyumba akamanyiki lichobha mwihi leanahikaje, akabya atemi mihu ikilu kelukelu, wala ngaakajilekiki nyumba jaki jibombulikaje.
24.44: Bhela, nanamu bhelabhela mbya tayale, kwa ndandi Mwana waka Mundu anahika chikahi changa kuchihobhalela.” Mtumika ndongwana au jwangakubha ndongwana Luka 12:41-48
24.45: Yesu akajendali kupwagha, “Bho, nde nane mtumika ndongwana na mweni malangu, jola ambaju bambo waki anaambeka kubhajemalela bhandu bhaki, abhapekya chilebhi kwa chikahi chake?
24.46: Apengaliki mtumika jola, ambaju bambo waki paanahikaje anaanketanya akatenda bhenibhela.
24.47: Numpwaghi chakaka, anaambeka mtumika hoju ajemalya hindu yaki yokapi.
24.48: Nambu ngati mtumika muhakau anaalipwaghi muntima jaki, ‘Bambo wangu akabhakili kukelabhuka,’
24.49: kabheti na kutumbula kubhalapu bhatumika bhajake, akatumbula kula na kunywa papamu na bhabhalobhe uwembi,
24.50: bambo waki anahika lichobha langa kuliholalela, na lisaa langa kulimanya.
24.51: Panihapa nde anaantemula nakanopi mundu hoju, na kumbeka papamu na lipogha la akandumila kubheli, konihoku nde kwibya kulela na kuyagha mino.

25.1: “Chikahi hechi Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde anaulengana na akamwali komi, bhabhatoliki taa yabhu, na kujenda kunjopalela bambo ukwati.
25.2: Akamwali nhwanu pachilanda jabhu bhakabhi bhang'ang'a, na nhwanu bhakabhi bhabhabhi na malangu.
25.3: Bhala bhabhakabhi bhang'ang'a bhakaitoliki taa yabhu, nambu ngachebhakatoliki mahuta gha kujonjukela.
25.4: Nambu bhala bhabhabhi na malangu bhakaitoliki taa yabhu, papamu na mahuta ghangi gha kujonjukela mu makopu ghabhu.
25.5: Kwa ndandi bambo ukwati akatehi kukabhakila, akamwali bhokapi bhakatitili, na kughochela lughono.
25.6: “Nambu ikilu pamahiku, pakabhi na ngomela, ‘Njumukaje, bambo ukwati ahika, njendanya mukunjopalyaje!’
25.7: Panihapa bhakabhokiki akamwali bhokapi, na kuibheka wichu taa yabhu.
25.8: Bhang'ang'a bhala bhakabhapwaghi bhabhabhi na malangu bhala, ‘Mutupekya mahuta ghinu machokope, ndandi taa hitu ichuchuka.’
25.9: Nambu bhabhabhi na malangu bhala bhakabhayangiki, ‘Ngaghatujaghanile tepani na mwehapa. Mbanga njendanya kobhalombesa, na mkahemala ghinu.’
25.10: Bhela, pabhakabhi bhajenda kuhemela, bambo ukwati akahikiki, na akamwali bhabhakabhi tayali bhakajingili papamu naku mu ukwati, na ndyangu ukajighaliki.
25.11: “Palongi bhakahikiki akamwali bhangi bhala, na kupwagha, ‘Bambo, Bambo, utuhoghulyaje!’
25.13: Bhela Yesu akapwaghike, “Mulilingalyaje, maghambu ngachemmanyi lichobha wala lisaa leanahikaje Mwana waka Mundu. Ulenganesu wa bhatumika bhatatu Luka 19:11-27
25.14: “Chikahi chenihechi Ukolongwa wa kunani kumahunde wibya ngati ulenganesu waka mundu joapala kutenda mwanja. Akabhalohiki bhatumika bhaki, na kubhapekeha hindu yaki.
25.15: Akumpeki kila jumu kulengana na uwezu waki, jumu akumpeki mbija talanta unhwanu, jongi mbija talanta ibheli, jongi mbija talanta jimu, na mweni kubhoka.
25.16: Jola joakapatiki mbija talanta unhwanu akapiti, akaihengi lihengu, na kupata nyonjeka mbija talanta yengi unhwanu.
25.17: Jola joakapatiki mbija talanta ibeli najombi akahengiki bhelabhela, na kupata nyonjeka ibheli.
25.18: Nambu jola joakapatiki mbija talanta jimu jola akapiti kuhyelalela pahi, na kuhiya mbija jaka nkolongwa waki.
25.19: “Paghapetiki machobha ghamaheli bambo wa bhatumika jola akahikiki, na kuhenga mabhalanganilu nabhu.
25.20: Mtumika joakapatiki mbija talanta unhwanu jola akahikiki, na kuleta mbija talanta unhwanu nakanopi. Akapwaghiki, ‘Bambo, ukabhekiki kwangu mbija talanta unhwanu. Lingalya, pambani ibhi mbija talanta unhwanu nakanopi ja nyonjeka jembatike.’
25.21: Bambo waki akumpwaghile, ‘Uhengiki wichu namaa, mtumika wambone na undongwana. Ubhi undongwana kwa mambu machoku, ananukupekya lujiniku lwa kujemalela hindu yamaheli. Ujingalaje na uhekalya papamu na bambo waku.’
25.22: “Jola joakajopali mbija talanta ibeli najombi akahikiki, na kupwagha, ‘Bambo, ukabhekiki kwangu mbija talanta ibeli. Lingalya, pambani ibhi mbija talanta ibeli ya nyonjeka jembatike.’
25.23: Bambo waki akumpwaghile, ‘Uhengiki wichu namaa, mtumika wambone na undongwana. Ubhi undongwana kwa mambu machoku, ananukupekya lujiniku lwa kujemalela hindu yamaheli. Ujingalaje na uhekalya papamu na bambo waku!’
25.24: “Jola joakajopalile mbija talanta jimu akahikiki, na kupwagha, ‘Bambo, nakamanyiki kubha wehapa nde wa mundu weunonwipe, uhuna panga kupanda, na ubhongana panga kupechangana imbeju.
25.25: Bhela nakajowipi, na kujihiya mbija jaku pahi ja luhombi. Utolaje, jenjenu nde mbija jaku.’
25.26: “Bambo waki akayangiki, ‘Wehapa nde wa mtumika muhakau na unkata. Umanyi kubha nepani nihuna panga kupanda, na kubhongana panga kupechangana.
25.27: Bhela ikakupaliki ubheka mbija jangu kwa bhandu bhabhabhoha nyonjeka, nanatu panakahikaje nakapata jejibhi jangu na nyonjeka jaki.
25.28: Henu, munyaghula mbija heji, na mumpekya jola joabhi nayu mbija komi.
25.29: Kwa ndandi kila joabhi na chindu anaajonjukiwaje, na kujonjukewa nakanopi. Nambu jola jwangakubha na chindu, hata chela cheabhi nachu anaanyaghulikaje.
25.30: Mtumika jola jwanga na nyonjeka, mundekala kunja mu lwihi. Konihoku anakubya chilelu na kuyagha mino.’ Utemulo wa kujomukela
25.31: “Chikahi Mwana waka Mundu paanahikaje ngati nkolongwa mu lujiniku lwaki, na bhatumika bhahuhu bhokapi bha kunani kumahunde, panihapa nde paitama pachitehu cha ukolongwa cha ulumbalilu waki.
25.32: Bhandu bha inchi yokapi bhalibongana palongi jaki, najombi anaabhalekanisha ngati mdima moalekanashe mambelele na imbuhi yaki.
25.33: Anaaghabheka mambelele ku chiwoku chaki cha kumalelelu, na imbuhi ku chiwoku chaki cha kumangeja.
25.34: Panihapa Nkolongwa anaabhapwaghila bhala bhabhabhi ku chiwoku chaki cha kumalelelu, ‘Muhikaje, mwehapa mwempengaliki na Atati wangu, mpwelila ukolongwa ghombekakiwi tayale kutumbu kubhombakeka kwa ndema.
25.35: Kwa ndandi nakabhi na injala, mkambeki chilebhe. Nakabhi na inywita, mkangengiki machi. Nakabhi nungeni, mkangalibishe.
25.36: Nakabhi heu, mkanhwatiki ingobhu. Nakabhi nuntamwa, mkahikiki kunilola. Nakabhi muchifungu, mkahikite.’
25.37: “Panihapa bhandu bhambone anabhumpwaghila, ‘Bambo, bho, lichobha bhole patukuweni ubhi na injala, tukakulehike, au ukabya na inywita, tukakukengiki machi?
25.38: Bho, kabheti lile patukuweni ukabya ungeni, tukakukalibishe, au ukabya heu, tukakuwatiki ingobhu?
25.39: Bho, lile kabheti patukuweni ukabya untamwa, au ukabya muchifungu, tukakuhikile kukubhona?’
25.40: Nkolongwa akayangiki, ‘Numpwaghila, chakaka, kila chindu chemukamhengi jumu wa bhalongu bhangu bhachoku abhabha, mkanihengi nepani!’
25.41: “Bhela akabhapwaghi bhala bhabhabhi ku chiwoku chaki cha kumangeja, ‘Mbokanya kwangu mwehapa mwempatiki masolu. Njendanya mu moto wa mileli ghoabhekakiwi Shetani papamu na bhatumika bhaki.
25.42: Kwa ndandi nakabhi na injala, ngachemwambeki chilebhe. Nakabhi na inywita, ngachemwangengiki machi.
25.43: Nakabhi nungeni, ngachemwangalibishe. Nakabhi heu, ngachemwanhwatiki ingobhu. Nakabhi nuntamwa, na muchifungo, ngachemwahikiki kunilola.’
25.44: “Panihapa na bhombi bhiyangaje, ‘Bambo, bho lichobha bhole patukuweni wehapa ukabya na injala, au ukabya na inywita, au ukabya ungeni, au ukabya heu, au ukabya umtamwa, au ukabya muchifungo, na tepanu ngachetukakujangatile?’
25.45: Nkolongwa akabhayangiki, ‘Chakaka numpwaghila, kila pankanika kumuhengela mambu aghagha jumu wabhu wa bhachoku abhabha, mkakaniki kunihengela nepani.’
25.46: Bhombi anabhajenda kujingila mu mang'ahiku gha mileli, nambu bhandu bhambone bhala anabhajenda mu womi wa mileli.”

26.1: Yesu paakajomwi kulonge mambu ghanihagha ghokapi, akabapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki,
26.2: “Mmanyi kubha machobha ghabheli ghaghahika kwibya na Uwangalalu wa Pasaka, na Mwana waka Mundu anaabhohakikaje nahuli awambakikaje punsalaba.”
26.3: Chikahi hechi bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa, bhalemba, na bhazee bha bhandu, bhakalibhongini paliwangala laka mpenganyambiku nkolongwa, lihina laki Kayafa.
26.4: Bhakajetanganili papamu ntundu wa kunkamula Yesu kwa kulihiya, na bhunkomaje.
26.5: Nambu bhakapwaghiki, “Ngaikubha chikahi cha uwangalalu la pasaka, ngakwihika kupitalila fujo pachilanda ja bhandu.” Yesu apakakika mahuta ku Besania Mako 14:3-9; Yohana 12:1-8
26.6: Chikahi Yesu paakabhi ku Besania, kunyumba jaka Simoni joakabhi na chitamu cha malohi,
26.7: akahikiki mbomba jumu akabya anyamwi libotolu lelalenganakiki kwa liganga la alabasta lelibhi na mahuta gha mbija jamaheli, na kughajitila pamutu jaka Yesu koni akabya atami pa chilebhe.
26.8: Bhabhulwa bhaka Yesu pabhaweni, bhakahakalili na kupwagha, “Bho, maghambu kiki kuhobheha manungilu aghagha waka?”
26.9: “Manungilu aghagha ghakabya ghalombasiki kwa mbija jamaheli, na kubhapekeha bhahochu mbija yene!”
26.10: Yesu akamanyi maholalelu ghabhu, akabhapwaghile, “Bho, mbona mung'aha mbomba ajoju? Anihengi lijambu lamboni namaa.
26.11: Kwa ndandi bhahochu mbi nabhu papamu machobha ghokapi, nambu nepanu ngangubhi papamu na mwehapa machobha ghokapi.
26.12: Kwa ndandi kwa kunyitalila hyegha jangu mahuta ghaghanungi wichu aghagha, ahengiki bhenibhela kwa kujilenganakela yegha jangu kwa kutaghakika kwangu.
26.13: Numpwaghi chakaka, pandu pokapi Malobhi Manyahi paghitangazwaje pundema wokapi, lihengu aleli leahengiki mbomba ajoju anabhaliloghulaje kwa kunkomboka jombi.” Yuda ajetakela kung'anambuka Yesu Mako 14:10-11; Luka 22:3-6
26.14: Bhela Yuda Isikalioti, jumu wa bhabhulwa komi na bhabheli bhala, akapiti kwa bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa,
26.15: na kupwagha, “Bho, anambekya chindu bhole, ngati ananumpeki Yesu kwinu?” Bhakambalangili ipandi selasini ya madini gha feza.
26.16: Kutumbu chikahi chenihechi, Yuda akabhi alonda mbekenyu ja kung'anambuka Yesu. Yesu akula chilebhi cha Pasaka papamu na bhabhulwa bhaki Mako 14:12-21; Luka 22:7-13,21-23; Yohana 13:21-30
26.17: Lichobha la kutumbula la Uwangalalu wa Mabumunda Gangakujegaleka Amila, bhabhulwa bhakapiti kwaka Yesu na kundalukila, “Bho, upala tukakuandalya kwaku chilebhi cha Pasaka?”
26.18: Yesu akayangiki, “Njendanya kumbwane kwaka mundu jumu, mukumpwaghilaje, ‘Mbola apwagha, chikahi changu chiheghalile, anangula Pasaka kwaku papamu na bhabhulwa bhangu kunyumba jako.’ ”
26.19: Bhabhulwa bhakahengiki ngati Yesu moakabhalagalakile, bhakaandi chilebhi cha Pasaka.
26.20: Pakukabhi pakamihi, Yesu akatami kula chilebhi papamu na bhabhulwa bhaki komi na bhabheli bhala.
26.21: Pabakabhi bhakula, Yesu akapwaghite, “Numpwaghi chakaka, jumu winu anaaning'anambukaje.”
26.22: Bhabhulwa bhala ukabhakabiniki ntima namaa, na bhakatumbwi kundalukila jumu jumu, “Bambo, bho, nepani lelo?”
26.23: Yesu akayangiki, “Jola joatobhalile libumunda papamu na nepani mu chikombe, jonihoju nde joaning'anambukaje.
26.24: Mwana waka Mundu ajenda ngati moilembakike mu Malembu Mahuhu, nambu anaachibhonaje mundu jola joang'anambuka Mwana waka Mundu! Ikabya mbanga kwaka mundu hoju ngati ngaakabhelakike.”
26.25: Yuda, jola joang'anambwiki, akundalukile, “Mbola, bho, nepani lelo?” Yesu akayangiki, “Wehapa ujomwi kupwagha.” Kutumbula kwa chilebhi chaka Bambo Mako 14:22-26; Luka 22:14-20; 1 Bhakolinso 11:23-25
26.26: Pabhakabhi bhakula, Yesu akatoliki libumunda, akalipengalili, akalihekiki, na kubhapekeha bhabhulwa bhaki, akapwagha, “Mtolaje, mkulaje, jenjenu nde hyegha jangu.”
26.27: Akachitoliki chikombi, akunchengwi Chapanga, na kubhapekeha, akapwagha, “Mkunywaje mabhokapi mu chikombi chenjenu,
26.28: kwa ndandi ghongoni nde mwahi wangu wa Lulaghilu lwa chakaka, mwahi ghoujitika kwa ndandi ja kubhoha mahoku gha bhandu bhamaheli.
26.29: Nambu numpwaghila, ngangunywi kabheti divai ja zabibu, mbaka lichobha lela panikunywa divai jahenu papamu na mwehapa mu Ukolongwa wa Atati wangu.”
26.30: Pabhakajomwi kujemba nyembu ja kundumbali Chapanga, bhakapitiki kunja na kujenda ku Chitombi cha Mizeituni. Yesu andotela Petulu anaankanaje Mako 14:27-31; Luka 22:31-34; Yohana 13:36-38
26.31: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Lalenu ikilu mwehapa mabhokapi anamndilaje, kwa ndandi Malembu Mahuhu ghapwagha, ‘Ananundapula mdima, na mambeleli gha lipogha ghitenda kupechangana.’
26.32: Nambu ananyomwi kuhyoka, ananundongulya kujenda ku Galilaya.”
26.33: Petulu akayangiki, “Hata ngati bhokapi anabhakulekiki, nepanu nganakuleki ng'o.”
26.34: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Nukupwaghi chakaka, wehapa, ikilu ja lalenu mangani ja kubheka likongobhe, wingana mala patatu.”
26.35: Petulu akayangiki, “Hata ngati imbalika kupotela papamu na wehapa, nganakuleki ng'o.” Na bhabhulwa bhokapi bhakapwaghiki bhelabhela. Yesu andobha Chapanga ku Gethemane Mako 14:32-42; Luka 22:39-46
26.36: Bhela Yesu akapiti papamu na bhabhulwa bhaki mbaka pandu papalowakeka Gethemane, na kubhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Mtamanya pambane, nepanu nyenda palongi nakanopi kundobha Chapanga.”
26.37: Akuntoliki Petulu papamu na bhana bhabheli bhaka Zebedayo, na akatumbwi kubha na mabhinilu na kungajika.
26.38: Panihapa akabhapwaghile, “Mi na mabhinilu makolongwa muntima jangu hata pambipi kupotela. Ntamanya pambani na mkeshaje papamu na nepani.”
26.39: Bhela akajendali palongi pachokopi, akaabwiki ukutama, na kundobha Chapanga, akapwagha, “Atati wangu, ngati anaiwezikana, chikombi chenjenu cha mang'ahiku chimbetaje. Nambu ngakwikubha ngati mombalila nepanu, nambu ngati moupali wehapa.”
26.40: Akakelawiki kwa bhabhulwa bhala, na kubhahimani bhaghochile. Akumpwaghi Petulu, “Bho, ngachemwaweziki kutama mihu na nepanu hata lisaa limu?
26.41: Mtama mihu, na mlobhaje ngamwihika kujingi mu malengakeku. Roho jipala nambu hyegha ngachejibhi na makili.”
26.42: Yesu akapiti kabheti pakabheli kundobha Chapanga, “Atati wangu, anangati ngacheiwezikana chikombi achechi cha mang'ahiku chimbetaje pangakunywelela, mapalu ghaku ghapitalyaje.”
26.43: Akakelabwiki kabheti, na kubhahimani bhaghochile, kwa ndandi mihu ghabhu ghakatweli lughono.
26.44: Akabhalekiki kabheti, na kujenda kundobha Chapanga pakatatu, koni akapwagha malobhi ghalaghala.
26.45: Bhela akakelabwiki kabheti kwa bhabhulwa bhaki, na kubhapwaghila, “Bho, mwakali kughochela na kupomulela? Mlingalya, chikahi chihikite, na Mwana waka Mundu anaajeghalika mu mabhoku gha bhabhabhi na mahoku.
26.46: Njumukaje, na tumbokanyaje. Ndingalya, jola joaying'anambukaje ahika!” Yesu akamulika Mako 14:43-50; Luka 22:47-53; Yohana 18:3-12
26.47: Bhela, Yesu paakabhi akali kulongela nabhu, palapala akahikiki Yuda, jumu wa bhabhulwa komi na bhabheli bhala. Papamu naku lakabhi lipogha likolongwa bhanyamwi mapanga na indonga, bhakabya bhahumiki kwa bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa na bhazee bha bhandu.
26.48: Jola joapalika kung'anambuka Yesu jola akajomwi kubhapekeha nginyulila kubha, “Jola jonambuswaje, jonihoju nde jombi, munkamulaje!”
26.49: Bhela, Yuda akamuheghali Yesu, na kupwagha, “Monile, Mbola!” Na kumbusu.
26.50: Yesu akamuyangiki, “Nkoche, uhenga lela leuhiki kulihenga.” Panihapa bhandu bhala bhakapiti, na kuhatambula mabhoku ghabhu, na kunkamula na kunkonga.
26.51: Lingalya, jumu wa bhala bhabhakabhi papamu na Yesu akaholapwi lipanga laki, na kundapula mtumika waka Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa, na kuncheku likutu.
26.52: Panihapa Yesu akumpwaghile, “Ukelabhuha lipanga laku pandu paki. Kwa ndandi jokapi joatumi lipanga, anaapotila kwa lipanga.
26.53: Bho, uholake kubha nepanu ngachenhweza kundobha Atati wangu, najombi akabya anetile sajenu manjolinjoli mapogha komi na ghabheli nakanopi gha bhatumika bha kunani kwaka Chapanga?
26.54: Nambu ngati ananhengiki bhenibhela, bho, anaghapitalya bhole Malembu Mahuhu ghala ghaghapwagha kubha ipalika mambu aghagha ghapitalyaje?”
26.55: Chikahi hechi Yesu akabhapwaghi lipogha la bhandu bhabhakahikiki kunkamula, “Bho, muhikiki kungamula kwa mapanga na indonga ngati nepani nde mnyaghula? Machobha ghokapi ndamika mu liwangala la Nyumba jaka Chapanga koni nakabholaje, na ngachemwangamwile.
26.56: Nambu mambu aghagha ghokapi ghahengakiki, nahuli Malembu Mahuhu gha bhalota bhaka Chapanga ghapitalyaje.” Panihapa bhabhulwa bhokapi bhakundekiki, na kutila. Yesu palongi ja pachengu Mako 14:53-65; Luka 22:54-55,63-71; Yohana 18:13-14,19-24
26.57: Bhela, bhabhunkamwi Yesu bhakumpeliki kunyumba jaka Kayafa, joakabhi Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa, kobhakabhii bhalibhongini bhalemba na bhazee bha bhandu.
26.58: Nambu Petulu akunjengalili cha kutali mbaka pa liwangala laka Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa, akajingi mkati, na kutama papamu na bhalonda, nahuli alola mambu moghijomukyaje.
26.59: Bhela, bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa, papamu na chengu chokapi, bhakalondiki ulandilu wa icholi panani jaka Yesu, nahuli bhapata kunkoma,
26.60: nambu ngachebhakuweni ulandilu wokapi, hata koni bhakahikiki bhalandilu bhamaheli bha icholi. Pakujomukela bhakahikiki bhalandila bhabheli,
26.61: na kupwagha, “Mundu ajoju akapwaghiki, ‘Nhweza kujibombo Nyumba jaka Chapanga, na kujichenga kabheti kwa machobha ghatatu.’ ”
26.62: Henu Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa akajemiki, na kundaluki Yesu, “Bho, ngacheuyanga lilobhi? Bho, bhandu abhabha bhukutaki kyani panani jaku?”
26.63: Nambu Yesu akatumbi chinunu. Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa akumpwaghile, “Nukulapisha kwaka Chapanga joabhi mwome, utupwaghilaje ngati wehapa nde wa Kristo, Mwana waka Chapanga.”
26.64: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Wehapa upwaghite. Nambu numpwaghila, kutumbu sajenu anamumbona Mwana waka Mundu atemi ku chiwoku cha kumalelelu chaka Chapanga mwene makili, na akahika panani ja mahundi gha kunani kumahunde.”
26.65: Panihapa Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa akakachwili ingobhu yaki, koni akapwagha, “Atehi kutondola! Bho, tupala kabheti ulandilu ghongi wa kyane? Sajenu njowini kutondoka kwaki.
26.66: Bho, mwanganya muholale bhole?” Bhombi bhakayangiki, “Impalika kupotela.”
26.67: Panihapa bhakamuhuni imata kumihu, bhakundapwi ngumi, na bhangi bhakumbangwi maghanja,
26.68: koni bhakapwaghaje, “We Kristo, ulotilaje, bho, nane joakulapwile?” Petulu ankana Yesu Mako 14:66-72; Luka 22:56-62; Yohana 18:15-18,25-27
26.69: Petulu akabhi atemi kunja kuliwangala. Mtumika jumu wa chimbomba akunjendili, na kupwagha, “Wehapa nanau ukabhi papamu na Yesu wa ku Galilaya.”
26.70: Petulu akakaniki palongi ja bhandu bhokapi, koni akapwagha, “Ngachenimanyi cheulongela.”
26.71: Paakabhi apita pundyangu, mtumika jongi wa chimbomba akumbweni, na akabhapwaghi bhandu bhabhakabhi panihapa, “Mundu ajoju akabhi papamu na Yesu wa ku Nazaleti.”
26.72: Petulu akakaniki kabheti kwa kulapa, “Ngachenummanyi mundu ajoju.”
26.73: Palongi pachokopi, bhandu bhabhakabhi panipala bhakunjendi Petulu, na kumpwaghila, “Chakaka, wehapa nde jumu wabhu, kwa ndandi hata kulongela kwaku kukulangiha.”
26.74: Panihapa Petulu akatumbwi kusola na kulapa, koni akapwagha, “Ngachenummanyi mundu hoju.” Palapala likongobhi likabekite.
26.75: Petulu akalikombwiki lilobhi lela leakalongi Yesu, “Mangani ja likongobhi kubheka, wingana mala patatu.” Bhela akapitiki kunja, na kulela kwa mabhinilu.

27.1: Pakwahiki lukela, bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa, na bhazee bha bhandu bhakahimangini kulongela nahuli bhapata kunkoma Yesu.
27.2: Bhakunkongiki minyololu, bhakuntoliki na kumpeleka kwaka Pilato, nkolongwa wa Kiloma. Yuda alikongela Matendu 1:18-19
27.3: Panihapa Yuda, jola joakang'anambwike, paakaweni kubha bhajomwi kuntemula Yesu, ukambiniki mtima namaa, akabhakelabhuki bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa na bhazee ipandi selasini ya madini gha feza yela,
27.4: koni akapwagha, “Ndehi mahoku kwa kung'anambuka mundu jwanga na lihakau.” Nambu bhombi bhakayangike, “Bho, tepani tutenda kike? Leniheli umanya wamwete.”
27.5: Yuda akaileki ipandi ya madini gha feza yela pa Nyumba jaka Chapanga, akabokiki, na kujenda kulikongela.
27.6: Bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa bhakaitoliki ipandi ya mbjija yela, na kupwagha, “Ngacheipalika kuibheka mu chikoku cha nyambiku, kwa ndandi nde mbija yeipatakini kwa kukoma.”
27.7: Bhela bhakajetanganili, na bhakaitumi kwa kuhemela ngonda wa lutopi, lubya pandu pa kubhataghi bhaghene.
27.8: Nde ndandi mbaka lalenu ngonda hoghu ulowakeka, “Ngonda wa mwahi.”
27.9: Panihapa nde ghakapitali malobhi ghaka mlota Yelemia, “Bhakaitoliki ipandi selasini ya mbija, malepu ghaka jola ambaju Bhaizilaeli bhakajetakili kulepa,
27.10: na kuitumila kwa kuhemela ngonda wa lutopi, ngati Bambo moakalaghalakile.” Pilato andaluki Yesu Mako 15:2-5; Luka 23:3-5; Yohana 18:33-38
27.11: Yesu akajemiki palongi jaka nkolongwa wa ku Loma joakabhi nkolongwa wa mkoa. Bhela nkolongwa hoju akundalukile, “Bho, wehapa le unkolongwa wa Bhayahude?” Yesu akamuyangiki, “Wehapa upwaghike.”
27.12: Nambu bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa papamu na bhazee, pabhakuntakile ngacheakayangiki lilobhi.
27.13: Panihapa Pilato akumpwaghile, “Bho, ngacheujowana mambu ghanihagha ghokapi ghabhukutaki nagho?”
27.14: Nambu Yesu ngacheakayangiki lilobhi hata limu, na nkolongwa wa ku Loma hoju akakangichi namaa. Yesu atemulika kupotela Mako 15:6-15; Luka 23:13-25; Yohana 18:39-19:16
27.15: Bhela kila chikahi cha Uwangalalu wa Pasaka, nkolongwa wa Kiloma akabhi na ntetu wa kumbopulela mkongeka jumu jobhumpala bhandu.
27.16: Chikahi hechi akabhi mkongeka jumu joakamanyakini namaa, lihina laki Balaba.
27.17: Bhela pabhakalibhongini, Pilato akabhapwaghile, “Bho, mpala numbopulya nane? Numbopulya Balaba, au Yesu joalowakeka Kristo?”
27.18: Kwa ndandi akamanyiki kubha bhakundetiki Yesu kwaki kwa ndandi ja wihu wa bhakolongwa bha Bhayahude.
27.19: Chikahi Pilato paakatemi pachitehu chaki cha utemulu, nhwanu waki akumpelaki ubholu, na kumpwaghila, “Ngawikubha na lilobhi lokapi lela na mundu wambone. Kwa ndandi lalenu ng'ahakiki namaa mu ndoto kwa ndandi jaki.”
27.20: Bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa papamu na bhazee bhakabhapwaghi lipogha la bhandu nahuli bhunjopa Balaba abhopuliwaje, na bhunkoma Yesu.
27.21: Pilato akabhalalukile, “Bho, mpala numbopulya nane pachilanda ja bhabheli abhabha?” Bhakayangiki, “Balaba.”
27.22: Pilato akabhalalukile, “Bho, henu nhenga kiki na Yesu joalowakeka Kristo?” Bhokapi bhakayangiki, “Unhwambaje punsalaba!”
27.23: Nambu Pilato akabhalalukile, “Bho, kwa ndandi ja kike? Bho, ahengiki lihoku bhole?” Nambu bhombi bhakajendali kujamalila, koni bhakapwaghaje, “Unhwambaje punsalaba!”
27.24: Bhela Pilato paakaweni kubha njeta chindu chengi cheaweza kutenda, na njobhela ijonjukeka, akatoliki machi, na kuchamba mabhoku ghaki palongi ja lipogha lokapi, koni akapwaghaje, “Nepani ngachemi na lihoku panani ja mwahi waka mundu ajoju wambone, mmanya mabhete!”
27.25: Bhandu bhokapi bhakayangiki, bhakapwaghaje, “Mwahi waki na ubya panani jitu, na panani ja bhana bhitu!”
27.26: Panihapa akabhabhopuli Balaba, na paakalaghalaki Yesu bhundapula iboku, akumbohiki nahuli awambakikaje punsalaba. Manjolinjoli bhundongama Yesu Mako 15:16-20; Yohana 19:2-3
27.27: Panihapa manjolinjoli bhaka Pilato bhakumpeliki Yesu mu nyumba ja kikolongwa jaka Pilato, na kulibhongana manjolinjoli bhokapi kumuyongolota Yesu.
27.28: Bhakamuhuliki ingobhu yaki, na kumuwatika ingobhu jikeli ngati nkolongwa.
27.29: Bhakalokiki litaji la miha, bhakunhwatiki pamutu jaki, na kumbekela ndahi mu chiwoku chaki cha kumalelelu. Bhakachikimi palongi jaki, bhakundongimi, bhakapwaghaje, “Monile, Unkolongwa wa Bhayahude!”
27.30: Bhakunhuni imata, bhakautoliki ndahi ghola, na kundapula naghu pamutu.
27.31: Pabhakajomwi kundongama, bhakajihuliki ingobhu jela, bhakamuwatiki ingobhu jaki, na kumpeleka kumuwamba punsalaba. Yesu awambakika punsalaba Mako 15:21-32; Luka 23:26-43; Yohana 19:17-27
27.32: Pabhakabhi bhajenda, bhakumbweni mundu jumu Mkilene, lihina laki Simoni. Jonihoju bhakuntwekiki msalaba waka Yesu kwa makili.
27.33: Pabhakahikiki pandu papalowakeka Goligota, ndandi jaki, Lifuvu la Mmutu,
27.34: bhakumpeki Yesu kunywa divai jejihangaghini na chindu chibhabha. Nambu jombi paakajionjiki, akakaniki kunywa.
27.35: Pabhakajomwi kunhwamba punsalaba, bhakaghabhini ingobhu yaki, kwa kuilapulila kula. Nahuli ghapitalya malobhi ghaakapwaghiki mlota waka Chapanga, “Bhakaghabhini ingobhu yangu ya kunja, na kanzu jangu ja mkati bhakajilapuli kula.”
27.36: Bhela bhakatemi pahi, koni bhakabya bhundenda.
27.37: Panani ja mmutu waki, punsalaba, bhakalembiki litakilu laki, “Ajoju nde Yesu, Nkolongwa wa Bhayahude.”
27.38: Chikahi chenihechi bhakongeka bhabheli bhanyaghula bhakawambakiki papamu na Yesu, jumu ku chiwoku chaki cha kumalelelu, na jongi ku chiwoku chaki cha kumangeja.
27.39: Bhandu bhabhakabhi bhapeta mwindela bhakuntondwile, koni bhakanyuha mimutu jabhu, na kupwagha.
27.40: “Wehapa, weupwaghika uweza kujiyonanga Nyumba jaka Chapanga na kuchenga kwa machobha ghatatu, ulikengalya wamwete. Ana ngati wehapa wa Mwana waka Chapanga, uhuluka punsalaba hapa!”
27.41: Bhelabhela, bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa papamu na bhalemba bha Shelia na bhazee, bhakundongimi bhakapwaghaje,
27.42: “Akabhakengali bhangi, nambu ngacheaweza kulikengalela mweni. Ana ngati jombi nde Nkolongwa wa Izilaeli, ahuluka punsalaba, na tepanu anatunhobhalyaje!
27.43: Anhobhale Chapanga, na kupwagha eti jombi nde Mwana waka Chapanga, bhela Chapanga ankengalya sajenu, ngati anaampala.”
27.44: Bhanyaghula bhabhawambakiki papamu naku bhala, bhakuntondwi kwa indela jejeji. Yesu apotela punsalaba Mako 15:33-41; Luka 23:44-49; Yohana 19:28-30
27.45: Kutumbu chikahi cha saa sita mbaka saa tisa, inchi jokapi jakabhi lwihi.
27.46: Ngati saa tisa, Yesu akajamalili sauti jaki kwa makili, akapwagha, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakitani?” Ndandi jaki, “Chapanga wangu, Chapanga wangu, mbona unehile?”
27.47: Nambu bhandu bhakumu bhala bhabhakabhi bhajemani panihapa, pabhakajowini ghanihagha, bhakapwaghite, “Andoha Eliya!”
27.48: Jumu wabhu akakembili imbelu, akatoliki siponji, na kujitwelakela divai jejilolike, na kujibheka pandahi na kumpekeha akunywaje.
27.49: Bhandu bhangi bhakapwaghiki, “Lendalya, tulolaje ana ngati Eliya ahika kunkengalela!”
27.50: Yesu paakajamalili kabheti kwa sauti ngolongwa, akahekiti roho jaki.
27.51: Palapala lipazia la Nyumba jaka Chapanga likakachwiki ipandi ibhele, kutumbu kunani mbaka pahi. Ndema ukanyukike, na maganga ghakakajwike,
27.52: matengeli ghakahogwike, na hyegha yamaheli ya bhandu bhaka Chapanga bhabhakapotile bhakahyokite.
27.53: Bhabhakapitiki mumatengeli, paakajomwi Yesu kuhyoka, bhakapiti kujingila mu Muchi Uhuhu, na kubhonikana na bhandu bhamaheli.
27.54: Bhela nkolongwa wa manjolinjoli na bhala bhabhakabhi bhundenda Yesu, pabhakaweni kunyukanyuka kwa ndema, na mambu ghaghahengakike, bhakajowipi namaa, bhakapwaghaje, “Chakaka, mundu ajoju akabhi Mwana waka Chapanga!”
27.55: Pakabhi na akambomba bhamaheli panipala bhakalingalya cha kutali. Bhanihabha nde bhala bhabhunjengalya Yesu kuhuma ku Galilaya, na kuntumakila.
27.56: Papu akabhi Malia Magidalena, Malia mabhu waka Yakobo na Yusufu, na nhwanu waka Zebedayo. Yesu ataghakika Mako 15:42-47; Luka 23:50-56; Yohana 19:38-42
27.57: Pakwahiki pakamihi, akahikiki mundu jumu mwana hindu yamaheli mwenei wa ku Alimataya, lihina laki Yusufu. Jonihoju najombi akabhi mbulwa waka Yesu.
27.58: Yusufu akapiti kwaka Pilato, na kunjopa ampekya hyegha jaka Yesu. Bhela Pilato akalaghalaki antolaje.
27.59: Yusufu akajitoliki hyegha jaka Yesu, na kujiyongalowa ingobhu jinyahi jihuhu,
27.60: na kujibheka hyegha mulitengeli laki Yusufu lahenu, leakabhi alilenganaki paliganga. Akahingali liganga likolongwa pandyangu wa litengeli, na mweni kubhoka.
27.61: Panipala akabhi Malia Magidalena, na Malia jongi jola, bhakabhi bhatemi palongi ja litengeli. Kulenda litengeli
27.62: Chilabhu jaki, yani lichobha la kabheli baada ja Lichobha la Maandaliu gha Lichobha la Sabato, bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa, na Mafalisayo bhakunjendi Pilato,
27.63: bhakapwaghike, “Nkolongwa, tukombwiki kubha mpuhi jola akapwaghike, ‘Paghipeta machobha ghatatu anahyokaje.’
27.64: Bhela ulaghalakya litengeli lilendakika wichu mbaka lichobha la katatu, ngabhihika bhabhulwa bhaki kunjibha, na kubhapwaghi bhandu kubha ahyokiki kuhuma kwa bhakuwa. Upuhi wa kujomukela anaupeta ghola wa kutumbula.”
27.65: Pilato akabhapwaghile, “Mbi na bhalenda, njendanya mkalilenda wichu ngati mommanyila.”
27.66: Bhakapiti, bhakalilendiki litengeli wichu, kwa kulijeghela liganga la pundyangu lela alama, na kubhabheka manjolinjoli bhalendaje.

28.1: 18 Palapetiki Lichobha la Sabato, lukela pachiwombu lichobha lela la Jumapile, Malia Magidalena, na Malia jongi jola bhakapiti kulibhona litengeli.
28.2: Palapala pakapitali chinyukunyuku chikolongwa cha ndema, kwa ndandi mtumika wa kunani waka Bambo akahelile kuhuma kunani kumahunde, akalihingali liganga la pundyangu lela, na kulitamila panani.
28.3: Sula jaki jakabhi ngati unang'anu wa chitobhi, na ingobhu yaki ihuhu kupukupu.
28.4: Bhalonda bha litengeli bhala pabhakumbweni bhakabhaghiji kwa choghohi, na kubha ngati bhabhapotile.
28.5: Mtumika wa kunani kwaka Chapanga jola akabhapwaghi akambomba bhala, “Mwehapa ngamwijogopa! Kwa ndandi manyi kubha mundonda Yesu, joakawambakike punsalaba.
28.6: Ngacheabhi pambane, kwa ndandi ahyokike ngati moakapwaghile. Muhikaje pambani mupabhona pandu pabhakungoniki Bambo.
28.7: Bhela njendanya manyata, mkabhapwaghila bhabhulwa bhaki, ‘Ahyokiki kuhuma kwa bhakuwa. Lingalyaje, sajenu andongulela kujenda ku Galilaya, konihoku nde komwakumbonaje.’ Haya, nyomwi kumpwaghila.”
28.8: Bhakabhokiki manyata kuhuma palitengeli, kwa choghohi na chiheku chamaheli, na kubhutuka imbelu kubhapwaghila bhabhulwa bhaki.
28.9: Palapala Yesu akahimangini nabhu, akapwaghaje, “Lukwali lubya na mwehapa!” Akambomba bhala bhakunheghalili, bhakachikimi na kunkamula magholu, na kunjojabhela.
28.10: Panihapa Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Ngamwijoghopa, njendanya mkabhapwaghila bhalongu bhangu bhajenda ku Galilaya, konihoku nde kobhakamonaje.” Ubholu wa bhalonda bha litengeli
28.11: Akambomba bhala pabhakabhi bhajenda, lingalyaje, bhalonda bha litengeli bhakumu bhakajingi mumbwane, na kubhapwaghi bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa mambu ghokapi ghaghahengakike.
28.12: Bhela, bhakalibhongini papamu na bhazee, na pabhakalongalanile, bhakabhapeki manjolinjoli bhala mbija yamaheli,
28.13: bhakapwaghaje, “Mabhanganya mpwagha kubha, ‘Bhabhulwa bhaki bhakahikiki ikilu, na kunjibha chikahi tepani patwaghochile.’
28.14: Ngati nkolongwa anaajowini malobhi ghangane, tepani anatulongila naku, na mwehapa ngamwipati mang'ahiku ghokapi ghala.”
