8.45: Yesu akalalukile, “Bho, nde nane joangamwile?” Bhandu bhokapi bhakakaniki, Petulu akapwaghike, “Bambo, lipogha la bhandu likuyongalwiti na kukuhinya.”
8.46: Nambu Yesu akapwaghike, “Kubhi mundu joangamwile, ndandi niliweni makili ghamokite.”
8.47: Mbomba jola paamanyiti kubha ngaawezi kulihiya, akahikiki koni abhaghaja kwa choghohi na kulileke palongi jaka Yesu. Panihapa akundandi Yesu palongi ja bhandu bhokapi bhabhakabhi panipala ndandi ja kunkamu Yesu na ntundu moawezi kulamishwa palapala.
8.48: Yesu akumpwaghi mwali jola, “Kamwali, uhobhalelu waku ukulamihe. Ujenda kwa lukwale.”
8.49: Yesu paakabhi ajendale kupwagha, mbolu akahikiki kuhuma kunyumba jaka Yairo. Na kumpwaghi Yairo, “Mwali waku apotile. Ngawijendale kung'aha Mbola.”
8.50: Nambu Yesu paakajowini malobhi ghanihagha, akumpwaghi Yairo, “Ngawijoghopa, uhobhalya pela, na mwali waku analamiswaje.”
8.51: Yesu paakahikiki kunyumba jaka Yairo, ngacheanjetakali mundu jokapi kujingi naku munyumba, nambu Petulu na Yohana na Yakobo na mabhu na atati bhaka mwali joapotili jola.
8.52: Bhandu bhokapi bhakabhi bhundelela na kuombuleza kwa ndandi ja kupotela kwaka mwana. Nambu Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Ngamwilela, maghambu mwana ngacheapotile, nambu aghochili lughonu pela!”
8.53: Bhokapi bhakundongimi Yesu, maghambu bhakamanyiki kubha mwali apotile.
8.54: Nambu Yesu akamkamwi chibhoku na kundoha, “Kamwali, jumukaje!”
8.55: Mwali joakapotili jola womi waki ukankelabhukile, na palapala akajemiki. Na Yesu akabhalaghalakili bhumpekya mwali chilebhi.
8.56: Bhabheleka bhaki bhakakangichi namaa, nambu Yesu akabhalaghalaki ngabhumpwaghi mundu ghaghahengakike.

9.1: Yesu akabhalohiki bhabhulwa bhaki komi na bhabheli, akabhapeki makili na uwezu wa kughatopo majobhi na kulamiha bhatamwa.
9.2: Bhela akabhatumiki bhajenda kubhatangazi bhandu ubholu wa Ukolongwa waka Chapanga na kubhalamiha bhatamwa.
9.3: Akapwagha, “Ngamwitogho chindu chokapi chela pa mwanja winu, ngamwitogho nkongochu, wala nkoba, wala chilebhi, wala mbija, wala ingobhu ibhele.
9.4: Nyumba jokapi jemwijingalaji na kujopalewa, mtamaje monihomu mbaka pamwibhoka mu muchi ghonihoghu.
9.5: Ana ngati bhandu bhikana kunjopalela, mboka muchi ghonihoghu na nkung'undaje luhombi mu magholu ghinu ngati ulandilu kubha bhombi bhakaniki kunjowanela.”
9.6: Panihapa bhabhulwa bhakabhokiki na kujenda kwijiji, koni bhakatangaza Malobhi Manyahi na kubhalamiha bhandu pandu pokapi. Choghohi chaka Helode Matayo 14:1-12; Mako 6:14-29
9.7: Helode mtawala wa ku Galilaya, akajowini malobhi ghokapi ghaghatendakiki na Yesu. Na jombi akabhi na choghohi, maghambu bhandu bhapwaghika kubha Yohana Mbatizaji ayokiki kuhuma kwa bhakuwa.
9.8: Bhangi bhapwaghika Eliya atehi kupitalila, na bhangi bhapwaghika kubha jumu wa bhalota bhaka Chapanga bha mwandi atehi kuyoka.
9.9: Helode akapwaghike, “Yohana nukunhekiti mmutu, bho, henu ajoju nde nane ambaju nyowana malobhi ghaki?” Na jombi akatokuli kumbona Yesu. Yesu abhaleha bhandu elfu nhwano Matayo 14:13-21; Mako 6:30-44; Yohana 6:1-14
9.10: Mitumi bhaka Yesu pabhakelawiki bhakumpwaghi Yesu ghokapi ghabhahengiki. Na jombi akabhatoliki bhabhulwa bhaki na kujenda nabhu kanjika jabhu ku muchi wa ku Betisaida.
9.11: Nambu lipogha la bhandu palamanyiki koajenda, bhakunjengalile. Yesu akabhajopalili, na kubhapwaghila panani ja Ukolongwa waka Chapanga, na kubhalamiha bhandu bhabhakabhi bhapala kulamishwa.
9.12: Pakwahiki pakamihi, bhabhulwa komi na bhabheli bhala bhakunjendi Yesu na kumpwaghila, “Wapwaghila bhandu bhajenda kwijiji na mu manyumba yeibhi pambipi na mighonda nahuli bhakalinga chilebhi na pandu pa kughonela, maghambu pandu pani pachingwenje.”
9.13: Nambu Yesu akabhayangiki, “Mwanganya mwabhete mwapekya chilebhe.” Bhombi bhakapwaghike, “Tubhinaghu pela mabumunda nhwanu na homba ibheli. Bho, upala le tujenda kuheme chilebhi cha kubhaleha bhandu bhokapi abhabha?”
9.14: Pandu panipala pakabhi na akanalomi ngati elfu nhwano. Yesu akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Mwatamika bhandu mu mapogha na kila lipogha likubhaje na bhandu hamsini.”
9.15: Bhabhulwa bhaki bhakatei bhenibhela, na kubhatamika pahi.
9.16: Yesu akatohi mabumunda nhwanu ghala na homba ibheli, akalingali kunani kumahunde, akaipengalile. Bhela akahekiti mabumunda na homba, na kubhapeke bhabhulwa bhaki bhaghabhila bhandu.
9.17: Bhandu bhokapi bhakakuliki na bhakatupile. Na bhabhulwa bhakabhongini mahighalilu gha mabumunda na homba itonga komi na ibheli. Petulu anjetakela Yesu kubha nde Kristo Matayo 16:13-19; Mako 8:27-29
9.18: Lichobha limu Yesu paakabhi andobha Chapanga pandu pa kanjika. Bhabhulwa bhaki bhakunjendile, najombi akabhalalukili, “Bho, bhandu bhapwagha kubha nepani nde nane?”
9.19: Bhakanjangiki, “Bhandu bhangi bhapwagha wehapa wa Yohana Mbatizaji, na bhangi bhapwagha wehapa wa Eliya, na bhangi bhapwagha, wehapa nde jumu wa bhalota bhaka Chapanga bhamwande weuyokike.”
9.20: Na jombi akabhalalukile, “Bho, mwanganya mpwagha nepani na nane?” Petulu akayangaki, “Wehapa nde wa Kristo waka Chapanga.” Yesu alongalela kupotela kwaki Matayo 16:20-28; Mako 8:30-9:1
9.21: Bhela Yesu akabhakanaki ngabhampwaghi mundu lijambu leniheli.
9.22: Yesu akapwaghiki kabheti, “Impalika Mwana waka Mundu kupata mang'ahiku na kukanakika na bhazee, bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa, na bhabhola bha Shelia. Na jombi anabhunkomaje, nambu lichobha la katatu anayokaje.”
9.23: Kabheti akabhapwaghi bhokapi, “Mundu jokapi jopala kubha mbulwa wangu, impalika alikana mweni, autola msalaba waki machobha ghokapi, na anyengalyaje.
9.24: Ndandi mundu jokapi joapala kukengalela womi waki anauhoaje, nambu joahoa womi waki kwa ndandi jangu, anaukengalyaje.
9.25: Bho, anakunjangatya kiki mundu kupata kila chindu chekibhi pani pundema koni auhoa womi waki au kuliyonanga mweni?
9.26: Anangati mundu amonela iyoni nepani na mabholu ghangu, Mwana waka Mundu anambonila iyoni mundu hoju paanahika mu ulumbalilu waki, na ulumbalilu wa Atati waki, na ulumbalilu wa bhatumika bhahuhu bha kunani bhaka Chapanga.
9.27: Numpwaghi chakaka, bhabhi bhangi bhabhajemiki pambani ngabhapoteli mbaka pabhaubhona Ukolongwa waka Chapanga.” Yesu ang'anambuka pamihu Matayo 17:1-8; Mako 9:2-8
9.28: Paghapetiki machobha nane kutumbu palongila ghanihagha, Yesu akuntoi Petulu, na Yohana, na Yakobo papamu nabhu na kukwela nabhu kuchitombi kundobha Chapanga.
9.29: Yesu paakabhi andobha Chapanga, pamihu jaki pakang'anambwiki, na ingobhu yaki ikang'anyiki ng'aing'ai.
9.30: Palapala bhakapitali bhandu bhabheli na kulonge naku. Bhandu habha bhakabhi Musa na Eliya,
9.31: bhakabhonakini bhakabya mu ulumbalilu wa kunani kumahunde na bhakalongi na Yesu panani ja kutimiza lengu laka Chapanga kwa kupotela ku Yelusalemu.
9.32: Petulu na bhajaki bhakabhi bhaghochi lughonu nakanopi, na bhakakikanwiki na kuubhona ulumbalilu waka Yesu na bhandu bhabhheli bhabhajemiki papamu naku.
9.33: Musa na Eliya pabhabhokiki, Petulu akumpwaghi Yesu, “Bambo, mbanga tepani tutama pambane! Tuchenga indamba itatu, chimu chaku, chengi chaka Musa na chengi chaka Eliya.” Petulu ngacheakamanyi chealongilaje.
9.34: Petulu paakabhi alonge ghanihagha, lihundi lakapitalili na kubhayeka kwa nhwili waki, na bhabhulwa bhakajowipi ntundu lihundi molakabhayekile.
9.35: Sauti jakajowaniki kuhuma mu lihundi, jakapwagha, “Hajoju nde Mwana wangu jonunhawile, munjowanya jombi.”
9.36: Sauti pajakotwiki kujowaneka, Yesu akabhonakini abhi kanjika. Bhabhulwa bhakatami chinunu, na kwa chikahi chenihechi ngachebhumpwaghi mundu chindu chokapi chebhachiwene. Yesu andamiha nkombu joakamuliki na majobhi Matayo 17:14-18; Mako 9:14-27
9.37: Chilabhu jaki Yesu na bhabhulwa bhatatu bhala bhakaheli kuhuma kuchitombi, na lipogha likolongwa la bhandu lakaimangini na Yesu.
9.38: Mundu jumu kuhuma mu lipogha akajamalili, akapwaghaje, “Mbola! Nukujopa undingalya mwana wangu, kwa ndandi jombi nde mwana wangu wa kanjika!
9.39: Chikahi chamaheli majobhi ghunkamula, najombi palapala ajamalila, kabheti ghunjeghe chihinduhindu, koni akapita mahuluhulu mundomu, ghunkojo muhyegha, na anaghunkamwi ghundekake kwa kung'ahika!
9.40: Nakabhajopiki bhabhulwa bhaku bhumboha lijobhi, nambu ngachebhawezike.”
9.41: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Mwenga chibheleku changa uhobhalelu na chechihobhike! Bho, anandama na mwenga mbaka lile? Bho, ananunhinakalya mbaka line?” Bhela akumpwaghi mundu jola, “Undeta mwana waku pambane.”
9.42: Nkombu jola paakabhi anjende Yesu, lijobhi lela lakunjeghi chihinduhindu na kunhabhu pahi. Yesu akandakali lijobhi, akundamihi nkombu hoju na kunkelabhua kwa atati waki.
9.43: Bhandu bhokapi bhakakangichi kwa kubhona uwezu ukolongwa waka Chapanga. Yesu alonge kabheti panani ja kupotela kwaki Matayo 17:22-23; Mako 9:30-32 Bhandu bhokapi pabhabhi bhakona kukangacha mambu ghahengika Yesu, jombi akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki,
9.44: “Njowanakya ghanga ghanumpwaghila! Mwana waka Mundu anaajeghalika mu mabhoku gha bhandu.”
9.45: Nambu bhabhulwa bhaki ngachebhamanyiki ndandi ja malobhi ghanihagha, na ghakahiyakiki kwabhu nahuli ngabhimanya, na bhombi bhakajowipi kundalukila Yesu ndandi ja malobhi ghanihagha. Joabhi nkolongwa nane? Matayo 18:1-5; Mako 9:33-37
9.46: Bhabulwa bhaka Yesu bhakatumbwi kulochana kubha nde nane joaibya nkolongwa kwa lujiniku pachilanda jitu.
9.47: Yesu akaghamanyi maholalelu gha mitima jabhu, bhela akuntoliki mwana na kunjemeka pambipi jaki.
9.48: Na kubhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Mundu jokapi joanjopale mwana jonjoni kwa lihina langu, anyopale nepani. Na mundu jokapi joanyopale nepani, anjopale jola joandumike. Ndandi joabhi nchoku pachilanda jinu, jonihoju nde nkolongwa kwa lujiniku kupeta bhokapi.” Mundu jokapi jwangakupengana na mwenga abhi chipambala chimu Mako 9:38-40
9.49: Yohana akumpwaghi Yesu, “Bambo, tumbweni mundu akabhoha majobhi kwa lihina laku, na tepani tukalengiki kundakalila, maghambu jombi ngachealongana na tepani.”
9.50: Yesu akumpwaghi Yohana papamu na bhabhulwa bhajaki, “Ngamwandakalila, ndandi mundu jokapi jwangakupengana na mwenga abhi upambala chinu.” Bhandu bhakumu bha ku Samalia bhakana kunjopale Yesu
9.51: Chikahi pachaheghali chaka Yesu kutolakeka kujenda kunani kumahunde, Yesu akaamwili kujenda ku Yelusalemu.
9.52: Akabhatumiki bhabholu bhundongulyaje, na bhombi bhakapiti ku chijiji cha ku Samalia nahuli bhundenganakya kila chindu.
9.53: Nambu bhandu bha chijiji cha ku Samalia ngachebhunjopalile, ndandi ikamanyakini apita ku Yelusalemu.
9.54: Bhabhulwa bhaka Yesu, bhabhakabhi Yakobo na Yohana pabhaghhaweni ghanighala, bhakundaluki Yesu, “Bambo, bho, upala le tulaghalakya moto kuhuma kunani ubhajochaje ngati Eliya moakahengile?”
9.55: Yesu akang'anambwiki na kubhakenjukila, akapwagha, “Ngachemmanyi nde roho ja ntundu bhole jembi naju.”
9.56: Kwa ndandi Mwana waka Mundu ngacheahikiki kuiyonanga roho ya bhandu, nambu kuikengalela. Panihapa Yesu na bhabhulwa bhaki bhakapiti ku chijiji nachengi. Ghaghapalika kwa kubha mbulwa waka Yesu Matayo 8:19-22
9.57: Pabhakabhi mwindela bhakajendaje, mundu jumu akumpwaghi Yesu, “Ananukujengalya kwokapi kowijendaje.”
9.58: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Mabweha ghabhi na makolu, na ijuni ibhi na mihuwi, nambu Mwana waka Mundu ngacheabhi na pandu pa kulighoneka na kupomulela.”
9.59: Yesu akumpwaghi mundu jongi, “Unyengalyaje.” Nambu mundu jola akayangaki, “Bambo, uneka hoti nyenda nakuntagha atati wangu.”
9.60: Yesu akampwaghile, “Waleka bhakuwa bhabhataghaje bhakuwa bhabhu. Nambu wehapa ujenda ukatangaza Ukolongwa waka Chapanga.”
9.61: Mundu jongi akumpwaghile, “Bambo, ananukujengalyaje, nambu uneka hoti nyendaje nakabhalaghila bhalongu bhangu.”
9.62: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Mundu jokapi joatumbu kulema na papa kutumbu kabheti kulingali kunyuma ngacheapalika mu Ukolongwa waka Chapanga.”

10.1: Paghapetiki ghanighala Yesu akahawi bhandu bhangi sabini na bhabheli, akabhatumiki bhabheli bhabheli, bhundongulya mu kila muchi na pandu papalika jombi kujenda.
10.2: Akabhapwaghile, “Mahunu nde ghamaheli, nambu bhahuna nde bhachoko. Mundobha Bambo wa mahuno abhatuma bhatumika mu ngonda waki.
10.3: Henu njendanyaje! Nuntuma ngati mambeleli pachilanda ja mabweha gha muchitengu.
10.4: Ngamwitogho mbija, nkoba, na magubasi, na ngamwijema mwindela kundamuki mundu jokapi jola.
10.5: Ananjingi munyumba jokapi, kutumbula mpwagha, ‘Lukwale lubya munyumba jenu.’
10.6: Ngati monimola anakubhi na mundu joapala kutama kwa lukwali abhi panihapa, lukwali lwinu lwa kulamukila analuhighalya kwaki. Ngati njeta, lukwali lola analunkelebhukyaje.
10.7: Ntama munyumba jeniheji, koni mkakula na kunywa chokapi chebhampekyaje, maghambu mtumika apalika kujopalela malepu ghaki. Ngamwibhoka kujenda kutama nyumba najengi.
10.8: Anampiti ku muchi na bhandu bhaki anabhunjopalili, nkula chela chebhampekyaje.
10.9: Mwalamiha bhatamwa bhabhabhi monihomu, na mwapwaghila, ‘Ukolongwa waka Chapanga uheghali kwinu.’
10.10: Nambu ananjingi mu muchi wokapi, na bhandu anabhakaniki kunjopalela, mboka, njenda mu indela yabhu na kupwagha,
10.11: ‘Hata luhombi lwa muchi winu lolukamulini mu magholu ghitu, tukung'unda palongi jinu, ngati ulakalilu kwinu, nambu nkombuka kubha Ukolongwa waka Chapanga unheghalile!’
10.12: Numpwaghi chakaka, mu Lichobha la Utemulu Chapanga analangiha chiha kwa muchi wa Sodoma kuliku muchi ghonihoghu! Bhandu bha michi jangakung'anambuka na kughaleka mahoku Matayo 11:20-24
10.13: “Anamuchibhonaje bhandu bha muchi wa Kolazini! Anauchibhonaje bhandu bha muchi wa Betisaida! Ndandi ngangachu yeitendakiki kwaku ikatendiki ku Tilo na ku Sidoni, bhandu bha konihoku bhakabya bhajomwi kutama pahi, na kuwata ingobhu ya magunila, na kulipaka ilihu, na kulangi kubha bhang'anambwiki na kughaleka mahoku ghabhu!
10.14: Nambu Chapanga analangiha chiha nakanopi mu Lichobha la Utemulu kwa bhandu bha muchi wa Tilo na Sidoni kupeta kwinu mwenga.
10.15: Nanau muchi wa Kapelenaumu! Bho, upala le kulikweha mbaka kunani kumahunde? Anauhelalika mpaka kuwawa!”
10.16: Yesu akabhapwaghi bhhabulwa bhaki, “Mundu jola joanjowane mwehapa, anyowane nepani, na mundu joankana mwehapa, angana nepani, na mundu joangana nepani ankana jola joandumike.” Bhandu sabini na bhabheli bhakelabhuka
10.17: Bhandu sabini na bhabheli bhala bhakakelawiki kwa chiheku na kupwagha, “Bambo, kwa lihina laku hata majobhi ghatutii!”
10.18: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Nakumbweni Shetani akahabhuka kuhuma kunani kumahunde ngati chitobhi.
10.19: Njowanya! Numpeki uwezu wa kukanyata majoka na hipeleli, na uwezu panani ja makili ghokapi ghaka Adui, na nga chindu chechampotikaje.
10.20: Nambu ngamwikubha na chiheku ndandi majobhi ghuntii mwehapa, nambu muhekalya maghambu mahina ghinu ghalembakiki kunani kumahunde.” Yesu ahekalela Matayo 11:25-27; 13:16-17
10.21: Chikahi chelachela, Yesu akatwelakiki na chiheku kwa uwezu waka Roho Mhuhu, na kupwagha, “Atati, Bambo wa kunani kumahunde na pundema! Nukuchengu maghambu wahiiki mambu ghani bhabhabhi na mbulau na malango, na ughahyekwi kwa bhana. Ena, Atati, ndandi ghanihagha nde moghabheli mapalu ghaku.”
10.22: Akajendali kubhapwaghi bhandu, “Atati wangu ambeki hindu yokapi. Nga jumu joammanyi Mwana nambu Atati, kabheti nga joammanyi Atati nambu Mwana, na jokapi Mwana joapala kumuhyekulila.”
10.23: Bhela Yesu akabhang'anambuki bhabhulwa bhaki, na kulonge nabhu bhombi kanjika jabhu, na kubhapwaghila, “Mbanga bhandu bhabhaghabhona mambu ghamughabhona mwenga!
10.24: Numpwaghi chakaka, bhalota bhamaheli bhaka Chapanga na bhakolongwa bha pundema bhakatokuli kughabhona ghamughabhona, nambu ngachebhaghawene, na kujowana malobhi ghamughajowana, nambu ngachebhajowine.” Ulenganesu waka Msamalia wamboni
10.25: Mundu jumu joaimanyi Shelia akajemiki, na kundaluki Yesu kwa kundenga, “Mbola, bho, ndenda bhole nahuli mbata kupwelela womi wa mileli?”
10.26: Yesu akundalukile, “Bho, Shelia jipwagha bhole? Bho, ujimanya bhole paujiasoma?”
10.27: Mundu jola akamyangiki, “ ‘Umpala Bambo Chapanga waku kwa mtima waku wokapi, kwa roho jaku jokapi, kwa makili ghaku ghokapi, na kwa malangu ghaku ghokapi, na umpala njaku ngati moulipali wamweti.’ ”
10.28: Yesu akampwaghile, “Uyangiki wichu! Utenda bhenibhela, nanaghu anautamaje.”
10.29: Nambu jombi kwa kupala kulilinga ngati jombi wamboni akundaluki Yesu, “Bho, njangu nde nane?”
10.30: Yesu akamyangiki, “Kukabhi na mundu jumu joahelala kuhuma ku Yelusalemu na kujenda ku Yeliko. Paakabhi mwindela, akalapuliki na bhihe, na bhakunyawili hindu yaki, na bhakundekiki aghoni panipala akabya pambipi kupotela.
10.31: Panihapa akapitali mpenganyambiku jumu akahelala indela jelajela, paakambweni mundu joakalapuliki jola, akapetiki kunkeghi.
10.32: Bhelabhela Mlawi jumu akahikiki pandu pala, najombi paakambweni mundu joalapuliki jola, najombi akapetiki kunkeghi.
10.33: Nambu Msamalia jumu joakabhi apeta indela jelajela, akunketani mundu joalapuliki jola. Na jombi paakambweni mundu jola, mtima waki ukamboni chiha.
10.34: Akanjendili, akangolwi ilonda yaki kwa mahuta na divai na kuikonga kwa itambala. Bhela akamkwehiki paliponda laki, akampeliki munyumba ja kuhiki bhagheni na kundwaa.
10.35: Chilabhu jaki Msamalia jola akabhohiki ipandi ibhele ya madini gha feza na kumpeke mweni nyumba, na kumpwaghila, ‘Undwaa mundu ajoju. Na mbija yengi yeipetalya yenjenu kwa kunjangatila, ananepa nepani panikelabhukaje.’ ”
10.36: Yesu akalalukile, “Ubhona bhole, bho, jwaku pachilanda ja bhatatu habha, nde njake mundu joalapuliki na bhihi jola?”
10.37: Mbola wa Shelia jola akamyangiki, “Nde jola joakamboni chiha.” Yesu akampwaghile, “Jendaje na ukatenda bhelabhela.” Yesu kunyumba jaka Masa na Malia
10.38: Yesu na bhabhulwa bhaki pabhakabhi mu mwanja, bhakajingi mu chijiji chimu. Na mbomba jumu joalowakika Masa, akanjopali kunyumba jaki.
10.39: Masa akabhi na ndombu waki joalowakika Malia, joakatemi pambipi na Yesu akajowanya mabholu ghaki.
10.40: Masa akabhi ahangajika na mahengu ghingi gha munyumba, bhela akanjendi Yesu na kumpwaghila, “Bambo, bho, ngacheubhona le kubha ndombu wangu anekiki nhenga mahengu kanjika jango? Umpwaghila ahika anyangatyaje!”
10.41: Bambo akamyangiki, “Masa, Masa! Ung'ahika na kulyungalyunga kwa mambu ghamaheli,
10.42: nambu chipalika pe chindu chimu. Malia ahawili chindu chamboni nakanopi chechu nga mundu joanyaghulaje.”

11.1: Lichobha limu Yesu akabhi pandu pamu akundobha Chapanga. Paakajomwi kulobha, mbulwa waki jumu akumpwaghile, “Bambo, utubhola kulobha, ngati Yohana moakabhabholi bhabhulwa bhaki.”
11.2: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Pamundobha Chapanga, mpwagha ana, ‘Atati witu weubhi kunani kumahunde, Lihina laku lilumbalikaje, Ukolongwa waku uhikaje, mapalu ghaku ghapitalyaje, pani pundema, ngati kunani kumahunde.
11.3: Utupekya chilebhi chitu cha kila lichobha.
11.4: Utulekakya mahoku ghitu, Ngati tepani motubhalekalela bhokapi bhabhatuhokiye. Na ngawatuleka kujingila mu malengakeku, nambu utukengalya na Muhakau jola.’ ”
11.5: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Tupwagha jumu winu ajenda pamahiku kunyumba jaka nkochi waki na kupwagha, ‘Nkochi wangu, unyahika mabumunda ghatatu.
11.6: Ndandi nkochi wangu ahikiki kwangu kuhuma mu mwanja, nanatu ngachemi na chilebhi cha kumpekeha!’
11.7: Na tupwagha nkochi joabhi munyumba akayanga, ‘Ngawing'aha! Ndyangu ujighalike, nepani na bhana bhangu tughonile. Ngachenhweza kujumuka na kukupeke chokapi.’
11.8: Chakaka numpwaghila, hata ngati ngaayijumuki na kukupeke chilebhi hata koni wehapa unkochi waki, nambu kwa ndandi ja kujendale kunjopa, ayijumukaji na kumpeke kila chindu cheapala maghambu ngacheakabhi na iyoni kujendale kunjopa.”
11.9: Bhela numpwaghila, “Ndobhaje nanamu anampataje, mlondaye nanamu mwipataje, muhodimaje nanamu mwihoghuliwa ndyangu.
11.10: Ndandi mundu jokapi joalobha ayijopalyaje, na mundu jokapi joalonda ayipataje, na mundu jokapi joahodima anahoghuliwa ndyangu.
11.11: Bho, Atati bholi pachilanda jinu joaweza kumpeke mwana waki liganga ngati anajopiki libumunda au anaanjopiki homba, na badala ja homba anaampekya lijoka?
11.12: Au mwana anajopiki lihombi, anampekya chipelele?
11.13: Ngati mwehapa mwembi mwahakau, mmanyi kubhapekeha hindu inayahi bhana bhinu, bho, Atati winu wa kunani kumahunde ngaapeke Roho Mhuhu bhokapi bhabhunjopa?” Yesu na Beelizebuli Matayo 12:22-30; Mako 3:20-27
11.14: Lichobha limu Yesu akabhi amboha lijobhi lelakuntendiki mundu jumu abya mpuli. Lijobhi lela palumbokiki mundu jola, akatumbwi kulongela, na lipogha la bhandu lakakangichi namaa.
11.15: Nambu bhandu bhangi bhakapwaghike, “Aghabhoha majobhi kwa makili ghaka Beelizebuli, nkolongwa wa majobhi.”
11.16: Bhandu bhangi kwa kundenga Yesu, bhakapaliki atenda nginyulila kuhuma kunani kumahunde.
11.17: Nambu Yesu akaghamanyi maholalelu ghabhu, akabhapwaghile, “Ukolongwa wokapi woulekangini mapogha ghaghapengana ngauwezi kutamakila, bhelabhela bhandu bha nyumba jimu anabhapengana bheni kwa bheni, bhandu bha nyumba heji anabhalekanaje.
11.18: Ngati ukolongwa waka Shetani ulekangini mapogha ghaghapengana, bho, ukolongwa waki wijema bhole? Numpwaghi aghagha ndandi mwanganya mpwagha nepani moha majobhi kwa makili ghaka Beelizebuli.
11.19: Ngati nepani moha majobhi kwa makili ghaka Beelizebuli, bho, bhahemba bhinu bhaghatopola kwa uwezu waka nane? Bhahemba bhinu anabhuntemula kubha mwanganya muhokihe!
11.20: Nambu ngati anamoha majobhi kwa uwezu waka Chapanga, bhela Ukolongwa waka Chapanga unhikile.
11.21: “Mundu joabhi na makili, paalenda nyumba jaki kwa silaha, hindu yaki yokapi ikubha lukwale.
11.22: Nambu anahiki mundu joabhi na makili kumpeta jombhi anakomini naku na kundapula, jonihoju anaanyaghula silaha jeahobhalyaje na kuighabha hindu yeanyawile.
11.23: “Mundu jokapi jwangakulilomba na nepani, atenda kumbenga, na mundu jokapi jwangakubhongana papamu na nepani, atenda kupechangana. Kukelebhuka kwa lijobhi kwa mundu Matayo 12:43-45
11.24: “Lijobhi palumpita mundu, liyongolota yongolota pandu pajomu likalola pandu pa kupomulela. Nambu nangakupabhona pandu pa kupomulela, ajipwaghi, ‘Anangelebhuka kabhete kunyumba jangu konhumiki.’
11.25: Paakelabhuka na kujiketane nyumba jipyaghaliki na kupambakika wichu,
11.26: bhela ajenda na kughaloha majobhi ghangi saba mahakau kupeta jombi, na ghombi ghajingila na kutama mkati jaka mundu hoju. Henu hali jaka mundu jola anajikubha jihakau nakanopi kupeta pakutumbula.” Chiheku cha chakaka
11.27: Yesu palongila ghanihagha, mbomba jumu joakabhi pa lipogha la bhandu pala akajamali na kupwagha, “Mbanga mbomba joakubheliki, na kukujongea!”
11.28: Nambu Yesu akamuyangiki, “Mbanga nakanopi bhabhalijowana Lilobhi laka Chapanga na kulitii.” Nginyulila jaka Yona Matayo 12:38-42
11.29: Lipogha la bhandu palajonjukiki, Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Chibheleku chenjenu nde chibheleku cha bhandu bhahakau. Chipala nginyulila, nambu ngachipati nginyuli jokapi jela, nambu nginyuli jaka Yona.
11.30: Ndandi ngati mlota Yona moakabheli nginyulila kwa bhandu bha Ninawi, bhelabhela Mwana waka Mundu nde moayibhelila nginyulila kwa chibheleku chenjenu.
11.31: Lichobha la Utemulu, malikia wa ku Sheba anaajemaje na kubhatakila bhandu bha chibheleku chenjenu, maghambu jombi akahikiki kuhuma kutali nakanopi kuhika kujowane malobhi gha mbulau ghaka Nkolongwa Solomoni, henu numpwaghila, pambani abhi nkolongwa kupeta Solomoni.
11.32: Mu Lichobha la Utemulu, bhandu bha ku Ninawi bhijema papamu na kubhatakila bhandu bha kibheleku chenjenu, maghambu bhombi bhakang'anambwiki na kughaleka mahoku ghabhu pabhajowini kutangaza kwaka Yona. Chakaka numpwaghila pambani abhi nkolongwa kupeta Yona! Unang'anu wa hyegha Matayo 5:15; 6:22-23
11.33: “Nga mundu joapambaki taa na kujihiya au kujiyekale na chihulu. Nambu bhajibheka panani ja kinala, nahuli bhandu bhokapi bhabhajingila bhabhona unang'anu waki.
11.34: Lihu laku nde taa ja hyegha jaku. Ngati lihu laku analibhi linyahi, hyegha jaku jokapi jitweli unang'anu. Nambu ngati lihu laku ngalinyahi, hyegha jaku jitweli lwihe.
11.35: Bhela ulilingalya wichu unang'anu waku ghoubhi naku mkati ja hyegha jaku ngawikubha lwihe.
11.36: Bhela anakubhi hyegha jaku jokapi jibhi na unang'anu, panga kubha na pandu papabhi na lwihi, hyegha jaku jokapi anajibya na unang'anu, ngati taa mojikumulakila kwa unang'anu waki.” Yesu abhalaumu Mafalisayo na bhabhola bha Shelia Matayo 23:1-36; Mako 12:38-40
11.37: Yesu paajomula kupwagha, Mfalisayo jumu akundohiki ajenda kunyumba jaki akakula chilebhe. Bhela Yesu akajingili na kutama kula chilebhe.
11.38: Mfalisayo jola akakangichi kumbona Yesu akula chilebhe mangane ja kuchamba machi mabhoku ghaki.
11.39: Bhela Bambo akampwaghile, “Mwanganya Mwafalisayo, mwengolola chikombi na mbali kwa kunja, nambu mkati ntweli unyaghula na uhakau.
11.40: Mwanganya mwang'ang'a! Bho, nga Chapanga le joalenganaki kunja, na nde joalenganaki mkati?
11.41: Nambu mwajangatya bhahochu kwa hindu hinu, na yengi yokapi anaibya wichu kwinu.
11.42: “Nambu anamuchibhonaje Mafalisayo! Maghambu mumboke Chapanga zaka ya nchicha na imbogha yokapi ya mahamba, ngati nabwaka na makolu ghangi ghokapi, nambu nkotoka kubhahenge bhandu mambu ghaaghapala Chapanga, na nkotoka kumpala Chapanga. Ikampaliki kuhenga mambu ghamboni palongi jaka Chapanga na kumpala Chapanga, panga kughaleka ghangi hagha.
11.43: “Anamuchibhonaje Mwafalisayo! Ndandi mpala kutama itehu ya kutopela mu nyumba ja kuhimangani Bhayahude, na kulamukiwa kwa utopelu palighulio.
11.44: Anamuchibhonaje! Maghambu mbi ngati matengeli ghangakubhonikana, ghaghu bhandu bhajenda panani jaki panga kumanya.”
11.45: Mbola jumu wa Shelia akupwaghile, “Mbola, paupwagha malobhi ghanihagha, bhelabhela ututondola na tepani.”
11.46: Yesu akamuyangiki, “Na mwanganya bhabhola bha Shelia, anamuchibhonaje, maghambu mwatweka bhandu ibwahila yeitopike yanga kunyamulika, koni mwabheti ngachenhwatambu hata lukonji kubhajangati kunyamula.
11.47: Anamuchibhonaje! Maghambu nchengalela matengeli gha bhalota bhaka Chapanga bhala bhabhakomakiki na akahoko bhinu.
11.48: Bhela mwanganya mabheti njetakela ghala ghabhakahengiki akahoko bhinu, bhombi bhakabhakomiki bhalota bhaka Chapanga, na mwanganya nchengale matengeli ghabhu.
11.49: Bhela Chapanga kwa malangu ghaki akapwaghiki, ‘Ananatuma kwabhu bhalota na bhatenga bhangu, nambu bhombi anabhakoma bhakumu bhabhu na bhangi kubhang'aha.’
11.50: Bhela bhandu bha kibheleku chenjenu bhitemulikaje kwa kupotela kwa bhalota bhokapi bhaka Chapanga bhabhakakomakiki kutumbu kubhombakeka kwa ndema,
11.51: kutumbu kukomakeka kwaka Abeli mbaka kukomakeka kwaka Zakalia, joakomakiki pa chilanda ja chihanja cha nyambiku na Pandu Pahuhu. Ena, chakaka numpwaghila, bhandu bha kibheleku chenjenu bhitemulika kwa kubhakoma bhokapi habha.”
11.52: “Anamuchibhonaje mwanganya bhabhola bha Shelia! Maghambu muhiiki ufunguu wa kuhoghule ndyangu wa umanyi, mabhanganya mabheti ngachenjingi na mwahibhali bhandu bhabhajingi ngabhijingila!”
11.53: Yesu paakabhi abhoka munyumba jaka Mfalifayu jola, bhabhola bha Shelia na Mafalisayo bhakatumbwi kuntumbula kwa kundalukila malobhi ghamahele,
11.54: nahuli bhapata kunkamula kwa chindu chokapi cheayilongilaje.

12.1: Chikahi bhandu bhamaheli pabhakabhi bhalibhongini mbaka kukanyatana, Yesu akatumbwi hoti kupwagha na bhabhulwa bhaki, “Mlilingalya na amila ja undumila kubheli ja Mafalisayo.
12.2: Njeta lilobhi lelihiyakiki ambalu ngaliyekuliwi, wala lelihiyakiki ambalu ngalimanyikane.
12.3: Henu, kila chendongila kulubhendu bhandu anabhaghajowana paunang'anu, na kila chenjojalanya koni njighi milyangu kuchumba, ghitangazwa panani ja unhaghala wa nyumba.” Joapalika kujoghupeka Matayo 10:28-31
12.4: “Numpwaghi, mwanganya mwabhakochi bhangu, ngamwajoghopa bhala bhabhakoma hyegha nambu anabhajomwile ngachebhaweza kuhenga kabheti chindu chokapi kupetalela.
12.5: Ananundangia jola joapalika kujoghupeka. Munjoghupa jola, ambaju anaakomiki, abhi na uwezu wa kundekela ku motu wa jehanamu. Chakaka numpwaghila, jonihoju nde jumu joapalika kujoghupeka!”
12.6: “Bho, iwebha nhwanu ngacheilombaseka kwa sendi ibhele? Nambu njeta chiwebha hata chimu chechijewakeka palongi jaka Chapanga.
12.7: Kabheti hata majunju gha mimutu jinu ghabhalangiki ghokapi. Ngamwijoghopa, maghambu mabhanganya mpalika nakanopi kupeta iwebha yamahele! Kunjetakela na kunkana Kristo Matayo 10:32-33; 12:32; 10:19-20
12.8: “Chakaka numpwaghila, mundu jokapi joanyetakela nepani palongi ja bhandu, Mwana waka Mundu najombi anaanjetakalya palongi ja bhatumika bha kunani bhaka Chapanga.
12.9: Nambu mundu jokapi joangana palongi ja bhandu, Mwana waka Mundu najombi anaankana palongi ja bhatumika bha kunani bhaka Chapanga.
12.10: “Mundu jokapi joandongale lilobhi lihakau Mwana waka Mundu analekakiwaje, nambu mundu jokapi joantondo Roho Mhuhu ngailekakewi ng'o.
12.11: “Pabhampelaka mwanganya palongi ja nyumba ya kuhimangani Bhayahude, na palongi ja ihongozi, na bhatawala, ngamwijoghopa ntundu momwalikengalyaje panani ja malobhi ghamwilongilaje.
12.12: Ndandi chikahi chenihechi Roho Mhuhu anaambola chela chempalika kulongela.” Ulenganesu waka mwanahindu yamaheli ng'ang'a
12.13: Mundu jumu pa lipogha la bhandu lela akumpwaghi Yesu, “Mbola, umpwaghila ndongu wangu tughabhana upwelelu ghoatuleki atati witu.”
12.14: Yesu akamuyangiki, “Nkoche, bho, nde nane joamekiki nepani kubha mtemula au kubha mundu wa kubhaghabhanaki bhandu hindu yabho?”
12.15: Yesu akajendali kubhapwaghi bhokapi, “Mulijepa na ntundu wokapi wa kubha na wime! Ndandi hindu ngacheiweza kukengalela womi waka mundu, hata ngati anabhi na hindu yamahele.”
12.16: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghi ulenganesu ghongo, “Kukabhi na mundu jumu mwanahindu yamaheli joakabhi na ngonda ghoubholalanile ghoupiika mahunu ghamaheli.
12.17: Jombi akatumbwi kuholalela mumtima waki, ‘Ngachemi na pandu pa kubheka mahunu ghangu ghokapi. Bho, ndenda bhole?’
12.18: Akalipwaghi, ‘Anandenda ana, anamombula ugholu wangu na kuchenga ugholu ukolongwa nakanopi. Nanatu anameka monihomu mahunu ghangu ghokapi na hindu yangu yengi.’
12.19: Bhela ananilipwaghila namwete, ‘Wenga mtima wangu! Sajenu ubhi na hindu yamaheli yambone ya kujaghanila kwa hyaka yamaheli. Upomulyaje, ukulaji, ukunywaji na kuhekalela!’
12.20: Nambu Chapanga akampwaghile, ‘Ung'ang'a wenga! Lalenu ikilu roho jaku anajitolakikaje, henu bho, hindu yokapi yeulilundakile anaikubha yaka nane?’ ”
12.21: Yesu akajomuli kwa kupwagha, “Ana nde mokubhelile kwaka mundu joalilundaki hindu kwa ndandi jaka mwene, nambu palongi jaka Chapanga ngacheabhalangika kubha na chindu.” Munhobhalya Chapanga Matayo 6:25-34
12.22: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Kwa ndandi jeniheji numpwaghila, ngamwikubha na choghohi kubhokana na chilebhi chemchipala nahuli mpata kubha bhomi, wala ingobhu yemuipala kwa ndandi ja hyegha yinu.
12.23: Ndandi womi nde wambone nakanopi kupeta chilebhi, na hyegha nde jambone nakanopi kupeta ingobhu.
12.24: Mughalingalya makongolu, ngacheghapanda, wala ngacheghahuna, wala ngacheghabhi na ugholu, nambu Chapanga aghaleha! Mwabhanganya mpalika nakanopi kupeta ijuni!
12.25: Bho, nde nane pachilanda jinu, kwa kuhangajika kwaki, aweza kulijonjuke hata lisaa limu nakanopi ja chikahi cha womi wake?
12.26: Ngati ngachemuweza kutenda lijambu lichokopi ngati leniheli, bho, maghambu kiki mng'ahikila mambu ghange?
12.27: Ndingalya malobha moghakolela, ngacheghahenga lihengu wala ngacheghaloka. Nambu numpwaghila, hata Nkolongwa Solomoni na hindu yaki yokapi ngacheakawatikwi ingobhu jejiweza kulengana na unyahi wa lilobha limu.
12.28: Bhela ngati Chapanga aghawatika mahamba gha mungonda ngati bhenibhela ghaghabhonikana pambani lalenu na chilabhu kutaghakika pamotu. Bho, ngaiwezi kunhwatika mwanganya nakanope? Mwenga mabhandu mwembi na uhobhalelu uchoko!
12.29: “Bhela ngamwing'ahika mumitima jinu kubha anankula kiki au anankunywa kiki.
12.30: Ndandi ghanihagha ghokapi bhaghahangajaki bhandu bhokapi bhangakummanya Chapanga. Nambu Atati winu wa kunani kumahunde amanya kubha muipala hindu yeniheyi.
12.31: Nambu mwanganya ndonda hoti Ukolongwa waka Chapanga, najombi anaampekya hindu yeniheyi yokapi. Kulibheke hindu yamaheli kunani kumahunde Matayo 6:19-21
12.32: “Ngamwijoghopa, mwenga lipogha lichoku, maghambu Atati winu apaliki kumpeke mwehapa Ukolongwa waki.
12.33: Ndombisa hindu yinu na mukabhaghabhila bhahochu mbija yene. Mulibhekila nkoba wanga kulala na mulibhekila chikoku kunani kumahunde, changakuweza kujomoka. Maghambu konihoku bhihi ngachebhaweza kujibha, wala mangeki ngacheghayonanga.
12.34: Maghambu pandu pachibhi chikoku chaku, nde pala pawibya mtima waku.” Bhatumika bhamboni
12.35: “Mulikonga ulamba mwibhunu hinu, na taa yinu ikayakaje.
12.36: Mbya ngati bhatumika bhabhundendalela bambo wabhu ahika kuhuma ku ndowa. Nahuli anahikiki na kuhodima bhunhoghulya ndyango.
12.37: Mbanga bhatumika bhala, ambabhu bambo wabhu paikelabhukaje anaabhaketanyaje bhabhi mihu! Numpwaghi chakaka, bambo hoju anaalikongaje ulamba muchibhuno, na kubhapwaghila bhatama pahi pachilebhi, na kubhatumakila.
12.38: Mbanga bhatumika bhala, ambabhu bombo wabhu anaabhahimanyaje bhabhi mihu hata ngati anahiki ikilu pa mahiku au pachibhombu!
12.39: Nambu mmanya kubha, ngati mweni nyumba akamanyiki lisaa la kuhika mwihi, akabya atemi mihu, ngaakajilekiki nyumba jaki jibhombuliwaje na mwihi.
12.40: Nanamu mkubhaje tayali, maghambu Mwana waka Mundu anahika lisaa langakumanyikana.” Mtumika ndongwana na jwangakubha ndongwana Matayo 24:45-51
12.41: Petulu akundaluki Yesu, “Bambo, bho, ulenganesu aghoghu utulongale tepani au bhandu bhokape?”
12.42: Bambo akamuyangiki, “Bho, henu nde nane joabhi mtumika ndongwana na joabhi na malango? Nde jola ambaju bambo waki ambei kubhajemalela bhatumika bhaki bhangi na kubhapeke chilebhi chabhu kwa chikahi chechipalika.
12.43: Apengaliki mtumika jola, ambaju anangati bambo waki akelabhuka anhimani akahenga bhenibhela.
12.44: Chakaka numpwaghila, bambo waki anaambeka mtumika jola kubha njemalela wa hindu yaki yokapi.
12.45: Nambu anangati mtumika jola alipwaghi mweni muntima waki, ‘Bambo wangu anaakabhakya kukelabhuka,’ na bhela kutumbu kubhalapu bhatumika bhajaki, akambomba na akanalomi, najombi akula na kunywa na kulobhela.
12.46: Bhela bambo waka mtumika jola anahika lichobha langa kumanyikana na lisaa langa kumanyikana. Na bambo hoju anaanhekata ipandi ibheli na kumbeka papamu na bhandu bhangakuhobhalela.
12.47: “Mtumika joamanya mambu ghaapala bambo waki ahengaji, nambu alepale kulibheka wichu na kukotoka kuhenga mambu ghaapala bambo jola, mtumika hoju ayilapulika nakanopi.
12.48: Nambu mtumika jola jwangakumanya mambu ghaapala bambo waki ahengaje, najombi ahenga mambu ghaghapalika kutemulika, mtumika hoju ayipulika pachokopi. Kwa ndandi mundu jokapi joajopali yamaheli ayijopakika yamahele. Na mundu jokapi joajopali yamahele nakanopi, ayijopakika yamahele nakanopi kuhuma kwaki. Yesu nde ndandi ja kulekangana kwa bhandu Matayo 10:34-36
12.49: “Nhikiki kupambaki motu pani pundema, nenga mbala nakanopi kubhona ukabya ujomwi kubhelela!
12.50: Nambu mi na ubatizu ghombalika kubatizwa, nanatu anang'ahakika namaa mbaka ubatizu hoghu ujomukaje.
12.51: Bho, muhambuki nhikiki kuleta lukwale kwa bhandu pani pundema? Ngabhela! Ngachenhikiki kubhatenda bhandu bhatama kwa lukwale, nambu nhikiki kubhalekanisha bhandu.
12.52: Maghambu kutumbu sajenu bhandu nhwanu bha nyumba jimu anabhakomanaje, bhatatu kwa bhabheli na bhabheli kwa bhatatu.
12.53: Atati anakomana na mwana waki, na mwana anakomana na atati waki. Amabhu anakomana na mwali waki, na mwali anakomana na mabhu waki. Nkowanu anakomana na nhwanu waka mwana waki, na jonihoju anakomana na akowanu waki.” Kumanya chikahi Matayo 16:2-3
12.54: Yesu akabhapwaghi kabheti bhandu, “Pamughabhona mahundi ghapitalila kuhuma kolijibhi lyobha, panihapa mpwagha, iyula anajitonyaje, na chakaka iyula jitonya.
12.55: Chikahi pambona mpongu upogha kuhuma upambala wa kunkachi, panihapa mpwagha kubha anakupyopaje, na kukubha bhenibhela.
12.56: Mwanganya mwaka ndumi kubhele! Muweza kulingalila kunani kumahunde na pundema na kupwagha kubha iyula anajitonyaje na lyobha analibhalaje. Bho, ndepale bhole kumanya chikahi chenjenu cha sajenu? Kujongana na adui waku Matayo 5:25-26
12.57: “Bho, maghambu kiki mwanganya ngachemuweza kumanya lijambu lambone la kutenda?
12.58: Ndandi paulongana na mtakila waku kukupeleka pachengu, ukangamala ujongana naku ukabya wakona mwindela. Nanga bhela mtemula anaakupelaka kwa manjolinjoli, na manjolinjoli anabhukubheka muchifungo.
12.59: Nukupwaghila, ngawipiti monihomu mbaka pawijomulya kulepa sendi ja mwisho.”

13.1: Chikahi hechi bhandu bhakumu bhakahikite, bhakundandi Yesu panani ja bhandu bha ku Galilaya ambabhu Pilato akabhi abhakomiti chikahi pabhakabhi bhachinja hinyama yabhu kwa ndandi ja nyambiku kwaka Chapanga.
13.2: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Bho muhambuki kubha Bhagalilaya habha bhakakomakiki bhenibhela, maghambu bhombi bhakabhi na mahakau kupeta Bhagalilaya bhangi bhokape?
13.3: Chakaka ngabhela! Nambu nanamu nangakung'anambuka na kughaleka mahoku ghinu, bhelabhela nanamu mwiyonangikaje ngati mobhayonangakaki bhombe.
13.4: Au bhandu komi na nane bhala bhabhapotili pawahabhukili mnala wa ku Siloamu, bho, muhambuki bhandu bhala bhakabhi bhahakau kupeta bhandu bhokapi bhabhatamika ku Yelusalemu?
13.5: Chakaka ngabhela! Nupwaghila nanamu nangakung'anambuka na kughaleka mahoku ghinu, mabhokapi mwiyonangikaje ngati bhombi.” Ulenganesu wa mkoju wanga kupambika mapambiku
13.6: Yesu akabhapwaghi kabheti ulenganesu agho, “Kukabhi na mundu jumu joakabhi na nkongu wa mtini ghoakaupandiki mungonda waki wa mizabibu. Akahikiki kulonda mapambiku mu nani jaki nambu ngacheapatiki chindu.
13.7: Bhela akampwaghi mtumika wa ngonda hoghu, ‘Lingalyaje! Kwa hyaka itatu mili nakahikaje kutongo mapambiku gha nkongu wa mtini aghoghu, panga kupata chokapi chela. Uhekataje! Bho, ndandi ki ujendale kutumi luhombi waka?’
13.8: Nambu mtumika wa ngonda jola akayangiki, ‘Bambo, uleka kabheti chaka chimu chenu ananukulaghalya munkeghi jaki na kujeghale mbolea.
13.9: Ngati anaupambiki mapambiku chaka chechihika, chamboni, nambu nangakupambika, wauhekataje.’ ” Yesu andamiha mbomba jumu Lichobha Ia Sabato
13.10: Mu Lichobha limu la Sabato Yesu akabhi abhola mu nyumba ja kuhimangani Bhayahude.
13.11: Mkati mola kukabhi na mbomba joakakamuliki na lijobhi kwa chikahi cha hyaka komi na nane. Akabhi na chipendi na ngacheawezika kuhatambuka.
13.12: Yesu paakambweni mbomba jola, akandohiki, na kumpwaghila, “We mabhu, chitamu chaku ulamike.”
13.13: Akabhei mabhoku panani jaki na kundamiha, na palapala akahatambwiki na kundumbali Chapanga.
13.14: Nambu nkolongwa wa nyumba ja kuhimangani Bhayahude, akahakali ndandi Yesu akandamihi mbomba hoju mu Lichobha la Sabato. Bhela akabhapwaghi bhandu bhabhabhi panipala, “Mbi na machobha sita gha kuhenga lihengu, muhika kulamishwa kwa machobha ghanihagha, nambu ngamwihika kulamishwa mu Lichobha la Sabato!”
13.15: Nambu Bambo akamuyangiki, “Mwanganya mwaka ndumi kubhele! Bho, kubhi na mundu pachilanda jinu joakalepa kubhopo ng'ombi au liponda laki kuhuma mu chindamba kulipeleka kunywa machi, hata ngati lichobha heli nde Lichobha la Sabato?
13.16: Mbomba ajoju nde wa lubhelakeku lwaka Ibulahimu, joju akongakiki na Shetani kwa hyaka komi na nane. Bho, nga wichu le kumbopulela mu Lichobha la Sabato?”
13.17: Yesu paakalongi ghanihagha, maadui bhaki bhakaweni hiyoni, nambu bhandu bhangi bhokapi bhakatweli chiheku kwa ndandi ja mambu ghokapi gha kukangacha ghaakahengike. Ulenganesu wa imbeju ja haladali Matayo 13:31-32; Mako 4:30-32
13.18: Bhela Yesu akabhalalukile, “Bho, Ukolongwa waka Chapanga ulengana na kyane? Bho, tulandila kwa indela bhole?
13.19: Ulengana na imbeju njoku jejilowakeka haladali jeakatoliki mundu na kupanda mungonda waki. Imbeju jakameliki na kubha nkongu ukolongwa, na ijuni ihika kuchenga mihuwi mu mambandi ghaki.” Ulenganesu wa amila Matayo 13:31-32; Mako 4:30-32
13.20: Yesu akabhalaluki kabheti, “Bho, ananulenganisha na kyane Ukolongwa waka Chapanga?
13.21: Ulengana na amila jeatotwi mabhu jumu na kuhangangana papamu na uhembi madebi ghabheli na uwembi wokapi ukatutumwike.” Ndyangu upepandahu Matayo 7:13-14,21-23
13.22: Yesu paakabhi ajendale na mwanja waki kujenda ku Yelusalemu, akapeti mu michi na mwijiji koni akabhabhola bhandu.
13.23: Mundu jumu akundaluki Yesu, “Bambo, bho, bhandu bhachokopi le pe nde bhabhikengalikaje?” Yesu akabhayangiki,
13.24: “Mkangamala mkajingala mkati kupetela ndyangu upepandahu, ndandi chakaka bhandu bhamaheli bhilenga kujingila mkati, nambu ngabhiweze.
13.25: Mweni nyumba paijema na kujighila ndyangu, mwanganya mwitama kunja na kutumbu kukong'onda ndyangu mkapwagha, ‘Bambo, utuhogulyaje!’ Na jombi anaampwaghila, ‘Ngachenumanyi muhumiki kwako.’
13.26: Bhela mwitumbula kumpwaghila, ‘Tepani nde bhala tetukulika na kunywa papamu na wenga, na wenga utubholika mu michi jitu!’
13.27: Nambu anaampwaghila kabheti, ‘Ngachemanyi muhuma kwako. Mboka pambane, mabhanganya mwenhwenga mahakau!’
13.28: Konihoku mwilela na kuyagha mino pamwambona Ibulahimu, Isaka na Yakobo na bhalota bhokapi bhaka Chapanga mu Ukolongwa waka Chapanga, nambu mwanganya mwibya ndekaliki kunja!
13.29: Bhandu bhihika kuhuma kolipita lyobha na kolijibhi lyobha, kungondi na kunkache, na bhombi bhitama pangokelu na kula chilebhi mu Ukolongwa waka Chapanga.
13.30: Bhela bhandu bhokapi bhabhabhi sajenu bha kujomukela bhibya bha kutumbula, na bhabhabhi sajenu bha kutumbula bhibya bha kujomukela.” Yesu abhalelela bhandu bha muchi wa Yelusalemu Matayo 23:37-39
13.31: Chikahi chelachela, Mafalisayo bhakumu bhukunjendi Yesu na kumpwaghila, “Ubhoka pandu pambani ujenda pandu pangi, maghambu Helode apala kukukoma.”
13.32: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Njenda mukumpwaghila mwanabweha hoju ana, ‘Laleno na chilabhu anandopula majobhi na kalamiha bhatamwa, na pamalabhu ananyomulya lihengu langu.’
13.33: Hata bhela imbalika kujendale na mwanja wangu laleno, chilabhu na pamalabu, ndandi ngacheimpalika mlota waka Chapanga kukomakeka kunja na muchi wa Yelusalemu.
13.34: “Yelusalemu! Mwenga bhandu bha Yelusalemu! Mwenga mwemwakoma bhalota bhaka Chapanga na kubhalapu maganga bhabholu bhaka Chapanga bhabhakatumakiki kwinu! Mala palenga nakapaliki kubhabhongana bhandu bhaku, ngati ingoku mojibhongane ibhana yaki pahi ja mapapanila ghaki, nambu mwanganya ngachemwapalike!
13.35: Ndingalya, matamu ghinu anaghahighalya mahame. Numpwaghila, kutumbu sajenu ngamwimoni kabheti mbaka pamwipwagha, ‘Apengalika hoju joahika kwa lihina laka Bambo.’ ”

14.1: Mu Lichobha limu la Sabato, Yesu akapiti kula chilebhe kunyumba jaka mundu jumu nkolongwa wa Mafalisayo, na bhandu bhabhakabhi panipala bhakabhi bhundingalakila.
14.2: Mundu jumu joakabhi na chitamu cha kuhimba hyegha akabhi palongi jaka Yesu.
14.3: Yesu akabhalalukili bhabhola bha Shelia na Mafalisayo, “Bho, Shelia jitu le jilaghalaki kundamiha mundu mu Lichobha la Sabato au nga wichu?”
14.4: Nambu bhombi bhakatemi chinunu. Yesu akamkamwi mtamwa jola, akandamihi na kundeka ajendaje.
14.5: Bhela Yesu akabhalaluki bhandu bhala, “Bho, mundu bhole pachilanda jinu anangati mwana waki au ng'ombi jaki anayijibhi muchilibha mu Lichobha la Sabato joayilepa kujenda kwipiya?”
14.6: Nambu bhombi ngachebhaweziki kumuyanga lilobhi lokapi lela. Kulihelea na kubhajangati bhandu
14.7: Yesu paabhaweni bhagheni bhabhakokakiki bhala bhahaghu itehu ya kutopela, akabhapwaghi ulenganesu aghoghu,
14.8: “Chikahi mundu paakukoka pa ukwati, ngawitama pandu pa kutopela. Maghambu pangi pachilanda ja bhabhakokiki kubhi na mundu wa kutopela kukupeta wehapa,
14.9: na anahiki mwenei winu joankokiki mwanganya mabhokapi nhwikaje ayihika na kukupwaghila, ‘Undekila mundu ajoju chitehu hechi.’ Panihapa wipowakika lihamu palongi ja bhandu bhokapi na wijenda kutama kwitehu yanga kutopela.
14.10: Nambu anabhukukokiki paukwati, utama kwitehu yanga kutopela, nahuli joankokiki paahikaje akupwaghila ‘Nkochi wangu, uhika utama pani palongi, pandu panyahi nakanopi.’ Panihapa wibya utopile palongi ja bhandu bhokapi bhawitama naku kula chilebhe.
14.11: Maghambu mundu jokapi joalikweha mweni anahelakikaje, na mundu jokapi joaliheleha, anakwehakikaje.”
14.12: Bhela Yesu akampwaghi mundu joakankokiki jola, “Chikahi pauwandaa uwangalalu wa chilebhe cha muhi au cha pakamihi, ngawakoka bhakochi bhaku au bhalongu bhaku au bhandu bha pambipi au bhana hindu yamahele. Anauhengiki bhenibhela, na bhombi anabhukukoka kumanyumba ghabhu, na wehapa wibya bhakulepiki ngati chewahengile.
14.13: Nambu pauhenga uwangalalu wa kula chilebhe, wabhakoka bhahochu, ilema, bhabhatengwiki na akangalola,
14.14: nanaghu wibya upengaliki, maghambu bhandu habha ngachebhabhi na chakukulepa. Chapanga anaakulepa mu lichobha la kuyohakeka kwa bhandu bhambone.” Ulenganesu wa uwangalalu ukolongwa wa kula chilebhe Matayo 22:1-10
14.15: Jumu wa bhala bhabhakabhi bhakula chilebhe papamu na Yesu paakajowini malobhi ghanihagha, akumpwaghile, “Bhapengaliki bhandu bhokapi bhabhitama kula chilebhe cha uwangalalu mu Ukolongwa waka Chapanga!”
14.16: Yesu akamuyangiki, “Mundu jumu akatendiki uwangalalu ukolongwa wa kula chilebhe na kubhakoka bhandu bhamahele.
14.17: Chikahi cha kula chilebhe cha uwangalalu pachahikike, mundu jola akuntumiki mtumika waki akabhalohaje bhabhakokakiki, ‘Muhikaje, kila chindu chibhi wichu!’
14.18: Nambu bhokapi bhakatumbwi kubhoha ndandi ya kulepa kuhika. Mundu wa kutumbula akumpwaghi mtumika jola, ‘Nhemi ngonda na mbalika nyenda nakulingaje, chondi nganhike.’
14.19: Mundu jongi akapwaghiki, ‘Nhemi ng'ombi mapongu komi gha kulemela, henu nyenda kwilengesha, chondi nganhike.’
14.20: Bhelabhela mundu jongi akapwaghiki, ‘Ndotwi mbomba, na bhela nganhike.’
14.21: “Mtumika jola akakelawiki, na kundandi bambo waki mambu ghanihagha ghokapi. Panihapa bambo jola akahakalile na kumpwagii mtumika waki, ‘Ujenda kanyata mwijiji, na mwindela ya muchi, na ukabhaleta bhahochu, ilema, akangalola, na bhabhatengwike na kubhapwaghi bhahikaje.’
14.22: Palongi pachokope mtumika jola akakelawiki na kupwagha, ‘Bambo, kila chindu kihenghakiki wichu ngati mowalaghalakile, nambu mbekenyu ja kutama bhandu jikale.’
14.23: Bhela bambo jola akampwaghi mtumika waki, ‘Ujenda mwindela ya muchi na mwijiji na ukabhalazimisha bhandu bhahikaje, nahuli nyumba jangu jitwelalaje.
14.24: Maghambu numpwaghila nga mundu nga jumu pachilanda ja bhanakokiki joanahonja chilebhi cha uwangalalu wangu!’ ” Ghaghapalika kwa kubha mbulwa Matayo 10:37-38
14.25: Bhela mapogha ghamaheli gha bhandu bhakabhi bhunjengale Yesu, jombi akang'anambwiki na kubhapwaghila bhandu,
14.26: “Mundu jokapi joanyengale nepani anaabya chakaka mbulwa wangu ngati anaambai nepani kupeta atati na mabhu waki, nhwanu waki na bhana bhaki, bhabheli bhaki na bhalombu bhaki, na mweni.
14.27: Mundu jokapi jwanga kunyamula msalaba waki na kunyengalela nepani, ngaawezi kubha mbulwa wangu.”
14.28: “Bho, mundu bholi pachilanda jinu joapala kuchenga mnala, joailepa kutumbu kutama pahi na kubhalanga mbija yeabhi nayu kwa kuchenga, nahuli amanya ngati abhi na mbija yeilenganela kwa kujomulela?
14.29: Kwa kubha ngati anaatumbwi kuchenga luhuli, na kulepale kujomule kuchenga, bhandu bhokapi bhabhabhona cheakihengike bhitenda kunheka.
14.30: Bhela bhipwagha, ‘Mundu ajoju akatumbwi kuchenga nambu ngacheaweziki kujomulela lihengu laki!’
14.31: “Au nkolongwa bholi joajenda kukomana na nkolongwa jongi, jwanga kutumbu kutama pahi, na kuholalela ngati anaweza kwa manjolinjoli bhaki elufu komi kukomana na jola joabhi na manjolinjoli elufu ishiline?
14.32: Jombi ngati ngaayiwezi, anaantumila nkolongwa njaki jola ubholu wa kujopa kujongana kwa lukwale koni jongi hoju akabya akali kutali.”
14.33: Yesu akajomuli kwa kupwagha, “Kwa ntundu ghonihoghu, njeta pachilanda jinu joayiweza kubha mbulwa wangu ngati nangakuileka yokapi yeabhi naku.” Mwinyu wangakupalika Matayo 5:13; Mako 9:50
14.34: “Mwinyu nde wamboni, nambu mwinyu anauhoiki kunogha kwaki, bho, anaaujeghalika kiki nahuli ukelabhuha kunogha kwaki?
14.35: Ngacheupalika kabheti hata kwa kujeghela mungonda wala kuhangaghana na mbolea, nambu bhandu bhaulekela pela. Joabhi na makutu na ajowanaje!”

15.1: Lichobha limu bhajopa kode na bhana mahoku bhamaheli bhakapiti kunjowane Yesu.
15.2: Nambu Mafalisayo na bhabhola bha Shelia bhakatumbwi kung'ong'uteka bhakapwaghaje, “Mundu ajoju abhakoka bhana mahoku na kula papamu nabhu!”
15.4: “Bho, ngati jumu winu anabhi na mambeleli mia moja, anaamanyi limu laki litehi kuhobha aitenda bhole, bho, ngaaghaleki tisini na tisa ghala pandu pa kudimila na kujenda kulilonda lelihobhiki lela mbaka alipataje?
15.5: Anaalipatiki, ayihekalya na kulitotola pachilembela chaki,
15.6: na kubhuja nalu kunyumba. Panihapa anaabhalohaje bhakochi bhaki na bhandu bha pambipi jaki, na kubhapwaghila, ‘Muhekalyaje papamu na nepani, maghambu nilipatiki limbeleli langu lelahobhike!’
15.7: Bhelabhela numpwaghila, kwibya na chiheku kunani kumahunde kwa ndandi jaka mwana mahoku jumu joang'anambuka na kughaleka mahoku ghaki, kupeta bhandu tisini na tisa bhabhalibhona kubha bhamboni na bhangakupala kughaleka mahoku ghabhu. Ulenganesu wa lingengelema lelihobhiki
15.8: “Au tupwagha mbomba jumu abhi na mangengelema kome gha mbija, bho, anahoiki lingengelema limu, aitenda bhole? Anapambakya taa na kupyaghi munyumba na kujilonda wichu mbaka ajipataje.
15.9: Jombi anaalipatiki lingengelema heli, anaabhalohaje bhakochi bhaki na bhandu bha pambipi jaki, na kubhapwaghila, ‘Muhekalyaje papamu na nepani, maghambu nilipatiki lingengalema langu limu lelahobhike!’
15.10: Bhelebhela numpwaghila, bhenibhela nde mobhahekalela nakanopi bhatumika bha kunani kumahunde bhaka Chapanga kwa ndandi jaka muhakau jumu joang'anambuka na kughaleka mahoku ghaki.” Ulengenesu waka mwana joahobhiki
15.11: Yesu akajendali kubhapwaghila, “Kukabhi na mundu jumu joakabhi na bhana bhabheli bha chikambaku.
15.12: Nchoku jola akampwaghi atati waki, ‘Atati, umbekya upwelelu wangu.’ ” Bhela atati akabhaghabhi hindu yaki.
15.13: Paghapetiki machobha machokope, nchoku jola akalombisi hindu yaki. Akapiti na mbija yeakapatiki ku inchi ja kutali, konihoku akajitangini mbija yaki kwa matamu gha chijaka.
15.14: Paakajomwi kutumi mbija yaki, kukapitali injala ngolongwa ku inchi jenijela jokape, najombi akahighali panga chindu.
15.15: Bhela akapiti kujopa lihengu kwaka mundu jumu mwenei wa inchi jenijela, najombi akundaghalaki ajenda kungonda waki kulekeya magholobhi.
15.16: Jombi akatokuli namaha kula makambati ghala ghaghakulika magholobhi, nambu nga mundu joakampeki chindu cha kula.
15.17: Paakatumbwili kupata malangu, akaholali mumtima waki na kupwagha, “Atati wangu abhi na bhatumika bhamahele bhakula na kukileka chilebhe, na nepani mbotela kwa injala!
15.18: Bhela anamoka kongo na kujenda kwa atati wangu na kampwaghila, ‘Atati, nuntendi mahoku Chapanga na nukutendi mahoku wehapa.
15.19: Ngachembalika kabheti kulowakeka mwana waku, undenda mya ngati jumu wa bhatumika bhaku.’ ”
15.20: Bhela akatumbwi mwanja wa kukelabhuka kwa atati waki. “Nambu paakabhi akali patali pachokopi, atati waki akumbweni, koni mtima waki utweli chiha, akunkembalili mwana waki, akunjobhatili na kumbusu.
15.21: Mwana jola akumpwaghi atati waki, ‘Atati wangu, nuntendi mahoku Chapanga na nukutendi mahoku wehapa. Ngachembalika kabheti kulowakeka mwana waku.’ ”
15.22: Nambu atati waki akabhapwaghi bhatumika bhaki, “ ‘Kanyata! Ndeta ingobhu jinyahi munhwatikaje. Munhwatika pete mulukonji lwa mumabhoku na magubasi mumagholu ghake.
15.23: Bhela ndeta litoli lelinenipi na kulichinja, tukulaji na kuhekalela!
15.24: Ndandi mwana wangu ajoju akabhi apotile, nambu sajenu abhi mwome, akabhi ahobhiki, nambu sajenu abhonakini.’ ” Bhela na bhombi bhakatumbwi kuhekalela papamu.
15.25: “Uwangalalu pawabhi ujendalela mwana waki nkolongwa akabhi akali kungonda. Paakabhi akelabhuka na kuheghale panyumba, akajowini sauti ja nyembu na bhandu bhakina.
15.26: Bhela akandohiki mtumika jumu na kundalukila, ‘Bho, kubhi na kyane pambane?’
15.27: Mtumika jola akamuyangiki, ‘Nnung'una waku akelawiki panyumba, na atati waku achinjiki litole lelinenipi, maghambu mwana waki akelawiki wichu na mwome.’
15.28: “Mbeli waki jola akahakalili na kukana kujingi munyumba. Bhela atati waki akapitiki kunja na kumpembalela ajingala munyumba.
15.29: Nambu jombi akamuyangiki atati waki, ‘Lingalya! Hyaka yokapi nukutumaki ngati nuntumwa, ngachenhoki amuli yaku hata punkamu. Bho, umbeki kyane? Ngacheumbeki hata likenda la imbuhi jimu nahuli nhekalya na bhakochi bhangu!
15.30: Nambu mwana waku ajoju joapechangini hindu yaku papamu na bhakemi chikahi pe pahikiki unchinjili litoli lelinenipi lela!’
15.31: Atati waki akamuyangiki, ‘Mwanango, wehapa ubhi na nepani machobha ghokapi, na hindu yokapi yemi nayu nde yako.
15.32: Nambu itupaliki kutenda uwangalalu na kuhekalela, maghambu nnung'una waku ajoju akabhi apotile, nambu sajenu abhi mwomi, akabhi ahobhike, nambu sajenu abhonakine.’ ”

16.1: Yesu akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki ulenganesu agho, “Pakabhi na mwanahindu yamaheli jumu joakabhi na mlonda wa hindu yaki. Bhandu bhakunchochaki mwanahindu hoju kubha mlonda waki apechangana hindu yaki liyaha.
16.2: Bhela mwana hindu jola akunkemiki na kumpwaghila, ‘Bho, hagha malobhi bholi ghanyowana panani jako? Nukujopa ubhalanga hindu yangu yokapi yeujopiki na yeubhohiki, maghambu ngacheupalika kabheti kujendalela kubha wa mlonda wa hindu yangu.’
16.3: Mlonda jola akaliholalili, ‘Nkolongwa wangu anandopula lihengu la kujemalela. Henu anandenda kike? Ngachemili na makili gha kulemela, na kujenda kujopajopa mona hiyoni.
16.4: Henu nikimanyi chembalika kuchihenga, nahuli anandopuliki lihengu langu, bhandu bhaweza kunyopalela kunyumba jabhu.’
16.5: “Bhela akabhakemiti bhokapi bhabhadaiwa na bambo waki. Akundaluki wa kutumbula, ‘Bho, bambo wangu akudai mbija ilenga?’
16.6: Jombi akamuyangiki, ‘Mapipa mia moja gha mahuta gha mizeituni.’ Mlonda jola akumpwaghile, ‘Utola cheti chaku cha lideni, utama pahi na ulemba mapipa hamsini.’
16.7: Bhela akundaluki na jongi, ‘Wenga akudai kike?’ Na jombi akamuyangiki, ‘Magunila mia moja gha ingano.’ Mlonda jola akumpwaghile, ‘Utola cheti chaku cha lideni, na ulemba magunila semanini.’ ”
16.8: “Bhela bambo waka mlonda jola akundumbali mlonda muhakau ndandi akahengiki kila chindu kwa kuchenjela. Maghambu bhandu bha pundema pani bhachenjili nakanopi mukuhenga mambu ghabhu kupeta bhandu bha unang'anu.”
16.9: Yesu akajendali kupwagha, “Nanatu numpwaghila, ntumila hindu ya pundema pani kwa kulonda bhakochi, nahuli payanjomukya, muweza kujopalewa munyumba ja womi wa mileli.
16.10: Jokapi joakubha ndongwana kwa mambu machoku, akubha ndongwana bhelabhela kwa mambu makolongwa, na jokapi jwangakubha ndongwana kwa mambu machoku, bhelabhela ngacheaweza kubha ndongwana kwa mambu makolongwa.
16.11: Bhela anangati mwanganya ngachemwabhi mwalongwana kwa kujemalela hindu ya pundema pani, bho, nane joaweza kukupekeha yela hindu ya chakaka?
16.12: Ngati ngachemwabhi bhalongwana kwa hindu yaka mundu jongi, bho, nane joampekya hindu hinu mabhete?
16.13: “Njeta mtumika joaweza kubhatumakila mabambo bhabheli, maghambu ananhwakalya jumu na kumpala jongi, au anaakamulana na jumu na kumpoha lihamu jongi. Ngamuwezi kuntumaki Chapanga na kwitumiki mbija kwa papamu.” Malenganesu ghangi ghaka Yesu Matayo 11:12-13; 5:31-32; Mako 10:11-12
16.14: Bhela Mafalisayo pabhajowini malobhi ghanihagha, bhakundongimi Yesu, maghambu bhakabhi bhapala mbija.
16.15: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Mwanganya mulibhona mabhamdu bhamboni palongi ja bhandu, nambu Chapanga ajimanyi mitima jinu. Maghambu chechibhonikana kubha chamboni palongi ja mihu gha bhandu, Chapanga akibhona kubha chihakau.
16.16: “Shelia na Malembu gha bhalota bhaka Chapanga ghakatangaziki mbaka chikahi chaka Yohana Mbatizaji. Kutumbu panihapa Malobhi Manyahi gha Ukolongwa waka Chapanga ghatangizwi, na kila mundu aujingi kwa makili.
16.17: Nambu kupepwiki namaa kwa kunani kumahunde na pundema kupeta, kuliku hata chindu chimu kichokope mu Shelia kubhowakeka.
16.18: “Mwanalomi jokapi joandeka nhwanu waki na kuntogho mbomba jongi, atenda ugone, na jokapi joantogho mbomba joalekini na ndomi waki, atenda ugone. Mwanahindu yamaheli na Lazalo
16.19: “Kukabhi na mundu jumu mwanahindu, jonihoju akabhi awata ingobhu ya mbija yamaheli, na kutenda uwangalalu machobha ghokapi.
16.20: Bhelabhela kukabhi na mundu jumu kahochu joalowakika Lazalo, joakabhi na hilonda hyegha jokapi, bhakabhi bhundeta palongi ja pundyangu wa nyumba jaka mwanahindu jola.
16.21: Jombi akabhi akatokulya kula imbala yeihabhuka kuhuma panani ja meza jaka mwanahindu jola. Hata nakawa ikaikiki kundambalamba mwilonda yaki.
16.22: “Lichobha limu kahochu jola akapotile, na bhatumika bha kunani kwaka Chapanga bhakampeliki mbaka pambipi na Ibulahimu. Na mwanahindu jola akapotile, na kuntagha.
16.23: Paakabhi kuwawa, akabhi ang'ahika namaa, akalingiki kunani na kumbona Ibulahimu cha kutali, na Lazalo akabya pambipi jaki.
16.24: Bhela akandohiki kwa kujamalila akapwagha, ‘Atati Ibulahimu! Umonila chiha! Untuma Lazalo akajwiha lukonji lwaki mumachi, ahika ahimiya lulimi lwangu, ndandi ning'ahika namaa mu motu ghone!’
16.25: “Nambu Ibulahimu akamuyangiki, ‘Mwanango, ukombuka kubha ujomwi kupata mambu manyahi ghaku chikahi cha womi waku, na Lazalo akapatiki mambu mahakau. Na sajenu Lazalo abhi pambani ahekalela, nambu wenga ung'ahakika.
16.26: Papamu na bhela kubhi na libhomba likolongwa pachilanda jitu na mwenga, nahuli bhabhabhi kongone anabhapai kulomboka konihoku ngabhiweza, kabheti bhabhabhi konihoku anabhapai kulomboka na kuhika kongone ngabhiweza.’
16.27: Bhela mwanahindu akapwaghike, ‘Bhela, atati wangu nukujopa, untuma Lazalo kunyumba ja bhalongu bhangu,
16.28: kwa ndandi monihomu mi na bhalongu nhwano. Undeka ajenda akabhalakalya nahuli ngabhihika pandu pani pamang'ahiku.’
16.29: “Ibulahimu akamuyangike, ‘Bhalongu bhaku bhabhi na Musa na bhalota bhaka Chapanga, waleka bhajowanya bhombe.’
16.30: Mwanahindu akayangike, ‘Ngabhela atati Ibulahimu, nambu ngati mundu anayokiki na kubhajendela, anabhang'anambukaje na kughaleka mahoku ghabhu.’
16.31: Nambu Ibulahimu akumpwaghile, ‘Ngati ngachebhunjowane Musa na bhalota bhaka Chapanga, ngabhijetakeli hata ngati mundu anahyokike.’ ”

17.1: Yesu akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Anaipitalya hindu yamaheli yeyampelakya mundu kuhenga mahoku, nambu anaachibhonaje mundu jola joaghatenda ghapitalyaje!
17.2: Ikabya mbanga mundu hoju akongakika liganga la kuyaghila pahingu na kundeke mu bahali kuliku kuntenda jumu wa bhachoku abhabha atenda mahoku.
17.3: Kwa ndandi ajeji mulilendaje. “Ngati ndongu waku anaakuhokihi, undakalya, na anaang'anambwiki na kukotoka lihoku laki, undekakyaje.
17.4: Ngati anaakuhoki mala saba pa lichobha limu, na anaakelawiki mala saba na kupwagha, ‘Ng'anambwiki na kughaleka mahoku ghangu,’ upalika undekakyaje.” Uhobhalelu
17.6: Bambo akapwaghike, “Ngati uhobhalelu winu ukabhi uchoku hata ngati imbeju njoku ja haladali, mukabya muweziki kuupwaghi nkongu wa mtini aghoghu, ‘Utupukaje, na ukalipanda mubahali,’ nawombi ukabya unjetakile. Mahengu ghaka mtumika
17.7: “Tupwagha jumu winu abhi na mundu joandemela mungonda au kundimila mambeleli ghaki. Muhenga lihengu jola paahika kuhuma kungonda, bho, aweza le kumpwaghi, ‘Uhika kinyata, utama pahi, na ukula chilebhe?’
17.8: Ngabhela! Jombi anampwaghila, ‘Kutumbula ndelakya chilebhi na undumakya mbaka panijomula kula na kunywa, na panihapa nde uweza kula na kunywa!’
17.9: Bho, ngaanchenguli mtumika hoju kwa ndandi ahengiki ghala ghaandaghalakile?
17.10: Bhelabhela nanamu ananjomwi kuhenga kila chindu chechumpalika kuhenga, mpwagha, ‘Tepani twa bhatumika pela twanga na nyonjeka, tuhengiki pe ghaghapalika tuhengaje.’ ” Yesu alamiha bhandu komi
17.11: Yesu paakabhi mumwanja wa kujenda ku Yelusalemu, akapetiki mukulindakani mwa muchi wa Samalia na wa Galilaya.
17.12: Paakabhi ajingi mu chijiji chimu, akahimangini na bhandu komi bhana malohi. Bhakajemi cha kutali,
17.14: Yesu paakabhaweni, akabhapwaghile, “Njenda mkalilangia kwa bhapenganyambiku.” Pabhakabhi mwindela bhakajendaje, bhakalamike.
17.15: Jumu wabhu paaliweni kubha alamike, akakelawiki kwaka Yesu koni akundumbalya Chapanga kwa kujamalila.
17.16: Akalileki pahi palongi ja magholu ghaka Yesu koni akunchengulaje. Mundu jonihoju akabhi Msamalia.
17.17: Yesu akalalukile, “Bho, nga bhandu komi le bhabhalamike? Bho, tisa bhala bhabhi kwako?
17.18: Bho, ngacheabhonakini mundu jongi joakelawiki kundumbali Chapanga nambu ngeni ajoju pela?”
17.19: Bhela Yesu akumpwaghi mundu jola, “Ujemaje, ujendaje, uhobhalelu waku ukulamihe.” Kuhika kwa Ukolongwa waka Chapanga Matayo 24:23-28,37-41
17.20: Chikahi chimu Mafalisayo bhakundaluki Yesu, “Bho, Ukolongwa waka Chapanga anauhika lile?” Yesu akabhayangike, “Ukolongwa waka Chapanga ngacheuhika kwa kubhonikana kwa mihu.
17.21: Nga jumu joanawezaje kupwagha, ‘Lingalyaje, ubhi pambane, au ubhi pala.’ Chakaka Ukolongwa waka Chapanga ubhi mkati jinu.”
17.22: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Machobha ghahika pamwitokulya kubhona lichobha limu pa machobha ghaka Mwana waka Mundu, nambu ngamwalibhone.
17.23: Bhandu bhampwaghila, ‘Ndingalya abhi kola!’ Au ‘Ndingalya abhi pambane!’ Nambu ngamwibhoka pambile na kubhajengalela.
17.24: Kwa ndandi ngati unang'anu wa chitobhi moubhonakela kunani na kumulika kutumbula upambala ghumu mbaka upambala ghongi, bhenibhela nde Mwana waka Mundu moayibhonakanya mu lichobha leanahikaje.
17.25: Nambu mangani ja mambu ghanihagha ghokapi anaang'ahakika namaa na kukanakika na bhandu bha kibheleku chenu.
17.26: Ngati mokwabheli pa machobha ghaka Nuhu, nde mokwibhelila pa machobha gha kuhika kwaka Mwana waka Mundu.
17.27: Machobha ghanighala bhandu bhakabhi bhakula na kunywa, bhakatoghula na kutoghuleka, mbaka lichobha lela Nuhu paajingala mu sitima ngolongwa jejilowakeka safina. Na panihapa iyula ngolongwa jakatonyiki na kubhakoma bhokapi.
17.28: Kwibya bhenibhela ngati mokwabheli pa machobha ghaka Lutu. Bhandu bhakabhi bhakula na kunywa, bhakalomba na kulombesa, bhakapanda imbeju na kuchenga.
17.29: Nambu lichobha Lutu paakabhokiki ku Sodoma, motu na maganga ghaghabhelela motu ghakahawiki pahi kuhuma kunani kumahunde na kubhakoma bhokapi.
17.30: Bhenibhela nde mokwibhelila lichobha lela Mwana waka Mundu paanahikaje.
17.31: “Mu Lichobha heli, mundu jokapi joayibya kunani ja nhwaghala ngaayihuluka kujingi munyumba na kutola hindu yaki. Bhelabhela mundu joayibya kungonda ngaikelabhuka kunyumba kutola chindu.
17.32: Mkombuka ghala ghaghumpatiki nhwanu waka Lutu.
17.33: Mundu jokapi joapala kuukengale womi waki, anauhoaje, nambu mundu jola joapala kuuhoa womi waki, anaukengalyaje.
17.34: Numpwaghila, ikilu heji, bhandu bhabheli bhibya bhaghoni pachitanda chimu, jumu ayitolakikaje na jongi kuhighalila.
17.35: Akambomba bhabheli bhibya bhapola mahunu papamu, jumu ayitolakikaje na jongi kuhighalila.
17.36: Bhandu bhabheli bhibya kungonda, jumu ayitolakikaje na jongi kuhighalila.”
17.37: Panihapa bhabhulwa bhaki bhakundalukile, “Bambo, bho, mambu ghanihagha ghitendakika kwako?” Yesu akabhayangiki, “Pandu papibya na ntuhi, panihapa nde payalibhongana ngwahe.”

18.1: Bhela Yesu akabhalandi bhabhulwa bhaki ulenganesu ghongo kwa kubhabhola kubha bhapalika kundobha Chapanga kila lichobha panga na kutonda.
18.2: Akapwaghike, “Ku muchi ghumu kukabhi na mtemula jumu jwangakunjoghopa Chapanga wala ngacheapalika bhandu.
18.3: Pa muchi ghonighola, kukabhi na mbomba jumu joaweliwi na ndomi joakabhi anjende mtemula jola panga kutonda na kumpwaghila, ‘Chondi, unyemalya mbata chechibhi changu kuhuma kwaka adui wangu!’
18.4: Kwa chikahi chilachu mtemula jola akakaniki kunjangatila mbomba joaweliwi na ndomi jola. Nambu palongi akalilaluki mweni, ‘Hata ngati nepani ngachenunjoghopa Chapanga wala ngachenabhapala bhandu,
18.5: nambu maghambu mbomba ajoju joaweliwi na ndomi apetali kung'aha ananunjangatya apata chekibhi chaki, nanga bhela anaajendalya kunhikila na kundenda ndondaje!’ ”
18.6: Bhela Bambo akabhapwaghile, “Njowanya ntundu mtemula muhakau ajo moapwaghile.
18.7: Bho, Chapanga le ngaabhakengaleli bhahaghulika bhaki, bhabhundelela ikilu na muhi? Bho, anaakabhakya le kwajangatila?
18.8: Numpwaghi mabhanganya, anabhajangatya manyata. Nambu Mwana waka Mundu paanahikaje, bho, anakubya le na uhobhalelu pani pundema?” Ulengenesu waka Mfalisayo na njopa kode
18.9: Yesu akalongi kabheti ulenganesu aghoghu kwa ndandi ja bhandu bhala bhabhabhi na makoma na kubhalongale mahakau bhajabhu.
18.10: “Lichobha limu bhandu bhabheli bhakapiti kulobha mu Nyumba jaka Chapanga. Jumu akabhi Mfalisayo na jongi akabhi njopa kode.
18.11: “Mufalisayo jola akajemiki, koni akalobha mumtima waki ana, ‘Nukuchengu wa Chapanga, maghambu nepani ngachemi ngati bhandu bhangi bhokapi bhabhabhi bhanyaghula, bhabhatenda mahakau, na bhabhatenda ugone. Nukuchengu bhelabhela maghambu nepani ngachemi ngati njopa kode ajoju.
18.12: Nepani ngonga kula chilebhe machobha ghabheli kwa juma, na moha pandu pa komi pa hindu yangu yokapi yembata.’
18.13: “Nambu njopa kode jola akajemiki cha kutali, najombi ngachealengiki hata kulingali kunani kumahunde, nambu akalilapwilapwi pachihimba kwa kumbina mtima na kupwagha, ‘Wenga wa Chapanga, umonila chiha nepani mwana mahoku!’ ”
18.14: Yesu akajendali kupwagha, “Numpwaghila, mundu ajoju njopa kode akabhujiki kunyumba jaki koni akabya ajetakaliwi palongi jaka Chapanga, nambu nga Mfalisayo jola. Maghambu kila mundu joalikweha, anahelalikaje, nambu kila mundu joaliheleha, anakwehakikaje.” Yesu abhapengale bhana bhachoku Matayo 19:13-15; Mako 10:13-16
18.15: Bhandu bhakundeti Yesu bhana bhachoku nahuli abhabhekila mabhoku na kubhapengalela. Bhabhulwa pabhaweni bhenibhela, bhakabhalakali bhandu bhanibhala.
18.16: Nambu Yesu akabhakemiki bhana bhahikaje na kupwagha, “Mwaleka bhana bhachoku bhahika kwangu, wala ngamwahibhalila, maghambu Ukolongwa waka Chapanga nde wa bhandu bhabhalengana na bhana.
18.17: Chakaka numpwaghila, mundu jokapi jwangakujopalela Ukolongwa waka Chapanga ngati mwana nchoku, ngawezi kujingila mu Ukolongwa hoghu ng'o.” Nkombu mwanahindu yamaheli Matayo 19:16-30; Mako 10:17-31
18.18: Chiongozi jumu wa Bhayahude akundaluki Yesu, “Mbola Wambone, bho, ndenda bhole nahuli mbata womi wa mileli?”
18.19: Yesu akandalukile, “Bho maghambu ki unoha nepani wambone? Nga mundu joabhi wambone nambu Chapanga kanjika jaki.
18.20: Wimanyi amule: ‘Ngawitenda ugone, ngawikoma, ngawijibha, ngawilonge ichole, wajinika atati waku na mabhu waku.’ ”
18.21: Jombi akamuyangiki, “Amuli yokapi ayeyi nikamwi kutumbu uchoku wangu.”
18.22: Yesu paakajowini ghanihagha, akampwaghile, “Ukepakiwi na chindu chimo. Ujenda ukalombisa hindu yokapi yeubhi nayo, na ukabhaghabhila bhahochu mbija heyi, nanaghu wibya ulibheki chikoku kunani kumahunde. Panihapa nde uhika unyengalyaje.”
18.23: Nambu mundu jola paakajowini malobhi ghanighala, akayomiki namaa kwa ndandi akabhi na hindu yamaheli.
18.24: Yesu paakambweni ahakalili nakanopi akapwaghike, “Ntundu bhole mokunonupile kwaka mwanahindu yamaheli kujingi mu Ukolongwa waka Chapanga!
18.25: Kwa ndandi kupepwiki namaa kwa chinyama chekilowakeka ngamia kuholota mulimboghi la sindano kuliku mwanahindu yamaheli kujingi mu Ukolongwa waka Chapanga.”
18.26: Bhandu bhabhajowini malobhi ghanighala bhakalalukile, “Bho, henu nde nane joaweza kukengaleka?”
18.27: Yesu akayangike, “Mambu ghangakuwezikana kwa bhandu, ghawezikana kwaka Chapanga.”
18.28: Bhela Petulu akapwaghike, “Lingalya! Tepani tuilekiki hindu yitu yokapi na kukujengale wehapa!”
18.29: Yesu akamuyangiki, “Chakaka numpwaghila, ngati mundu anaajilekiki nyumba jaki, na nhwanu waki, na bhalongu bhaki, na bhabheleka bhaki, na bhana bhaki kwa ndandi ja Ukolongwa waka Chapanga,
18.30: anaajopalya ghamaheli nakanopi kwa chikahi cha sajenu, na mu ndema ghouhika ayijopalya womi wa mileli.” Yesu alongela pakatatu panani ja kupotela na kuyoka kwaki Matayo 20:17-19; Mako 10:32-34
18.31: Yesu akabhatoliki bhabhulwa bhaki komi na bhabheli punkeghi na kubhapwaghila, “Njowanyaje! Tukwela kujenda ku Yelusalemu, na malembu ghokapi ghaghalembakiki na bhalota bhaka Chapanga panani jaka Mwana waka Mundu anaghapitalyaje.
18.32: Maghambu anabhunkamula na kumpeleka kwa bhandu bha Mataifa, anabhunhekaje, anabhuntondulaje na kunhuni imata.
18.33: Anabhundapulaje na kunkoma, nambu lichobha la katatu anaayokaje.”
18.34: Nambu bhabhulwa bhaki ngachebhamanyi ndandi ja malobhi ghanihagha, maghambu malobhi ghanihagha ghakahiyakiki kwabho, na bhombi ngachebhamanyi ngati Yesu alongalya panani ja kike. Yesu andamiha ngalola Matayo 20:29-34; Mako 10:46-52
18.35: Yesu paakabhi aheghali muchi wa Yeliko, kukabhi na mundu jumu ngalola akatemi punkeghi ja indela akajopaje.
18.36: Paakajowini lipogha la bhandu bhakapetaje, akalalukile, “Bho, kubhi na kyane?”
18.38: Jombi akajamalili akapwagha, “Yesu! Mwana waka Daude! Umonila chiha!”
18.39: Bhandu bhabhalonguli bhala bhakundakalili na kumpwaghila atumbalaje. Nambu jombi akajendali kujamalila, akapwagha, “Mwana waka Daude! Umonila chiha!”
18.40: Yesu akajemiki na kubhalaghalaki bhundeta ngalola jola kwaki. Ngalola jola paakaheghalili pambipi, Yesu akundalukile,
18.41: “Bho, upala nukuhengila kyane?” Akayangiki, “Bambo, mbala kubhona kabhate.”
18.43: Palapala ngalola jola akaweziki kulola, na kunjengale Yesu koni akundumbalya Chapanga. Na bhandu bhokapi bhabhaliweni lijambu leniheli, na bhombi bhakundumbali Chapanga.

19.1: Yesu akajingi mu muchi wa Yeliko na kupeta pachilanda ja muchi hoghu.
19.2: Konikola kukabhi na mundu jumu lihina laki Zakayo, joakabhi nkolongwa wa bhajopa kode, na mwanahindu yamaheli.
19.3: Jonihoju akapaliki kumbona Yesu kubha mundu wa ntundu bhole, nambu kwa ndandi akabhi mundu njipi, ngacheaweziki kumbona maghambu bhandu bhakabhi bhamaheli.
19.4: Bhela akakembili kubhalongulela bhandu, na kukwela mnani ja nkongu wa mtini nahuli ambona Yesu, maghambu Yesu anahika kwa kupete indela jenijela.
19.5: Yesu paakahikiki pandu panipala, akalingali mnani na kumpwaghila, “Zakayo, uhuluka manyata, ndandi laleno imbalika kupilakila munyumba jako.”
19.6: Bhela Zakayo akahulwiki manyata, akahelili na kunjopale kwa chiheku chikolongwa.
19.7: Bhandu bhokapi bhabhaghaweni ghanihagha bhakatumbwi kung'ong'uteka bhakapwaghaje, “Apiti kutama kwaka mundu mwana mahoku!”
19.8: Nambu Zakayo akajemi na kumpwaghi Bambo, “Lingalyaje, Bambo! Ananabhapekya bhahochu nusu ja hindu yangu, na ngati nakatoliki chindu chaka mundu kwa kukolowa, ananunkelabhukya mala pachechi pa chindu chaki.”
19.9: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Lalenu ukengaleku ujingi mu nyumba moni, kwa ndandi mundu ajoju najombi nde mwana waka Ibulahimu.
19.10: Kwa ndandi Mwana waka Mundu ahikiki kulonda na kukengalela bhandu bhala bhabhahobhiki.” Ulenganesu wa bhatumika kome Matayo 25:14-30
19.11: Bhandu pabhajowini malobhi ghanihagha, Yesu akajonjuki kupwagha kwa ulenganesu, maghambu akabhi pambipi na muchi wa Yelusalemu, na bhandu bhala bhahambukya kubha Ukolongwa waka Chapanga uhika chikahi chelachela.
19.12: Bhela akabhapwaghile, “Kukabhi na mundu jumu wa lukolu lwa kikolongwa joakapiti ku inchi ja kutali nahuli akajopalya ukolongwa na kukelabhuka.
19.13: Bhela paakabhi akona ngakubhoka, akabhalohiki bhatumika bhaki komi na kubhapeke mbija kila jumu wabhu na kubhapwaghila, ‘Muhemala hindu na kulombesa mbaka panikelebhukaje.’
19.14: Nambu bhandu bha muchi waki bhakatehi kunhakalila, na bhela bhakabhatumiki bhabholu bhajenda bhakapwaghaje, ‘Ngachetumpala mundu ajoju atutawalaje.’
19.15: “Nambu mundu jola akaupatiki ukolongwa na kukelabhuka. Akabhalohiki bhatumika bhala bhaakabhapeki mbija nahuli apata kumanya kila mundu apatiki nyonjeka bhole.
19.16: Mtumika wa kutumbula akahikiki na kupwagha, ‘Bambo, mbatiki nyonjeka komi yengi ya mbija yewambekie.’
19.17: Jombi akumpwaghile, ‘Uhengiki wichu, wenga wantumika wambone! Maghambu ukabhi undongwana kwa chindu kichoku, nukubheka ubya unkolongwa wa michi komi.’
19.18: Mtumika wa kabheli akahikiki na kupwagha, ‘Bambo, mbatiki nyonjeka nhwanu nakanopi kwa mbija jewambekie.’
19.19: Jombi akampwaghile, ‘Na wenga bhelabhela nukubheka ubya unkolongwa wa michi nhwano.’
19.20: “Mtumika wa katatu akahikiki na kupwagha, ‘Bambo, jenje nde mbija jaku, jenakajihiiki wichu mu chitambala.
19.21: Nukujoghupa wehapa, maghambu wa mundu unkale. Wenga wa mundu we utola yangakubha yaku na kuhuna yangakupanda.’
19.22: Bambo waki akampwaghile, ‘Wehapa wa mtumika muhakao! Nukutemula kubhokana na malobhi ghaku! Wamanyiki kubha nepani na mundu nunkali, nendola hindu yangu na kuhuna yangakupanda.
19.23: Bho, maghambu ja kyane ngachewabhei mbija jangu kubenki, nahuli lichobha la kukelebhuka kwangu nakapata mbija jangu papamu na nyonjeka jake?’
19.24: “Bhela akabhapwaghi bhabhajemi pambipi, ‘Munyaghula mbija heji kuhuma kwaki na mukumpekya jola joapatiki nyonjokela komi.’
19.25: Bhombi bhakumpwaghile, ‘Nambu Bambo, jonihoju abhi nayu tayale nyonjeka komi!’
19.26: Jombi akayangiki, ‘Kila mundu joabhi na chindu anajonjukiwa chengi, nambu mundu jwangakubha na chindu ananyaghulika hata kichokopi cheabhi naku.
19.27: Henu kwa bhala maadui bhangu, bhangakupala nepani mya nunkolongwa wabhu, mwabhaleta pambani, na mwakoma palongi jangu!’ ” Yesu ajingila ku Yelusalemu kwa chiheku chikolongwa Matayo 21:1-11; Mako 11:1-11; Yohana 12:12-19
19.28: Yesu paakajomwi kulonge malobhi ghanihagha, akabhalonguli palongi jabhu na kujenda ku Yelusalemu.
19.29: Paakaheghali kuhika ku Besifage na ku Besania pambipi na Chitombi cha Mizeituni, Yesu akabhatumiki bhabheli pachilanda ja bhabhulwa bhaki,
19.30: na kubhapwaghila, “Njendanya ku chijiji chela chemukibhona, pamkahika konikola mkalihimanya liponda likongakiki na njeta mundu joalabhali kujendela. Mukalibhopula na kulileta pambane.
19.31: Ngati mundu anaandalukile, ‘Maghambu ki mulibhopo liponda heli?’ Mumpwaghila, ‘Bambo alipala.’ ”
19.32: Bhela bhala bhabhatumakiki kujenda bhakahimani kila chindu kibhi ngati Yesu moakapwaghile.
19.33: Pabhakabhi bhalibhopo liponda lela, bheni labhu bhakabhalalukile, “Ndandi ki mulibhopo liponda heli?”
19.35: Bhela bhakalipeliki kwaka Yesu liponda lela, na bhandu bhakatandiki ingobhu yabhu pangongu wa liponda na kunkwea Yesu panani jaki.
19.36: Paakabhi ajendalela na mwanja, bhandu bhakatandiki ingobhu yabhu mwindela.
19.37: Paakabhi pambipi na muchi wa Yelusalemu, punhelelu wa Chitombi cha Mizeituni, lipogha lokapi la bhabhulwa bhakahekalili na kundumbali Chapanga kwa kujamalila, kwa ndandi ja ngangachu yokapi yebhiwene.
19.38: Bhakapwaghaje, “Apengalikaje Nkolongwa joahika kwa lihina laka Bambo! Lukwali kunani kumahunde na ulumbalilu kunani nakanope!”
19.39: Bhela Mafalisayo bhangi bhabhakabhi panipala papamu na lipogha la bhandu lela bhakumpwaghi Yesu, “Mbola, ubhalakalyaje bhabhulwa bhaku bhatumbalaje!”
19.40: Yesu akabhayangike, “Numpwaghi mabhanganya, anangati bhandu abhabha anabhatumbile, maganga aghagha anaghajamalyaje.” Yesu aulelela muchi wa Yelusalemu
19.41: Yesu paakaheghali ku Yelusalemu na kuubhona muchi, akaulelile,
19.42: akapwaghaje, “Ngati wenga ukamanyiki lalenu mambu ghaghaleta lukwali! Nambu sajenu mambu hagha ghahiyakika pamihu jaku.
19.43: Maghambu machobha ghahika maadui bhaku pabhichenga lumatu, anabhukuyongalutaje, na kukuhinya ipambala yokapi.
19.44: Pabhakuyagha wenga papamu na bhana bhaku mu lumatu lwaku. Ngabhakulekeli hata lighanga limu panani ja lengi, maghambu ngachewamanyi chikahi Chapanga paakahiki kukukengalela!” Yesu ajenda pa Nyumba jaka Chapanga Matayo 21:12-17; Mako 11:15-19; Yohana 2:13-22
19.45: Bhela Yesu akapiti pa Nyumba jaka Chapanga na kutumbu kubhapiha kunja bhabhahemela na kulombesa.
19.46: Jombi akabhapwaghile, “Ilembakiki mu Malembu Mahuhu, ‘Nyumba jangu anajibya nyumba ja malobhu.’ Nambu mwanganya mujibhei kubha likolu la bhanyaghula!”
19.47: Yesu akabhi abhola kila lichobha pa Nyumba jaka Chapanga. Nambu bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa, bhabhola bha Shelia papamu na bhakolongwa bha bhandu bhakalondiki indela ja kunkoma,
19.48: nambu ngachebhapatiki indela ja kunkoma, maghambu bhandu bhokapi bhakabhi bhunjowanela kwa wichu nakanopi.

20.1: Lichobha limu Yesu akabhi pa Nyumba jaka Chapanga, akabhatangazya bhandu Malobhi Manyahi. Bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa na bhabhola bha Shelia papamu na bhakolongwa bha bhandu bhakunhikile,
20.2: na kundalukila, “Utupwaghilaje! Bho, uhenga mambu ghanihagha kwa lujiniku lwaka nane? Na bho, nane joakupeki lujiniku loniholo?”
20.3: Yesu akabhayangiki, “Na nenga ananundalukya lilaluki limu. Mbwaghilaje,
20.4: bho, ubatizu waka Yohana ukahumiki kwaka Chapanga au kwa bhandu?”
20.5: Nambu bhombi bhakapwaghani ana, “Anatupwaghiki ukahumiki kwaka Chapanga, anaatulalukya, ‘Bho, mbona ngachemunhobhalile Yohana?’
20.6: Nambu anatupwaghiki, ‘Ukahumiki kwa bhandu,’ bhandu bhokapi anabhutulapula maganga, maghambu bhokapi bhahobhalela kubha Yohana akabhi nde mlota waka Chapanga.”
20.8: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Hata nenga nganumpwaghi kubha ndenda mambu ghangane kwa lujiniku lwaka nane.” Ulenganesu wa ngonda wa mizabibu na bhalemi bhahakau Matayo 21:33-46; Mako 12:1-12
20.9: Yesu akajendali kubhapwaghi bhandu ulenganesu agho, “Mundu jumu akapandiki ngonda wa mizabibu. Akabhajahiki bhalemi ngonda ghola, na kutumbu mwanja wa kujenda ku inchi jengi na kutama konihoku kwa chikahi chilachu.
20.10: Chikahi cha mahunu pachahikili, akuntumiki mtumwa waki kwa bhalemi bhala, nahuli akatola pandu pa mahunu gha mizabibu. Nambu bhalemi bhakundapwi mtumwa jola na kunkelebhu mabhoku matopu.
20.11: Mweni ngonda jola akuntumiki mtumwa jongi, nambu jonihoju najombi bhelabhela bhakundapwili na kuntende mambu gha iyoni, na kunkelabhu mabhoku matopu.
20.12: Akumtumiki kabheti mtumika wa katatu, jonihoju najombi, bhakumpotiki na kuntopola.
20.13: Bhela mweni ngonda jola akapwaghike, ‘Bho, anandenda bhole? Ananuntuma mwana wangu jonumpalike, pangi anabhuntopilaje jombi.’
20.14: Nambu bhalemi bhala pabhumbweni akahikaje, bhakapwaghanile, ‘Ajoju nde mpwelelu wa ngonda. Bhela tunkomaje nahuli upwelelu waki ubya witu.’
20.15: Bhela bhakunkamwili na kumpiha kunja ja ngonda wa mizabibu na kunkoma.” Yesu akalalukile, “Bho, mweni ngonda anaabhatenda kyani bhalemi bhanihabha?
20.16: Anahika na kubhakoma bhalemi habha, na kubhapeke bhalemi bhangi ngonda wa mizabibu hoghu.” Bhandu pabhajowini ulenganesu hoghu, bhakapwaghike, “Ngabhela! Chapanga ajepisha kutali mambu ghanihagha ngaghipitalila.”
20.17: Nambu Yesu akabhalingalakili na kubhalalukila, “Bho, Malembu hagha ndandi jaki kike? ‘Lighanga lebhalikaniki bhachenga, sajenu libhi lighanga likolongwa lelipalika nakanopi.’
20.18: Mundu jokapi joanahabhuka panani ja lighanga heli, anatunyukana ipandi ipandi, na mundu jolanhwabhukya lighanga heli, analunhyagha nakanope.” Kulepa kode kwaka Kaisali Matayo 22:15-22; Mako 12:13-17
20.19: Bhabhola bha Shelia na bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa bhakapaliki kunkamu Yesu palapala, maghambu bhakamanyi kubha ulenganesu hoghu walongale bhombe, nambu bhabhajoghupa bhandu.
20.20: Bhela bhakatumbwi kunjobhale Yesu, bhakabhatumiki bhandu bhakopunganya kubha bhamboni nahuli bhunkamula Yesu kwa malobhi ghaki, nahuli bhumpeleka kwaka nkolongwa wa inchi ja ku Loma.
20.21: Bhandu bhala bhakundaluki Yesu, “Mbola, tumanyi kubha ulongela na kubhola malobhi gha chakaka. Bhelabhela wehapa ngacheulingali lujiniku lwaka mundu, nambu ubhola indela ja chakaka ngati Chapanga moapali bhandu tutamaje.
20.22: Tupwaghilaje, bho, wichu le kwitu tepani kulepa kode kwaka Kaisali au ngatwilepa?”
20.23: Nambu Yesu akaumanyi uhakau wabhu, akabhapwaghile,
20.24: “Mnangiya lingengelema la mbija. Bho, jibhi na sula na lihina laka nane?” Na bhombi bhakayangiki, “Jaka Kaisali.”
20.25: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Bhela mumpekya Kaisali, yeibhi yaki Kaisali, na mumpekya Chapanga yeibhi yaki Chapanga.”
20.26: Bhela bhandu bhala ngachebhaweziki kunkamula kwa chela cheakalongi palongi ja bhandu, nambu bhakakangichi na liyangu laki, na bhombi bhakatumbile. Lilalukilu panani ja kuyoka Matayo 22:23-33; Mako 12:18-27
20.27: Masadukayo bhakumu, bhabhapwagha kubha bhakuwa ngabhiyoki, bhakunjendi Yesu na kundalukila,
20.28: “Mbola, Musa akatulaghalaki ana, ‘Ngati ndongu waka mundu anapotili na kundeka nhwanu waki panga mwana, ndongu waki apalika antoghula mbomba joaweliwi na ndomi jola nahuli ambelakya bhana ndongu waki joapoti jola.’
20.29: Bhela kukabhi na bhalongu saba, wa kutumbula akatowili na kupotela panga kupata bhana.
20.30: Ndongu wa kabhele akuntowi joaweliwi na ndomi jola, najombi akapotoli panga kupata bhana,
20.31: na ndongu wa katatu najombi kukabhi bhelabhela. Mambu ghakabhi ghalaghala kwa bhokapi saba na bhokapi bhakapotili panga kubhaleka bhana.
