8.7: Bhombi pabhakajendali kundalukila, akajinwiki, na kubhapwaghila, “Mundu jokapi jwangakubha na mahoku pachilanda jinu, na akubhaje wa kutumbula kundapula liganga.”
8.8: Akajinimi kabheti pahi na kulemba paluhombi.
8.9: Bhombi pabhajowini malobhi ghanihagha bhakatakilwi na zamili yabhu, na bhakabhokiki jumu jumu, bhakatumbula bhazee. Yesu akahighali kanjika jaki, na mbomba jola akabhi ajemiki palapala.
8.10: Yesu akajinwiki na kumpwaghila mbomba jola, “Mbomba, bho, bhabhi kwaku bhala bhabhakutakile? Bho, nga jumu joakutemwili kubha na lihoku?”
8.11: Mbomba jola akamuyangike, “Bambo, njeta hata mundu jumu.” Yesu akumpwaghile, “Wala nepani nganukutemule. Ujendaje, na kutumbu sajenu ngawihenga mahoku kabhete.” Yesu unang'anu wa ndema
8.12: Bhela Yesu akalongili na bhandu kabhete, akapwaghaje, “Nepani nde unang'anu wa ndema, jombi joanyengalela nepani ngaajendi mulwihi ng'o, nambu anakubhaje na unang'anu wa womi.”
8.13: Bhela Mafalisayo bhakumpwaghile, “Wehapa ulilandila wamwete, kulilandila kwaku nga kwa chakaka.”
8.14: Yesu akayangike, “Nepani hata ngati nililandila namwete, ulandilu wangu nde wa chakaka, kwa ndandi manyi konhuma, na kola konyenda. Nambu mwehapa ngachemmanyi kola konhuma, wala kola konyenda.
8.15: Mwehapa mtemula kwa kujengalela mambu gha hyegha, nambu nepani ngachenuntemula mundu jokapi jola.
8.16: Nepani hata ngati anandemwile, utemulu wangu nde chakaka. Kwa ndandi nepani ngachemi kanjika jangu, nambu mili nepani papamu na Atati joandumike.
8.17: Kabheti ilembakiki mu Shelia hinu kubha, ulandilu wa bhandu bhabeli nde wa chakaka.
8.18: Nepani nililandila namwete, najombi Atati joandumiki anandila bhelabhela.”
8.19: Bhela bhakumpwaghile, “Bho, abhi kwaku Atati wako?” Yesu akabhayangike, “Nepani ngachemmanye, wala Atati wangu ngachemummanye. Ngati mkamanyiki nepani, mkabya mummanyiki na Atati wangu.”
8.20: Yesu akaghalongili malobhi ghanihagha paakabhi abhola mu liwangala la Nyumba jaka Chapanga, mu chumba cha kubheke masanduku gha nyambiko. Wala nga mundu joakunkamwile, kwa ndandi lisaa laki lakabhi likali ngakuhika. Yesu apwagha panani ja nyiwa jaki
8.21: Yesu akabhapwaghi kabhete, “Nepani ndenda kubhoka, nanamu anamnondaje, nanamu anampotilaje mu mahoku ghinu. Konyenda nepani, mwehapa ngamuwezi kuhika.”
8.22: Bhela ihongozi bha Bhayahude bhakapwaghike, “Bho, anaalikoma le mwene? Kwa ndandi apwagha, ‘Konyenda nepani, mwehapa ngamuwezi kuhika!’ ”
8.23: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Mwehapa muhumiki pahi, nambu nepani nhumiki kunani kumahunde. Mwehapa nde bha pani pundema, nambu nepani nga wa pundema ghoni.
8.24: Bhela nakumpwaghi kubha anampotilaje mu mahoku ghinu, kwa ndandi nangakuhobhalela kubha, ‘Nepani nde Jombi,’ anampotilale mu mahoku ghinu.”
8.25: Bhela bhakumpwaghile, “Bho, wehapa wa nane?” Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Nepani nde jola jonakabhili nukumpwaghilaje kutumbu pakutumbula.
8.26: Mili naghu ghamaheli gha kulongela na kutemula panani jinu. Nambu jola joandumike nde chakaka, nanatu ghanaghajowini kwaki nde ghanongela kwa bhandu bha pundema.”
8.27: Wala ngachebhamanyi kubha akabhi abhapwaghila panani jaka Chapanga Atati wake.
8.28: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Pamwibya njomwili kunkweha panani Mwana waka Mundu, panihapa nde pamwimanyaje kubha ‘Nepani nde Jombi,’ na kubha ngachenhenga lilobhi lokapi lela ngati mombali namwete, nambu nongela chela pela ngati Atati wangu moamolile.
8.29: Jombi joandumike abhi papamu na nepani, Atati ngacheanekiki nepani kanjika jangu, kwa ndandi machobha ghokapi nhenga mambu ghala ghaghunyambiha.”
8.30: Yesu paakabhi alongela malobhi ghanihagha, bhandu bhamaheli bhakunhobhalile. Chakaka anajumbeka kulijeka
8.31: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghi Bhayahude bhabhunhobhali bhala kubha, “Mwehapa anamtamakili mu malobhi ghangu, anamkubhaje bhabhulwa bhangu bha chakaka.
8.32: Anamujimanya chakaka, na chakaka heji anajumbeka mwehapa kulijeka.”
8.33: Bhakamuyangike, “Tepani tubhi lubheleku lwaka Ibulahimu, wala ngachetubhi bhatumwa bhaka mundu jokapi jola. Bho, uweza bhole kupwagha kubha, ‘Anambya kulijeka?’ ”
8.34: Yesu akabhayangike, “Chakaka numpwaghila, kila mundu joahenga mahoku nde mtumwa wa mahoku.
8.35: Wala mtumwa ngacheatama panyumba machobha ghokape, nambu mwana atama mileli.
8.36: Bhela ngati Mwana anaambekiki kulijeka, anambya kulijeka chakaka.
8.37: Manyi kubha mwehapa nde lubheleku lwaka Ibulahimu, nambu mpala kungoma, maghambu lilobhi langu ngachelibhi mkati jinu.
8.38: Ghanaghaweni kwa Atati wangu nde ghanaghalongela, nanamu bhelabhela ghamughajowini kwa atati winu nde ghamughahenga.”
8.39: Bhakayangike, “Atati witu nde Ibulahimu!” Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Ngati mkabhi bhana bhaka Ibulahimu, mkabya mughahengiki mahengu ghala ghaakahengiki Ibulahimu.”
8.40: Nambu sajenu mpala kungoma nepani, nenumpwaghili jejibhi chakaka jenyowini kwaka Chapanga. Ibulahimu ngacheahengiki bhenibhela.
8.41: Mwehapa mughahenga mahengu gha atati winu. Bhombi bhakamuyangike, “Tepani ngachetwabhelakiki kwa ukemi, tepani tubhi na Atati jumu, yani, Chapanga.”
8.42: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Ngati Chapanga akabhi Atati winu, mkabya mbaliki nepani, kwa ndandi nakahumiki kwaka Chapanga, na sajenu mili pambane, wala ngachenahikiki kwa kupala namwete, nambu jombi nde joandumike.
8.43: Bho, mbona ngachemughamanya aghagha ghanumpwaghila? Nde kwa kubha mwehapa ngachempala kughajowanela mabholu ghangu.
8.44: Mwehapa nde mabhana bha atati winu Shetani, na mpala pe kuhenga matokulelu gha atati winu. Jombi akabhi wa kukoma bhandu kutumbu pamwandi, na wala ngacheakajemi mu upambala wa chakaka, na chakaka ngachejibhili mkati jake. Paalonge upuhe, alongela ghaghabhi ghaki mweni, kwa ndandi jombi nde mpuhe, na atati wa upuhe.
8.45: Kwa ndandi nepani numpwaghi chakaka, nambu mwehapa ngachemnihobhalela.
8.46: Bho, mundu bholi pachilanda jinu joaweza kulangiha kubha nepani mili na mahoku? Na ngati nongela chakaka, bho, mbona ngachemnihobhalela?
8.47: Jombi joabhi waka Chapanga aghajowana malobhi ghaka Chapanga, bhela mwehapa ngachenjowanela kwa ndandi mwehapa nga mabhandu bhaka Chapanga.” Yesu nde nkolongwa kupeta Ibulahimu
8.48: Bhayahude bhakamuyangiki Yesu, “Bho, tepani ngachetupwagha chakaka kubha wehapa nde Msamalia, na kabheti ubhi na lijobhe?”
8.49: Yesu akayangike, “Nepani ngachemi na lijobhe. Nepani nuntopela Atati wangu, na mwehapa muheketa utopelu wangu.
8.50: Nepani ngachenonda ulumbalilu wangu, nambu abhi jumu joanondela ulumbalilu wango.
8.51: Chakaka numpwaghila, mundu anaalikamwili lilobhi langu, ngayipoteli mileli.”
8.52: Bhela Bhayahude bhakumpwaghile, “Sajenu tumanyi kubha wehapa ubhi na lijobhe. Ibulahimu apotile, na bhalota bhaka Chapanga bhapotile, na wehapa upwagha kubha, ‘Mundu anaalikamwi lilobhi langu, ngayipoteli mileli.’
8.53: Bho, wehapa le unkolongwa kupeta atati witu Ibulahimu, ambaju apotile? Nabhombi bhalota bhaka Chapanga bhapotile. Bho, wehapa ulitenda kubha wa nane?”
8.54: Yesu akayangike, “Ananililumbalili namwete ulumbalilu wangu nga chindu. Joanumbali nepani nde Atati wangu, ambaju mwehapa mpwagha kubha nde Chapanga winu.
8.55: Wala mwehapa ngachemummanye, nambu nepani nummanye. Ngati anambwaghiki ngachenummanye, anangubha numpuhe ngati mwehapa. Nambu nummanye, na lilobhi laki nilikamula.
8.56: Atati winu, Ibulahimu, akahekalili kulibhona lichobha la kuhika kwangu, najombi akaliweni, na akahekalile.”
8.57: Bhela Bhayahude bhakumpwaghile, “Wehapa wakali ngacheuhikiki hyaka hamsini, bho, upwagha bhole kubha umbweni Ibulahimu?”
8.58: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Chakaka, numpwaghila, mangani jaka Ibulahimu kubhelakeka, ‘Nepani mile.’ ”
8.59: Bhela bhakatondwili maganga nahuli kundapula, nambu Yesu akalihiiki, na kupita pa Nyumba jaka Chapanga, na kubhoka.

9.1: Yesu paakabhi apeta, akumbweni mundu joakabhi ngalola kutumbu kubhelakeka.
9.2: Bhabhulwa bhaki bhakundalukili bhakapwaghaje, “Mbola, bho, nane joatendiki mahoku, mundu ajoju au bhabheleka bhaki, mbaka abhelakika ngalola?”
9.3: Yesu akayangike, “Hajoju ngacheatendiki mahoku, wala bhabheleka bhaki, nambu akabhelakiki ngalola nahuli makili ghaka Chapanga ghabhonikanaje ghahenga lihengu mkati jaki.
9.4: Imbalika kuhenga mahengu ghaki jombi joandumike. Koni kwakali muhi, ikilu jihika, kwanga kuweza mundu kutenda lihengu.
9.5: Chikahi chemili pundema, nepani nde unang'anu wa ndema.”
9.6: Paakajomwi kulongela ghanihagha, Yesu akahuniki imata pahi, akatendiki litopi kwa imata ghala, na kumpaka ngalola jola litopi mumihu,
9.7: na kumpwaghila, “Ujendaje ukachamba machi ku litanda la Siloamu. Silohamu ndandi jaki joatumakike.” Bhela akapiti, na kuchamba machi, na kukelabhuka koni akabya alola.
9.8: Bhela bhandu bha pambipi jaki, na bhala bhabhakumbweni mwandi kubha akabhi njopajopa, bhakapwaghike, “Bho, hajoju le nga jola joakabhi akatamaje na kujopajopa?”
9.9: Bhangi bhakapwaghike, “Nde jombe.” Bhangi bhakapwaghike, “Nga jombe! Nambu atehi pe kulengana naku.” Jombi mweni akapwaghike, “Nepani nde jombi.”
9.10: Bhela bhakundalukile, “Bho, mihu ghaku ghayekuliwi bhole?”
9.11: Jombi akabhayangike, “Mundu jola joalowakeka Yesu akatendiki litopi, akambakiki mumihu, na kumbwaghila, ‘Ujenda ku litanda la Siloamu, ukachamba machi kumihu.’ Bhela nakapiti, na kuchamba, na nakapatiki kulola.”
9.12: Bhakumpwaghile, “Bho, abhi kwaku jonihojo?” Akayangike, “Nepani ngachemanye!” Mafalisayo bhapala kumanya kulama kwaka ngalola
9.13: Bhela bhakumpeliki kwa Mafalisayo mundu jola joakabhi ngalola pamwandi.
9.14: Bhela lichobha heli Yesu paakalenganaki litopi na kughayekula mihu ghaka mundu hoju, lakabhi Lichobha la Sabato.
9.15: Bhela Mafalisayo bhakundaluki kabhete mundu jola ntundu bholi moapati kulola. Akabhapwaghile, “Akanyeghi litopi panani ja mihu, na nepani nakachambiki machi, na sajenu nola.”
9.16: Bhela Mafalisayo bhakumu bhakapwaghike, “Mundu hoju ngacheakahumiki kwaka Chapanga, kwa ndandi ngacheakamula Lichobha la Sabato.” Bhangi bhakapwaghike, “Bho, aweza bholi mundu mwana mahoku kutenda nginyulila ngati yeniheye?” Kukabhi na kulekana pachilanda jabhu.
9.17: Bhela bhakundaluki mundu jola joakabhi ngalola mala ja kabheli, “Bho, wehapa upwagha bholi malobhi ghaki kubhokana na moakuyekuli mihu ghako?” Jombi akapwaghike, “Jombi nde mlota waka Chapanga.”
9.18: Bhela ihongozi bha Bhayahude ngachebhahobhali malobhi ghaki, gha kubha akabhi ngalola, na akapatiki kulola, mbaka pabhakabhalohiki bhabheleka bhaki mundu jola joakapatiki kulola.
9.19: Bhakabhalalukili bhabheleka bhaki, “Bho, hajoju le mwana winu, jompwagha kubha akabhelakiki ngalola? Bho, henu apatiki bholi kulola?”
9.20: Bhabheleka bhaki bhakayangike, “Tumanya kubha hajoju nde mwana witu, na kabheti akabhelakiki ngalola.
9.21: Nambu ntundu moalole sajenu ngachetumanyi, jombi nde akolike, mundalukya jombi, anaalilongalya mwene!”
9.22: Bhabheleka bhaki bhakalongi ghanihagha kwa ndandi bhakabhi bhabhajoghopa Bhayahude, maghambu Bhayahude bhakabhi bhajomwi kujetanganela kubha mundu anaanjetakili kubha Yesu nde Kristo, anaatopuliwa kunja ja nyumba ja kuhimanganila.
9.23: Nde ndandi bhabheleka bhaki bhakapwaghiki, “Hajoju akolike, mundalukya jombe!”
9.24: Bhela bhakundohiki kabhete mala ja kabheli mundu jola joakabhelakiki ngalola, na kumpwaghila, “Umpekya Chapanga ulumbalilu! Tepani tumanyi kubha mundu hajoju joakulamihe nde mwana mahoku.”
9.25: Bhela mundu jola akayangike, “Kubha jombi nde mwana mahoku au nga mwana mahoku, ngachemanya. Nambu chindu chimu chemanya, kubha nakabhi ngalola, na sajenu nola.”
9.26: Bhela bhakumpwaghile, “Bho, akuhengi kike? Bho, akuyekwi mihu kwa indela bhole?”
9.27: Akabhapwaghile, “Nyomwi kumpwaghila, wala ngachenjowine. Bho, mbona mpala kujowana kabhete? Bho, Mabhanganya nanamu mpala kubha bhabhulwa bhake?”
9.28: Bhela bhakuntondwili, bhakapwaghaje, “Wehapa nde wa mbulwa waka mundu jola, nambu tepani nde bhabhulwa bhaka Musa.
9.29: Tepani tumanyi kubha Chapanga akalongili na Musa, nambu mundu jonijola ngachetumanyi koahumike!”
9.30: Mundu jola akayangike, “Haleli nde lijambu la kukangacha! Kubha mwehapa ngachemmanya koahuma, najombi akaniyekwi mihu!
9.31: Tumanya kubha Chapanga ngacheajowanela bhana mahoku, nambu mundu joanjoghopa Chapanga, na kughahenga mapalu ghaka Chapanga, anjowanela jonihoju.
9.32: Kutumbula kubhombakeka kwa ndema ngachetujowini kubha mundu andamihi jokapi jola joabhelakiki ngalola.
9.33: Ngati mundu hajoju ngacheakahumiki kwa Chapanga, ngaakaweziki kuhenga lihengu lokapi lela.”
9.34: Bhombi bhakayangike, “Wehapa ukabhelakiki na kukolela mu mahoku pela, bho, nanau utubhola tepani?” Bhakumpihiki kunja ja nyumba ja kuhimangani Bhayahude. Ungalolola wa Roho
9.35: Yesu akajowini kubha bhumpihiki kunja ja nyumba ja kuhimangani Bhayahude, najombi paakumbweni akumpwaghile, “Bho, wehapa le unhobhalela Mwana waka Chapanga?”
9.36: Mundu hoju akayangike, “Jombi nde nane, Bambo, nahuli mbata kunhobhalela?”
9.37: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Ujomwi kumbona, najombi nde joalongela na wehapa sajeno.”
9.39: Yesu akapwaghike, “Nepani nhikiki pundema ghongone kubhatemula bhandu, nahuli bhala bhangakulola bhalolaje, na bhala bhabhalola bhabya akangalola.”
9.40: Mafalisayo bhakumu bhabhakabhi papamu naku bhakajowini ghanighala, bhakumpwaghile, “Bho, tepani natatu tubhi le akangalola?”
9.41: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Ngati mwakabhi akangalola, ngamwakabhonakini kubha mbi na mahoku, nambu mwehapa mpwagha kubha ‘Tulola,’ bhela mbonikana kubha mbi na mahoku.”

10.1: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Chakaka, numpwaghila, jola jwangakujingila pundyangu mu libheghi la mambeleli, nambu akwela kwa kupetela pandu pangi, jonihoju nde mwihe najombi nde mnyaghula.
10.2: Nambu joajingila pundyangu, jonihoju nde mdima wa mambelele.
10.3: Mlonda wa pundyangu anhoghulela jonihoju, na mambeleli ghajowana sauti jake, najombi aghaloha mambeleli kwa mahina ghabhu, na kughapeleka kunja.
10.4: Najombi paaghapiha kunja mambeleli ghaki ghokapi, aghalongulela, na mambeleli ghala ghunjengalela, maghambu bhajimanya sauti jake.
10.5: Mambeleli hagha ngaghawezi kunjengalela ngeni ng'o, nambu anaghuntilaje, maghambu ngachebhajimanyi sauti jaka ngeni.”
10.6: Yesu akabhapwaghi ulenganesu aghoghu, nambu bhombi ngachebhamanyi mambu ghaakabhi abhapwaghila. Yesu Mdima wambone
10.7: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghi kabhete, “Chakaka, numpwaghila nepani nde ndyangu wa mambelele.
10.8: Bhokapi bhabhanongulile nde bhihe na bhanyaghula, nambu mambeleli ngacheghajowanile.
10.9: Nepani nde ndyangu. Mundu anaajingi kwangu nepani, anaakengalikaje, anaajingala na kupita, najombi anaapata malelelo.
10.10: Mwihi ahika pe kwa ndandi ja kujibha, kukoma, na kuyonanga. Nepani nakahikiki nahuli bhabya na womi, kabheti bhabya naku womi wamaheli.”
10.11: “Nepani nde mdima wambone. Mdima wambone aubhoha womi waki kwa ndandi ja mambelele.
10.12: Nambu mundu wa malepu, wala nga mdima wa mambelele, ambaju mambeleli nga ghake, paalibhona libweha lihika, aghaleka mambelele na mweni kutila. Na libweha lighakamula na kughapechangana.
10.13: Mundu hoju atila, wala ngacheaghajali mambelele, kwa ndandi abhi mundu wa malepu pela.
10.14: Nepani nde mdima wambone, na naghamanya mambelele ghangu, na mambelele ghangu ghamanye.
10.15: Ngati bhela Atati moamanyi nepani, na nepani monimmanyi Atati. Na nepani niubhoha womi wangu kwa ndandi ja mambelele.
10.16: Na mili kabheti na mambeleli ghangi, ghaghu nga gha libheghi lendeno, na ghanihagha naghombe imbalika kughaleta, na sauti jangu anabhajowanaje, na bhela anakukubhaje na lipogha limu na mdima jumu.”
10.17: “Atati wangu ambala nepani, maghambu nubhoha womi wangu, nahuli nupataje kabhete.
10.18: Nga mundu joamokela womi wangu, nambu nepani nubhoha namwete. Mili na lujiniku lwa kuubhoha, na mili na lujiniku lwa kuukelebhuha kabhete. Anana nde Atati wangu moanaghalakile nhengaje.”
10.19: Kukabhi kabheti na ughabhaniku wa Bhayahude, kwa ndandi ja malobhi ghanihagha.
10.20: Bhamaheli bhabhu bhakapwaghike, “Hajoju abhi na lijobhe, na kabheti mwanamangongo! Bho, maghambu kiki munjowanela?”
10.21: Bhangi bhakapwaghike, “Malobhi ghanihagha nga ghaka mundu joabhi na lijobhe. Bho, lijobhi liweza kaghayeku mihu ghaka ngalola?” Yesu akanakika na Bhayahude
10.22: Bhela ku Yelusalemu hoku kukabhili na Uwangalalu wa kubheka wakifu Nyumba jaka Chapanga, na chikahi hechi chakabhi chikahi cha imbepu.
10.23: Yesu akabhi akajendajenda mu Nyumba jaka Chapanga, mu liwangala laka Solomoni.
10.24: Bhela Bhayahude bhakamuyongalwiti, na kumpwaghila, “Bho, mbaka lile anautung'ahaje mitima jitu? Ngati wehapa nde wa Kristo, utupwaghila hotuhotu.”
10.25: Yesu akabhayangike, “Numpwaghile, nambu mwehapa ngachemuhobhalela. Mahengu ghangani ghanihenga kwa lihina la Atati wangu, nde ghaghanandila.
10.26: Nambu mwehapa ngachemuhobhalela, maghambu mwehapa ngachembili mu mambeleli ghangu.
10.27: Mambeleli ghangu ghajowana sauti jangu. Nanatu naghamanye, naghombi ghanyengalela.
10.28: Nanatu naghapekeha womi wa mileli, wala ngaghapoteli ng'o. Kabheti nga mundu joaweza kubhanyaghula kuhuma mu mabhoku ghangu.
10.29: Atati wangu, joambeki bhanihabha, nde nkolongwa kupeta bhokapi, kabheti nga mundu joaweza kubhanyaghula kuhuma mumabhoku gha Atati wangu.
10.30: Nepani na Atati wangu tubhi jumu.”
10.31: Bhela Bhayahude bhakatondwi maganga kabheti nahuli bhundapulaje.
10.32: Yesu akabhayangike, “Mahengu ghamboni ghamaheli nundangihe, ghaghahuma kwa Atati wangu, bho, kwa ndandi ja lihengu bhole pamahengu ghanihagha mpala kunapula kwa maganga?”
10.33: Bhayahude bhakamuyangike, “Ngechetukulapu maganga kwa ndandi ja mahengu ghambone, nambu kwa ndandi ja kutondola, na kwa ndandi wehapa weubhi wa mundu, ulitenda wamwete kubha nde Chapanga.”
10.34: Yesu akabhayangike, “Bho, ngacheilembakiki mu Shelia hinu kubha, ‘Nepani nakapwaghiki, kubha mwehapa nde ichapanga?’
10.35: Ngati akabhalohiki ichapanga, bhala bhalakabhahiki Lilobhi laka Chapanga, naghombi Malembu Mahuhu ghapwagha chakaka machobha ghokapi,
10.36: henu jola ambaju Atati akungolwili na kuntuma pundema, maghambu kiki mbwaghi kubha nuntondola Chapanga, pambwagha, ‘Nepani nde Mwana waka Chapanga?’
10.37: Ngati ngachenhenga mahengu gha Atati wangu, ngamwinhobhalela.
10.38: Nambu ananaghahenga, hata ngati ngachemunihobhalela nepani, mughahobhalyaje mahengu ghanihagha nahuli mpataje kumanya, na kuhobhalela, kubha Atati abhi mkati jangu, na nepani mili mkati ja Atati.”
10.39: Bhela bhakapaliki kabheti kunkamula, nambu Yesu akabhokiki mu mabhoku ghabhu.
10.40: Yesu akapiti kabhete kwihi ja nkoka Yoludani, pandu Yohana Mbatizaje paakabhi abatiza pakutumbula hapa, na kutama konihoku.
10.41: Bhandu bhamaheli bhakunjendi Yesu, na kupwagha, “Yohana ngacheakatendiki ngangachu jokapi jela, nambu mambu ghokapi Yohana ghaakalongili panani jaka mundu hajoju ghakabhi gha chakaka.”

11.1: Bhela mundu jumu joakalowakiki Lazalo akabhi mtamwa. Jombi akabhi atama ku Besania, mwenehi wa chijiji cheatamika Malia na ndombu waki Masa.
11.2: Jonihoju akabhi nde Malia jola joakampakiki Bambo mahuta gha kunungila wichu, na kughahungula magholu ghaki kwa majunju ghaki. Lazalo mbeli waka Malia akabhi mtamwa.
11.3: Bhela bhalombu bhaki bhabheli bhala bhakatumiki ubholu kwaka Yesu, na kumpwaghila, “Bambo, nkochi waku joumpala jola atenda kulwala.”
11.4: Yesu paakajowini ghanihagha, akapwaghike, “Chitamu achechi nga cha kupotela, nambu kwa ndandi ja ulumbalilu waka Chapanga, nahuli Mwana waka Chapanga alumbalikaje mu chitamu chenihechi.”
11.5: Bhela Yesu akumpaliki Masa, Malia, na Lazalo.
11.6: Yesu paakajowini kubha Lazalo nde mtamwa, akajendali kutama pandu panipala kwa machobha ghabheli nakanopi.
11.7: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhaki, “Tujendaje kabhete ku Yudea!”
11.8: Bhabhulwa bhaki bhakumpwaghile, “Mbola, kwichu kwichu pela Bhayahude bhakapaliki kukulapula kwa maganga, bho, nanau upala kujenda kabheti konihoko?”
11.9: Yesu akabhayangike, “Bho, Masaa gha muhi nga komi na ghabhele? Mundu anaajenda muhi ngachealikobhandola, maghambu aubhona unang'anu wa ndema ghone.
11.10: Nambu anaajendiki ikilu alikobhandola, maghambu unang'anu ngacheubhi mkati jake.”
11.11: Yesu paakajomwi kupwagha malobhi ghanihagha, akabhapwaghile, “Nkochi witu Lazalo aghonile, nambu nepani ananyenda kunjumuwa.”
11.12: Bhabhulwa bhaki bhakumpwaghile, “Bambo, anangati aghoni lughonu pela, anaalamaje.”
11.13: Yesu akabhi alongalela mambu gha kupotela kwaka Lazalo, nambu bhombi bhaholakya apwagha kubha Lazalo aghoni lughonu pela.
11.15: Nambu kwa ndandi jinu nhekalela kwa kubha ngachenakabhi konihoko, nahuli mpata kuhobhalela, nambu sajenu tujendaje kwake.”
11.16: Bhela Tomaso, joalowakika Mapaha, akabhapwaghi bhabhulwa bhajaki, “Tujendaje na tepani, nahuli tukapotilaje papamu na Yesu!” Yesu nde uyohakeku na wome
11.17: Bhela Yesu paakahikiki konihoku, akunketani Lazalo kubha ajomwi kutaghakika mulitengeli kwa machobha ncheche.
11.18: Na chijiji cha Besania chakabhi pambipi na Yelusalemu, utali waki ukabhi ngati kilometa itatu.
11.19: Bhayahude bhamaheli bhakabhi bhahikike kwaka Masa na Malia, nahuli kubhajeghe mtima kwa ndandi jaka mbeli wabhu.
11.20: Bhela Masa paakajowini kubha Yesu atenda kuhika, akapiti kunjopalela, nambu Malia akahighali atami kunyumba.
11.21: Masa akumpwaghi Yesu, “Bambo, ngati wehapa ukabhi pambane, mbeli wangu ngaakapotile.
11.22: Nambu hata sajenu manyi kubha, chokapi chewandobhaje Chapanga, Chapanga anaakupekyaje.”
11.24: Masa akumpwaghile, “Manyi kubha anaayokaje pa uyohakeku wa bhakuwa mu lichobha la kujomukela.”
11.25: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Nepani nde uyohakeku hoghu, na nde nenabhapekeha bhandu womi. Mundu jokapi joanhobhale nepani, hata ngati anaapotile, anaakubha atama,
11.26: na kila mundu joatama na kunhobhalela nepani ngaapoteli mileli. Bho, uhobhalela ghanihagha?”
11.27: Masa akumpwaghile, “Ena, Bambo, nepani nhobhalela kubha wehapa nde wa Kristo, Mwana waka Chapanga, jola joahika pani pundema.” Yesu alela mahole
11.28: Yesu paakajomwi kulongela ghanihagha, Masa akapiti kundoha Malia ndombu waki pandu pa kanjika, na kumpwaghila, “Mbola ahikike, na akulowa.”
11.29: Malia paakajowini, akajemiki manyata, na kujenda mbaka paakabhi Yesu.
11.30: Yesu akabhi ngacheahikiki mkati ja chijiji, nambu akabhi akali pandu pala Masa paakunjopalile.
11.31: Bhela Bhayahude bhabhabhi panyumba pala na Malia, bhakunjeghala mtima, pabhakumbweni Malia ntundu moakajemi manyata na kubhoka, bhakunjengalile. Koni bhakaholakya kubha ajenda kumatengeli nahuli alela konihoku.
11.32: Bhela Malia paakahikiki pandu pala paakabhi Yesu, na kumbona, akachikimi pamagholu ghaka Yesu, na kumpwaghila, “Bambo, ngati ukabhi pambane, mbeli wangu ngaakapotile!”
11.33: Yesu paakumbweni Malia alela, na Bhayahude bhaakalongini naku bhala nabhombi bhalela, Yesu ukambiniki mtima waki, na kung'ahakika muntima waki,
11.34: akapwaghike, “Bho, mumbekiki kwako?” Bhakumpwaghile, “Bambo, uhika ulingaje.”
11.36: Bhela Bhayahude bhakapwaghike, “Ndingalyaje ntundu moakumpali Lazalo!”
11.37: Nambu bhangi bhabhu bhakapwaghike, “Bho, hajoju joakamuyekwi mihu ngalola, ngacheakaweziki kuntenda na Lazalo ngayipotela?” Yesu amuhyoha Lazalo
11.38: Bhela Yesu akabya kabhete umbina mtima waki, akahikiki palitengeli. Litengeli heli lakabhi likolo, na liganga lakabhi libhekakiki panani jaki.
11.39: Yesu akapwaghike, “Mulibhoha liganga!” Masa ndombu waka jola joapotile, akumpwaghile, “Bambo, kwa sajenu atumbwi kununga, kwa ndandi abhi ntuhi kwa machobha ncheche!”
11.40: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Bho, nepani ngachenukupwaghile kubha ngati anauhobhalela, anaubhona ulumbalilu waka Chapanga?”
11.41: Bhela bhakalibhohiki liganga lela. Na Yesu akalingalili kunani kumahunde, na kupwagha, “Atati, nukuchengula kwa ndandi unyowine.
11.42: Nanatu nakamanyi kubha wehapa unyowana machobha ghokapi, nambu kwa ndandi ja bhandu bhabhajemiki pambani nakapwaghiki ghanihagha, nahuli bhandu bhabhabhi pambane, bhapata kuhobhalela kubha wehapa nde weundumike.”
11.43: Najombi paakajomwili kulongela ghanihagha, Yesu akaleliki kwa sauti ngolongwa, “Lazalo, uhikaje koni kunja!”
11.44: Na jola joakapotile akapitiki kunja, koni akabya akongakiki sanda mumagholu na mumabhoku, na pamihu jaki. Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Mumbopulaje, na mundekaje ajendaje.” Njama ja kunkoma Yesu Matayo 26:1-5; Mako 14:1-2; Luka 22:1-2
11.45: Bhela Bhayahude bhamaheli bhabhakabhi bhahikiki kwaka Malia, na kughabhona mambu ghala ghaakahengiki Yesu, bhakunhobhalile.
11.46: Nambu bhakumu bhabhu bhakapiti kwa Mafalisayo, na kubhapwaghila mambu ghokapi ghaakahengiki Yesu.
11.47: Bhela ihongozi bha bhapenganyambiku papamu na Mafalisayo bhakahengiki uhimanganu wa Pachengu Pakolongwa pa Bhayahude, na kupwagha, “Bho, tuhenga kike? Maghambu mundu hajoju ahenga nginyulila yamaheli nakanopi!
11.48: Ngati anatundekiki ajendalya kuhenga bhenibhela, bhandu bhokapi anabhunhobhalyaje, na bhakolongwa bha Bhaloma anabhahikaje na kutubhokela pandu pitu na litaifa litu.”
11.49: Mundu jumu pachilanda jabhu, joalowakika Kayafa, joakabhi Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa chaka chela, akabhapwaghile, “Mabhanganya ngachemulimanyi lilobhi lokapi lela!
11.50: Bho, ngachemuholalela kubha nde mbanga mundu jumu kupotela kwa ndandi ja bhandu bhokapi, kuliku bhandu bhokapi bha litaifa litu kuyonangeka?”
11.51: Ngacheakalongili ghanihagha kwa maholalelu ghaki mweni, nambu kwa ndandi akabhi Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa chaka chela, akalotiki kubha Yesu anaapotilaje kwa ndandi ja litaifa la Bhayahude.
11.52: Wala nga kwa ndandi ja Bhayahude pela, nambu papamu na hagha abhabhonganaje bhana bhaka Chapanga bhabhapechangine, nahuli bhabya bhamu.
11.53: Bhela kutumbula lichobha lela ihongozi bha Bhayahude bhakajongini kunkoma Yesu.
11.54: Bhela Yesu ngacheakajendiki kabhete kwa palanga pachilanda ja Bhayahude, nambu akabhokiki konihoku, na kujenda pandu pambipi na lipololu, mbaka ku muchi ghoulowakeka Efulaimu, na kutama konihoku papamu na bhabhulwa bhaki.
11.55: Chikahi cha Uwangalalu wa Pasaka ja Bhayahude jakabhi jiheghalile, na bhandu bhamaheli bhakabhi bhakwela kuhuma kumighonda na kujenda ku Yelusalemu, nahuli kuligholola kwa ndandi ja kunjojabhela Chapanga mangani ja kuhika Pasaka.
11.56: Bhela bhakabhi bhundonda Yesu, bhakalaluhini koni bhakabya bhajemanile mu liwangala la Nyumba jaka Chapanga, “Bho, mbona bhole? Bho, ibhonikana kubha ngaahiki ng'o pauhangalalu ghone?”
11.57: Bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa papanu na Mafalisayo bhakabhi bhabhohiki amuli ja kubha anangati mundu amanyi paabhi Yesu, aleta ubholu, nahuli bhapata kunkamula.

12.1: Machobha sita mangani ja Uwangalalu wa Pasaka, Yesu akapiti ku Besania, koatamika Lazalo ambaju Yesu akamuhyohiki kuhuma kwa bhakuwa.
12.2: Konihoku bhakumbeki chilebhi cha chimihi, najombi Masa akabhi abhatumakila. Lazalo akabhi jumu wa bhala bhabhakabhi bhakula papamu na Yesu.
12.3: Bhela Malia akatoliki nusu lita ja mahuta ghaghanungila wichu ghaghalenganakiki kwa nkongu wa nalido ja mbiya yamaheli, na kumpaka mumagholu ghaka Yesu na kunhungula kwa majunju ghaki. Nyumba jokapi jakatweli unungilu wa mahuta ghanihagha.
12.4: Henu Yuda Isikalioti, jumu wa bhabhulwa komi na bhabheli, jonihoju nde joanaang'anambuka Yesu, akapwaghike,
12.5: “Bho, maghambu kiki manungilu ghanihagha ngacheghakahemaliwi kwa ipandi mia tatu yeilenganakiki kwa madini gha feza, na mbija yene kubhapekeha bhahocho?”
12.6: Yuda akapwaghiki bhenibhela, nga kwa ndandi ja kubhabhonela chiha bhahocho, nambu kwa ndandi akabhi mwihi. Maghambu jombi nde joakabhi abheka mfuku wa mbija, najombi akabhi ajibha yela yeyabhekakiki monihomu.
12.7: Nambu Yesu akapwaghike, “Ngamung'aha mabhu hoju! Mundekaje aghabhekaje kwa ndandi ja lichobha la kutaghakika kwangu.
12.8: Kwa ndandi bhahocho mbinabhu machobha ghokapi, nambu ngankubhi na nepani machobha ghokapi.” Njama ja kunkoma Lazalo
12.9: Bhayahude bhamaheli bhakajowini kubha Yesu akabhi ku Besania. Henu, bhakahikiki konihoku nga kwa ndandi ja kumbona Yesu pela, nambu bhumbona kabheti na Lazalo, ambaju Yesu akamuhyohiki kuhuma kwa bhakuwa.
12.10: Nambu ihongozi bha bhapenganyambiku bhakatendiki njama ja kunkoma kabhete Lazalo,
12.11: maghambu kwa ndandi jaki Bhayahude bhamaheli bhakabhakaniki ihongozi bhabhu, na kunhobhale Yesu. Yesu ajingi ku Yelusalemu kwa chiheku Matayo 21:1-11; Mako 11:1-11; Luka 19:28-40
12.12: Chilabhu jaki lipogha la bhandu bhabhakahikiki kwa ndandi ja Uwangalalu wa Pasaka, bhakajowini kubha Yesu abhi mwindela kuhika ku Yelusalemu.
12.13: Bhela bhakatoliki mambandi gha mikongu ja mitende, na kujenda kumpengana, na kujamalila bhakapwaghaje, “Chapanga apengalikaje! Apengalika jonihoju joahika kwa lihina laka Bambo! Apengalikaje Nkolongwa wa Izilaeli!”
12.14: Yesu akapatiki mwanaliponda jumu, na kukwela na kutama panani jaki, ngati moghalembakike mu Malembelu Mahuhu,
12.15: “Ngamwijoghopa bhandu bha muchi wa Sayuni! Lingalyaje, Nkolongwa waku ahika, akweliki mwanaliponda.”
12.16: Bhabhulwa bhaka Yesu ngachebhakamanyi mambu ghanihagha hoti, nambu Yesu paakahyokike kuhuma kwa bhakuwa na paakalumbaliki, panihapa nde bhabhulwa bhaki bhakakombwiki kubha mambu ghanihagha ghakabhi ghalembakiki kwa ndandi jaki, na kubha bhakuntendi jombi.
12.17: Lipogha la bhandu bhala bhabhakabhi papamu na Yesu chikahi paandohika Lazalo kuhuma mulitengeli, na kumuhyoha kuhuma kwa bhakuwa, bhakabhalandi bhandu mambu ghala ghaghapitalile.
12.18: Kwa ndandi jeniheji lipogha la bhandu lakapiti kumpengana, maghambu bhakajowini kubha Yesu akahengiki ngangachu jeniheji.
12.19: Bhela Mafalisayo pabhakaghaweni ghanihagha bhakapwaghanile, “Mbona? Bho, ngatuwezi kutenda chokapi? Lingalyaje, bhandu bhokapi pundema bhunjengale jombi.” Bhagiliki bhakumu bhapala kumbona Yesu
12.20: Kukabhi na Bhagiliki bhakumu pachilanda ja bhala bhabhahikiki ku Yelusalemu kujojabhela chikahi cha Uwangalalu wa Pasaka.
12.21: Bhanihabha bhakunjendi Filipo, mwenehi wa ku Betisaida ja inchi ja ku Galilaya, na kundobha, bhakapwaghaje, “Nkolongwa, tepani tupala kumbona Yesu.”
12.22: Filipo akapiti kumpwaghi Andulea, kabheti Andulea na Filipo bhakumpwaghi Yesu.
12.23: Yesu akabhayangike, “Lisaa la kulumbalika kwaka Mwana waka Mundu lihikike!
12.24: Numpwaghi chakaka, imbeju ya ingano nangakuhabhuka paluhombi na kuwa, ihighalila ngati imbeju kanjika jaki. Nambu ngati anaihawiki pahi na kuwa, jibheleka imbeju yamaheli.
12.25: Mundu jokapi joaghapala matamu ghaki anaaghahobhihaje, na mundu jokapi joaghahobheha matamu ghaki mu ndema ghoni anaaghakengalyaje hata womi wa mileli.
12.26: Mundu jokapi joapala kundumakila, impalika anyengalyaje, na nepani pamili, panihapa nde na mtumika wangu payibyaje. Kabheti mundu jokapi joandumakila nepani, Atati wangu anaampekya utopelu. Yesu alongela panani ja kupotela kwaki
12.27: “Sajenu roho jangu jing'ahika, bho, henu mbwagha kike? ‘Atati, ungengalyaje mu chikahi chenu!’ Nambu nde kwa ndandi ja ghanihagha nakahikiki nahuli naghapetilaje mang'ahiku gha chikahi chenu.
12.28: Atati ulilumbalyaje lihina laku!” Panihapa sauti kuhuma kunani kumahunde jakapwaghike, “Nililumbalile, na ananililumbalya kabhete.”
12.29: Lipogha la bhandu bhabhakabhi pandu pala bhakajowini sauti jela, na bhakumu bhabhu bhakapwaghike, “Jeniheji nde sauti ja kulundamila kwa chitobhi.” Nambu bhangi bhakapwaghiki, “Mtumika wa kunani kwaka Chapanga atehi kulongela naku!”
12.30: Nambu Yesu akabhayangiki, “Sauti jeniheji ngachejabhili kwa ndandi jangu nepani, nambu kwa ndandi jinu mwehapa.
12.31: Sajenu nde chikahi cha kutemuliwa kwa ndema ghoni, henu Shetani, nkolongwa wa ndema ghoni anaalekalikaje kunja.
12.32: Nambu nepani panikwehakikaje kunani kuhuma pundema, ananabhahutaje bhandu bhokapi bhahikaje kwangu.”
12.33: Yesu akapwaghiki ghanihagha akalangiya kubha anapotilaje kwa ntundu bhole.
12.34: Bhela lipogha la bhandu lela lakalapwili njobhela lakapwaghaje, “Tujowini mu Shelia jitu kubha Kristo anatama mileli. Bho, uweza bholi henu kupwagha kubha impalika Mwana waka Mundu kujinuliwa kunani? Bho, henu Mwana waka Mundu nde nane?”
12.35: Yesu akapwaghike, “Unang'anu wakona ubhi na mwehapa kwa chikahi kichokope. Njendaje koni mbili na unang'anu, nahuli lwihi ngalwampata, maghambu joajenda mulwihi ngacheamanya koajenda.
12.36: Bhela kwa ndandi mbili na unang'anu, muuhobhalyaje unang'anu hoghu, nahuli mpata kubha mabhana bha unang'anu.” Bhandu ngachebhabhi na uhobhalelu Paakajomwi kulonge ghanihagha, Yesu akabhokike, na kulihiya nahuli ngabhumbona.
12.37: Nambu Yesu papamu na kutenda ngangachu hayeyi yokapi palongi jabhu, bhombi ngachebhunhobhalile.
12.38: Nahuli ghapata kupitalila malobhi ghaakapwaghiki mlota Isaya, “Bambo, bho, nde nane joakauhobhalile ubholu wito? Na bho, nde nane joayekuliwi makili ghaka Bambo?”
12.39: Ndemana bhombi ngachebhahobhalile, kwa ndandi Isaya akapwaghiki kabhete,
12.40: “Chapanga abhatendiki akangalola, ajitendiki kunonopa mitima jabhu, ngabhilola kwa mihu ghabhu, ngabhimanya kwa mitima jabhu, wala ngabhing'anambuka, nahuli mbata kubhalamiha, apwagha Bambo.”
12.41: Mlota Isaya akapwaghiki malobhi ghanihagha kwa ndandi akauweni ulumbalilu waka Yesu, na akapwaghiki malobhi ghaki.
12.42: Hata bhela, bhamaheli pachilanda ja ihongozi bha Bhayahude bhakunhobhali Yesu. Nambu kwa ndandi ja Mafalisayo, ngachebhakapwaghiki palanga, kwa kujoghopa kubhatopola mu nyumba ya kuhimangani Bhayahude.
12.43: Kwa ndandi bhombi bhakapaliki ulumbalilu wa bhandu kuliku ulumbalilu waka Chapanga. Malobhi ghaka Yesu anaghatemula bhandu
12.44: Yesu akajamalila kwa sauti ngolongwa, akapwaghaje, “Mundu joanhobhalela nepani, ngacheanhobhale nepani pela, nambu bhelabhela anhobhalela jola joandumike.
12.45: Na jola joaningali nepani andingali jola joandumike.
12.46: Nepani nhikiki nahuli mya unang'anu wa pundema, nahuli kila mundu joanhobhale nepani ngayitama mulwihi.
12.47: Na ngati mundu anaaghajowini malobhi ghangu, nambu ngacheaghakamula, nepani ngachenuntemula. Maghambu ngachenhikiki kuutemula ndema, nambu kuukengalela ndema.
12.48: Mundu joangana nepani, jwangakughahobhalela malobhi ghangu, abhi na wa kuntemula. Lilobhi heli lenilipwaghiki nde lelantemulaje mu lichobha la kujomukela.
12.49: Maghambu nepani ngachenapwaghiki kwa ndandi ja lujiniku lwangu, nambu Atati joandumiki, nde joanaghalakili cha kupwagha na ntundu monipwaghilaje.
12.50: Nanatu manyi kubha amuli yaki ileta womi wa mileli. Bhela nepani nongela malobhi ghala pela ghaanaghalakili Atati.”

13.1: Bhela, mangani ja lichobha la Uwangalalu wa Pasaka. Yesu akamanyi kubha chikahi chaki cha kubhoka pundema na kujenda kwa Atati waki chakabhi chihikike, akabhi abhapaliki bhandu bhaki bhabhabhi pundema, akabhapaliki mbaka pakujomukela.
13.2: Henu Yesu na bhabhulwa bhaki bhakabhi bhatemi kula chilebhi cha chimihi. Shetani akajomwi kunjeghela Yuda, mwana waka Simoni Isikalioti, maholalelu gha kung'anambuka Yesu.
13.3: Yesu akamanyi kubha Atati abhekiki hindu yokapi mu makili ghaki, na kubha jombi akahumiki kwaka Chapanga, na akelabhuka kwaka Chapanga,
13.4: akabhokiki pachilebhi, na kubhoha ingobhu jaki ja kunja na kubheka punkeghi, akatoliki chitambala, na kulikonga muchibhunu.
13.5: Panihapa akajeghi machi mu likalahi, na kutumbu kubhagholola bhabhulwa bhaki magholu, na kughahungula kwa chitambala chela cheakakongiki muchihunu.
13.6: Paakahikiki kwaka Simoni Petulu, Petulu akapwaghike, “Bambo, bho, wehapa anaung'olula nepani magholu?”
13.7: Yesu akamuyangiki, “Chendenda sajenu ngauchimanye, nambu anauchimanya palonge.”
13.8: Petulu akumpwaghile, “Wehapa ngaung'ololi nepani magholu ng'o!” Yesu akamuyangike, “Ngati nganukughololi magholu, wehapa ngaukubhi wa mbulwa wangu.”
13.9: Simoni Petulu akamuyangike, “Bambo, ung'olulaje, nga magholu pela, nambu papamu na mabhoku ghangu na mmutu wangu bhelabhela!”
13.10: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Mundu joajomwi kujogha hyegha jokapi apalika kugholola magholu pela, maghambu ajomwi kunyamba hyegha jokapi. Mwehapa mnyambike, nambu nga mabhokape.”
13.11: Yesu akamanyi jola joanaang'anambukaje, nde ndandi akapwaghiki, “Mwehapa mnyambike, nambu nga mabhokape.”
13.12: Yesu paakajomwi kubhagholola magholu bhabhulwa bhaki, akawatiki kabhete ingobhu jaki ja kunja na kukelabhuka na kutama kabhete, na kubhalalukila, “Bho, mmanyi ghanuntendile?”
13.13: “Mwehapa mnoha Mbola na Bambo, nanamu mpwagha wichu, maghambu nde momelile.
13.14: Henu anakubhi nepani, nemi Bambo winu na Mbola winu, nungolwili mwehapa magholu, impalika na mwehapa kugholulana magholu mabheti kwa mabheti.
13.15: Kwa ndandi nepani numpeki ulenganesu, nahuli na mwehapa mtendaje ngati nepani monuntendile.
13.16: Numpwaghi Chakaka, mtumika nga nkolongwa kumpeta bambo waki, wala mtumi nga nkolongwa kumpeta jola joantumike.
13.17: Anamughamanyi mambu ghanihagha, mbanga kwinu mwehapa ngati anamughatendike.
13.18: “Ngachembwagha kwinu mwehapa mabhokapi. Nepani nabhamanyi bhala bhanabhahawile. Nambu nahuli ghapitalyaje Malembu Mahuhu ghaghapwagha, ‘Jola joakuliki chilebhi changu, atehi kuning'anambuka.’
13.19: Nepani numpwaghili mambu ghanihagha sajenu mangani ngacheghapitalile, nahuli paghipitalyaje, mpata kuhobhalela kubha ‘Nepani nde Jombi.’
13.20: Numpwaghi Chakaka, mundu jokapi joanjopalela mundu jola jonumtumiki, anyopalela nepane. Na mundu jokapi joanyopalela nepane, anjopalela jombi joandumiki nepane.” Yesu alota ntundu mobhung'anambukyaje Matayo 26:20-25; Mako 14:17-21; Luka 22:21-23
13.21: Yesu paakajomwili kupwagha ghanihagha, akang'ahakiki mu roho jaki, akalandili hotuhotu, “Chakaka numpwaghila, jumu winu anaang'anambukaje.”
13.22: Bhabhulwa bhaki bhakalingalanili bheni kwa bheni, koni ngachebhamanyi kubha nde nane joandongalela.
13.23: Jumu wa bhabhulwa bhaki, ambaju Yesu akabhi ampala nakanopi, akabhi ajeghamakili pachihimba chaka Yesu.
13.24: Bhela Simoni Petulu akumpongi mbulwa jola chiwoku chaki, na kumpwaghila, “Undalukyaje, bho, ampwagha nane?”
13.25: Mbulwa hoju koni akabya ajeghamaki pachihimba chaka Yesu, akundalukile, “Bambo, bho, nde nane?”
13.26: Yesu akayangike, “Nde mundu jola jonampekyaje chipandi cha libumunda. Akatobhalili libumunda heli mumbale, na kumpekeha Yuda, mwana waka Simoni Isikalioti.”
13.27: Yuda paakajomwi kujopa chipandi cha libumunda heli, Shetani akunjingile. Bhela Yesu akumpwaghile, “Cheupala kuchihenga, uchihenga manyata!”
13.28: Wala nga mundu hata jumu wa bhala bhabhakabhi bhatemi pachilebhi joakamanyi ndandi kiki Yesu akumpwaghi bhenibhela.
13.29: Kwa kubha Yuda akabhi mbeka mbija, bhangi bhakaholali kubha Yesu akabhi ampwaghi akahemalaje hindu yeipalika kwa ndandi ja Uwangalalu wa Pasaka, au abhapekya bhahocho chokapi.
13.30: Yuda paakajomwi kujopa chipandi cha libumunda chela, palapala akapitiki kunja. Chikahi hechi kukabhi ikilu. Amuli Jahenu
13.31: Bhela Yuda paakajomwi kupita kunja, Yesu akapwaghike, “Sajenu Mwana waka Mundu alumbalike, najombi Chapanga alumbaliki mkati jaki.
13.32: Ngati Chapanga alumbaliki mkati jaka Mwana, Chapanga anaandumbalyaje Mwana mkati jaki mweni bhelabhela, najombi ngaakabhakile kundumbalila henu kateki.
13.33: Bhana bhango, chakona chikahi kichokopi mili na mwehapa. Anamunondaje nepani, na ngati monakabhapwaghile ihongozi bha Bhayahude kubha, ‘Nepani konyenda mwehapa ngamuwezi kuhika, bhelabhela sajenu numpwaghi mwehapa.’
13.34: Amuli jahenu numpekeha: Mpalanaje. Mpalanaje ngati nepani monumpali mwehapa.
13.35: Ngati anampalana mabheti kwa mabheti, bhandu bhokapi anabhamanyaje kubha mwehapa nde bhabhulwa bhangu.” Yesu alota kubha Petulu anaankanaje Matayo 26:31-35; Mako 14:27-31; Luka 22:31-34
13.36: Simoni Petulu akundalukile, “Bambo, bho, ujenda kwako?” Yesu akamuyangike, “Konyenda ngauwezi kunyengale sajenu, nambu anaunyengalyaje palongi.”
13.37: Petulu akundalukili kabhete, “Bambo, bho, maghambu kiki nepani nganiweza kukujengale sajenu? Nepani mi tayali kuubhoha womi wangu kwa ndandi jaku!”
13.38: Yesu akayangike, “Bho, chakaka le kubha wehapa anaubhoha womi waku kwa ndandi jangu? Chakaka nukupwaghila, mangani ja likongobhi ngachelibhekiki anaunganaje mala patatu.”

14.1: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Ngamwikubha na choghohi mumitima jinu, munhobhale Chapanga, mnihobhalya na nepani bhelabhela.
14.2: Munyumba ja Atati wangu kubhi na matamu ghamaheli, ikabhi ngabhela, nakabya numpwaghile. Ndandi nyenda kunhandalila matamu.
14.3: Ngati anambiti na kunhandalila matamu, ananhika kabhete, na kuntola mwehapa kwangu, nahuli pandu pamili nepani, na mwehapa mbyaje.
14.5: Tomaso akundalukile, “Bambo, tepani ngachetumanyi koujenda, bho, anatuweza bhole kujimanya indela?”
14.6: Yesu akayangike, “Nepani nde indela, chakaka na womi. Mundu ngacheaweza kuhika kwa Atati, nambu kwa kupetela kwangu nepani.
14.7: Ngati mkabhili mmanyi nepani, mkabya mummanyi na Atati wangu. Kutumbula sajenu mummanye, na kabhete mumbwene.”
14.8: Filipo akumpwaghile, “Bambo, utulangihaje Atati, chenihechi nde chetukipala.”
14.9: Yesu akayangike, “Filipo, ndemi na mwehapa kwa machobha ghamaheli, bho, nanau ngacheunimanye? Mundu jokapi joamweni nepani, ambweni Atati. Bho, henu wehapa uweza bhole kupwagha, ‘Utulangihaje Atati?’
14.10: Bho, ngacheuhobhalela kubha nepani mi mkati ja Atati, na Atati abhi mkati jangu nepane? Malobhi ghanumpwaghila ngachembwagha kwa ndandi jangu namwete, nambu Atati joatama mkati jangu, aghatenda mahengu ghake.
14.11: Mnihobhalyaje pambwagha kubha nepani mi mkati ja Atati, na Atati abhi mkati jangu nepani! Nangabhela muhobhalyaje kwa ndandi ja mahengu ghala ghanaghatenda.
14.12: Numpwaghila Chakaka, jokapi joanhobhalela nepani, mahengu ghanaghahenga nepani, najombi anaaghahengaje. Ena, na mahengu makolongwa nakanopi kupeta ghanihagha anahengaje, kwa ndandi nepani nyenda kwa Atati.
14.13: Chokapi chemwilobhaje kwa lihina langu, anandendaje, nahuli Atati alumbalikaje mkati jaka Mwana.
14.14: Anandobhiki chindu chokapi kupetela lihina langu, anandendaje. Chilanga chaka Roho Mhuhu
14.16: Nanatu ananundobhaje Atati, najombi anaampekyaje Mjangatila najongi, nahuli atamaje na mwehapa mileli.
14.17: Jombi nde Roho wa chakaka. Ambaju bhandu bha pundema ngabhawezi kunjopalela, kwa ndandi ngachebhumbona, wala ngachebhummanye. Nambu mwehapa anamummanyaje, kwa ndandi atama kwinu, najombi anaakubhaje mkati jinu.
14.18: “Nganundeki mwehapa ngati bhakebha, ananhika kabheti kwinu.
14.19: Chakona chikahi kichokopi, bhandu bha pundema ngabhimoni kabhete, nambu mwehapa anammonaje. Kwa ndandi nepani mi mwomi, na mwehapa anamkubha bhomi.
14.20: Lichobha lela palihikaje, mwehapa anammanyaje kubha nepani mi mkati ja Atati wangu, na mwehapa mkati jangu, na nepani mkati jinu.
14.21: “Mundu jola joabhi na amuli yangu na kuikamula, jonihoju nde joambala nepani. Najombi joambala nepani, anaapalakikaje na Atati wangu, na nepani ananumpalaje, na kulilangiha kwaki.”
14.22: Panihapa Yuda, nga jola Yuda Isikalioti, akumpwaghile, “Bambo, bho, kubhi bhole wehapa upala kulilangiha kwitu, na wala nga kwa bhandu bha pundema?”
14.23: Yesu akayangike, “Mundu jokapi joambala nepani, anaakamulaje malobhi ghangu, na Atati wangu anaampalaje, nepani na Atati wangu anatuhikaje kwaki, na kuhenga matamu kwaki.
14.24: Mundu jokapi jwangakumbala nepani, ngacheaghakamula malobhi ghangu. Na malobhi ghamughajowana nga ghangu, nambu ghahumiki kwa Atati joandumike.”
14.25: “Mambu ghanihagha nde ghanakumpwaghile, chikahi panakabhi ndama papamu na mwehapa.
14.26: Mjangatila hoju, nde Roho Mhuhu, ambaju Atati anaantumaje kupetela lihina langu, anaambolaje mambu ghokapi, na kunkombosha mambu ghokapi ghanumpwaghile.”
14.27: “Lukwale nundekela, lukwale lwangu numpekeha. Monumpeke nepani, nga ngati bhandu bha pundema mobhumpekeha. Ngamwing'ahika mumitima jinu, wala ngamwijoghopa.
14.28: Mkajowini kubha nepani nakumpwaghile, ‘Nyenda, na ananhika kabheti kwinu.’ Ngati mkabhi mbala, mkabya muhekalile, kwa ndandi nyenda kwa Atati, maghambu Atati nde nkolongwa kupeta nepani.
14.29: Numpwaghi mambu ghanihagha sajenu mangani ngacheghapitalile, nahuli paghipitalyaje mpata kuhobhalela.
14.30: Nepani nganongeli na mwehapa malobhi ghamaheli kabhete, maghambu Shetani, nkolongwa wa ndema ghoni ahika, nambu jonihoju ngacheabhi na chindu kwangu,
14.31: nambu bhandu bha pundema bhapata kumanya kubha numpala Atati. Ngati bhela Atati moanaghalakile, bhenibhela nde monhengela.” Haya njemanyaje, na tujendaje.

15.1: “Nepani nde mzabibu wa chakaka, na Atati wangu nde ndeme.
15.2: Kila limbandi mkati jangu langakupambika mapambiku, Atati wangu aliheketa. Na kila limbandi lelipambika mapambiku, Atati wangu alikulaghalila, nahuli lipambikaje mapambiku nakanopi.
15.3: Sajenu mwehapa njomwi kubha mwanyahi kwa ndandi ja malobhi ghala ghanakumpwaghile.
15.4: Mtamaje mkati jangu, na nepani mkati jinu. Ngati bhela limbandi molilepalela kupambika mapambiku kanjika jaki, nangakutama mkati ja mzabibu, bhelabhela na mwehapa ngamuwezi kupambika mapambiku, nangakutama mkati jangu.”
15.5: “Nepani nde mzabibu, na mwehapa nde mambandi. Joatama mkati jangu, na nepani mkati jaki, jonihoju apambika mapambiku nakanopi. Maghambu panga kubha nepani, mwehapa ngamuwezi kutenda chindu chokapi.
15.6: Mundu jokapi jwangakutama mkati jangu, anaalekalikaje kunja ngati limbandi na kunyala. Na bhandu anabhabhonganaje, na kughalekela pamoto, na kutinyika.
15.7: Ngati mwehapa anantami mkati jangu, na malobhi ghangu anaghatemi mkati jinu, ndobhaje chokapi chemchipala nanamu anampataje.
15.8: Bhela alumbalikaje Atati wangu, kwa bhela mompambaki mapambiku nakanopi, na kwa indela jeniheji anambya bhabhulwa bhangu.
15.9: Ngati Atati moambali nepani, nanatu monumpali mwehapa. Njendalyaje kutama mu upalu wangu.
15.10: Ngati anamkamwili amuli yangu, anamtamaje mu upalu wangu, ngati bhela nepani monikamulile amuli ya Atati wangu, na kutama mu upalu waki.
15.11: “Numpwaghili mambu ghanihagha, nahuli chiheku changu chibya mkati jinu, na chiheku chinu chikubhaje kamili.
15.12: Amuli jangu nde ajeji: Mpalanaye ngati nepani monumpali mwehapa.
15.13: Njeta mundu joabhi na upalu ukolongwa kupeta ghongone, mundu kuubhoha womi waki kwa ndandi ja bhakochi bhaki.
15.14: Mwehapa mbi bhakochi bhangu, ngati anantendiki ghanundaghalakile.
15.15: Nganundohi bhatumika kabhete, kwa ndandi mtumika ngacheamanya cheatenda bambo waki. Nambu mwehapa nundohiki bhakochi bhangu, maghambu numpwaghi mambu ghokapi ghanyowini kwa Atati wangu.
15.16: Nga mwehapa mwemunhawili nepani, nambu nepani nde nenunhawili mwehapa, nanatu numbekiki njenda mkapambikaje mapambiku, na mapambiku ghinu ghapataje kutamakila, nahuli lokapi lemundobha Atati kupetela lihina langu, ampekyaje.
15.17: Haghagha nundaghalaki mwehapa, nahuli mpalanaje.” Ndema ubhahakalila bhabhulwa
15.18: “Ngati bhandu bha pundema anabhunhakali mwehapa, mmanyi kubha bhakanhakali nepani mangane ja kunhakali mwehapa.
15.19: Ngati mkabhi bhandu bha pundema, ndema ukabya umpaliki bhabhabhi bhaki. Nambu kwa kubha mwehapa nga mabhandu bha pundema, nambu nepani nakunhawili kuhuma pundema, kwa ndandi jeniheji bhandu bha pundema bhunhakalila.
15.20: Nkombukaje malobhi ghangu ghanakumpwaghile, ‘Mtumika nga nkolongwa kupeta bambo waki. Ngati bhakang'ahiki nepani, anabhung'aha na mwehapa bhelabhela, na ngati bhakakamwi malobhi ghangu, anabhakamulaje na malobhi ghinu bhelabhela.’
15.21: Nambu ghanihagha ghokapi anabhuntendilaje mwehapa kwa ndandi ja lihina langu, maghambu ngachebhummanyi jombi joandumike.
15.22: Ngati nganakahikiki na kupwagha nabhu, ngabhakabhi na mahoku, nambu sajenu ngachebhabhili na cha kukopunganela kwa mahoku ghabhu.
15.23: Jola joanhakali nepani, anhakalila na Atati wangu bhelabhela.
15.24: Ngati nganakatendiki kwabhu mahengu ghangakughatenda mundu jongi jokapi, ngabhakabhi na mahoku. Nambu sajenu bhaweni ngangachu yenu na bhakali kutuhakalila nepani papamu na Atati wangu.
15.25: Nambu bhatendiki bhenibhela nahuli malobhi ghala ghaghalembakiki mu Shelia jabhu ghapitalyaje, ghaghapwagha, ‘Bhakanhakali waka.’ ”
15.26: “Nambu paanahikaje Mjangatila hoju, joananuntumaje kwinu kuhuma kwa Atati, yani, Roho Mhuhu wa chakaka joahuma kwa Atati, najombi anaanandilaje nepane.
15.27: Mwehapa nanamu mnandila, kwa ndandi mkabhi papamu na nepani kutumbu pakutumbula.”

16.1: “Numpwaghi mambu ghanihagha ghokapi, nahuli ngamwauleka uhobhalelu winu.
16.2: Bhandu anabhuntopula mwenga mu nyumba ya kuhimangani Bhayahude, na chikahi chihika kila mundu joanaankomaje akahambukya kubha antende Chapanga ibada.
16.3: Anabhuntendila mambu ghanihagha, kwa ndandi ngachebhummanyi Atati, wala nepani.
16.4: Nambu numpwaghili mambu ghanihagha, nahuli chikahi chela pachihikaje, mpata kukomboka kubha nyomwi kumpwaghila. Lihengu laka Roho Mhuhu “Ngachenumpwaghili mambu ghanihagha kutumbu pakutumbula, maghambu nakabhi papamu na mwehapa.”
16.5: Nambu sajenu nyenda kwaka jombi joandumike, na wala ngajoanalukila, “Bho, ujenda kwako?”
16.6: Nambu kwa ndandi numpwaghi mambu ghanihagha, mitima jinu jitwelili huzuni.
16.7: Nambu nepani numpwaghi chakaka, impalika mwehapa nepani mokaje, maghambu nangakubhoka nepani, Mjangatila hoju ngaahiki kwinu. Nambu nepani anambiti, ananuntuma kwinu.
16.8: Jombi paanahikaje, jonihoju anaabhalangiha bhandu bha pundema kubha maholalelu ghabhu nga manyahi panani ja mahoku, panani ja kujetakalewa palongi jaka Chapanga, na panani ja utemulu waka Chapanga.
16.9: Kwa malobhi gha mahoku, maghambu ngachebhanhobhali nepani.
16.10: Kwa malobhi gha kujetakalewa palongi jaka Chapanga, maghambu nyenda kwa Atati, na mwehapa ngamwimoni kabhete.
16.11: Kwa malobhi gha utemulu waka Chapanga, maghambu Shetani, nkolongwa wa ndema ghoni ajomwi kutemuliwa.
16.12: “Mi naghu mambu ghamaheli gha kumpwaghila, nambu kwa sajenu ngamuwezi kughakamula.
16.13: Nambu jombi paanahikaje, Roho Mhuhu wa chakaka, anaandonguha mwehapa mu chakaka jokapi. Maghambu ngayipwaghi kwa ndandi jaki mweni, nambu ghokapi ghayijowanaje kuhuma kwaka Chapanga anaaghapwaghaje, na mambu ghaghahika anaampwaghila malobhi ghaki.
16.14: Jombi anaanumbalyaje nepani, kwa ndandi anaatola ghaghabhi ghangu, na kumpwaghi mwehapa.
16.15: Ghokapi ghaabhi naghu Atati nde ghangu, nde ndandi nakapwaghiki Roho Mhuhu anaatola ghaghabhi ghangu, na kumpwaghi mwehapa.” Huzuni na chiheku
16.16: “Chihighali chikahi kichokopi, mwehapa ngamwimone, na kabhete, chihighali chikahi kichokopi, mwehapa anammonaje, maghambu nyenda kwa Atati.”
16.17: Panihapa bhakumu bha bhabhulwa bhaki bhakalaluhini, “Bho, lilobhi bhole leapwagha heli, paatupwaghi, ‘Chihighali chikahi kichokopi, mwehapa ngamwimone, na kabhete, chihighali chikahi kichokopi, mwehapa anammonaje?’ Na paapwagha, ‘Maghambu nyenda kwa Atati?’ ”
16.18: Bhela bhakapwaghike, “Bho, lilobhi bhole leniheli leapwagha, ‘Chihighali chikahi kichokopi?’ Ngachetumanyi alongale panani ja kike!”
16.19: Yesu akamanyi kubha bhapala kundalukila, bhela akabhapwaghile, “Bho, mlaluhana panani ja ghala ghanapwaghiki, ‘Chihighali chikahi kichokopi, mwehapa ngamwimone, na kabhete, chihighali chikahi kichokopi, mwehapa anammonaje?’
16.20: Chakaka numpwaghila, mwehapa anamlelaje na kuombuleza, nambu bhandu bha pundema anabhahekalyaje. Na mwehapa anajumbina mitima jinu, nambu mabhinilu ghinu anaghang'anambuka na kubha chiheku.
16.21: Mbomba paalibhopola, lumbina lipyanda kwa ndandi chikahi chaki chihikike. Nambu anaajomwi kulibhopo mwana, ngacheakomboka kabhete mabhinilu ghala, kwa ndandi ja chiheku cha kubhelakeka mwana pundema.
16.22: Sajenu mwehapa mbi na mabhinilu, nambu nepani ananumbona kabhete, na mitima jinu anajihekalyaje, na chiheku chinu njeta mundu wa kumbokeha.
16.23: “Mu lichobha lela ngamwilalukile lilobhi lokapi. Numpwaghi Chakaka, ngati anamundobhiki Atati chindu chokapi kwa lihina langu, jombi anaampekyaje.
16.24: Mbaka sajenu ngachendobhiki chindu chokapi kwa lihina langu. Ndobhaje, na mwehapa anampataje, nahuli chiheku chinu chikamilikaje. Yesu auweziki ndema
16.25: “Numpwaghi mambu ghanihagha kwa ulenganesu. Nambu chikahi chihika ambapu nganipwaghi na mwehapa kabhete kwa ulenganesu, nambu ananumpwaghilaje hotuhotu malobhi gha Atati.
16.26: Mu lichobha lela mwilobhaje kwa lihina langu, na wala ngachenumpwaghila kubha nepani ananundobhila kwa Atati,
16.27: kwa ndandi Atati mwene ampala mwehapa. Maghambu mwehapa mumbaliki nepani, na kuhobhalela kubha nepani nakahumiki kwaka Chapanga.”
16.28: Nepani nakahumiki kwa Atati, nanatu nhikiki pani pundema, na kabhete nuleka ndema, na kujenda kwa Atati.
16.29: Bhela bhabhulwa bhaki bhakapwaghike, “Lingalyaje, sajenu upwagha hotuhotu, wala ngacheupwagha kwa malenganesu ghokapi ghala.
16.30: Sajenu tumanyi kubha wehapa umanyi mambu ghokapi, na wala ngachekubhi na ndandi jaka mundu kukulalukila, bhela tuhobhalela kubha ukahumiki kwaka Chapanga.”
16.32: Lingalyaje, chikahi chihika, ena, chijomwi kuhika, pamwipechanganaje kila mundu kwaki, na kuneka nepani kanjika jangu. Nambu nepani ngachemi kanjika jangu, kwa ndandi Atati abhi papamu na nepani.
16.33: Numpwaghili mambu ghanihagha nahuli mpata kubha na lukwale mkati jangu. Pundema anampata ulale, nambu mulipekya mtima, kwa ndandi nepani niuweziki ndema!”

17.1: Yesu paakajomwi kulongela malobhi ghanihagha, akalingali kunani kumahunde, na kupwagha, “Atati, lisaa lihikike. Undumbalyaje Mwana waku, nahuli najombi Mwana waku akulumbalyaje wehapa.
17.2: Ngati moumpeki lujiniku panani ja bhandu bhokapi, nahuli kwa bhokapi bhaumpekihe abhapekya womi wa mileli.
17.3: Na womi wa mileli nde ghongone, bhandu bhakumanya wehapa wa Chapanga wa kanjika wa chakaka, na Yesu Kristo joukantumike.
17.4: Nepani nukulumbalili pundema, nakabya nyomwile lihengu lela leukambekihe nilihengaje.
17.5: Sajenu Atati! Unumbalyaje nepani papamu na wehapa, kwa ulumbalilu ghola ghonakabhi naghu papamu na wehapa mangane ja kubhombakeka kwa ndema.”
17.6: “Nukutendiki umanyikanaje kwa bhandu bhala bhawambekihe pundema. Bhakabhi bhaku, ukambekihi nepani, na Lilobhi laku bhalijowine.
17.7: Sajenu bhamanyi kubha yokapi yewambekihe ihumiki kwaku.
17.8: Magambu malobhi ghala ghawambekihe nabhapekihi bhombi, na bhombi bhakaghajopalile. Na bhakamanyi chakaka kubha nakahumiki kwaku, na bhakahobhalili kubha wehapa nde wewandumike.”
17.9: Nepani nabhalobhela bhombi. Nepani ngachenulobhela ndema, nambu bhala bhaumbekihe, maghambu bhanihabha nde bhaku.
17.10: Bhokapi bhabhabhi bhangu nde bhaku, na bhabhabhi bhaku nde bhangu, nanatu numbaliwi mkati jabhu.
17.11: Nepani sajenu ngangubhi kabheti pundema, nambu bhombi bhakali bhabhi pundema, nanatu nhika kwaku. Atati Mhuhu, kwa makili gha lihina laku lewambekihe ubhalenda bhombi, nahuli bhabya chindu chimu ngati tepani motubhelile.
17.12: Panakabhi papamu nabhu pundema, nakabhalendiki kwa makili gha lihina laku lewambekihe, wala njeta jumu wabhu joakahobhike, nambu jola mwana wa kuhobha, nahuli Malembu Mahuhu ghatimilaje.
17.13: Na sajenu nhika kwaku, na malobhi ghangani naghalongela pundema, nahuli bhabya na chiheku changu chakabya chikamilike mkati jabhu.
17.14: Nepani nabhapeki lilobhi laku, na bhandu bha pundema bhatenda kubhahakalila, maghambu bhombi nga bha pundema ghoni, ngati nepani momeli nga wa pundema ghoni.
17.15: Nepani ngachenobha kubha ubhabhoha pundema, nambu ubhalenda na Mhakau jola.
17.16: Bhombi nga bha pundema ghoni, ngati nepani momeli nga wa pundema ghoni.
17.17: Ubhagholulaje kwa chakaka jela, lilobhi laku nde chakaka.
17.18: Ngati bhela mowandumi nepani pundema, nanatu bhelabhela nakabhatumiki bhombi pundema.
17.19: Na kwa ndandi jabhu niligholola namwete, nahuli nabhombi bhagholulikaje mu chakaka jela.
17.20: Wala nga bhanihabha pela bhanabhalobhela, nambu na bhala bhabhinhobhalyaje kwa ndandi ja lilobhi labhu.
17.21: Nobha nahuli bhokapi bhabya chindu chimu, ngati wehapa, Atati, moubheli mkati jangu, nanatu mkati jaku, bhanganya habha nabhombi bhabya mkati jitu. Nahuli bhandu bha pundema bhapata kuhobhalela kubha wehapa nde wewandumike.
17.22: Na ulumbalilu ghola ghowambeki nepani nabhapeki bhombi, nahuli bhabya chindu chimu ngati tepani motubheli chindu chimu.
17.23: Nepani mkati jabhu, na wehapa mkati jangu. Nahuli bhabya bhakamiliki mu chindu chimu. Nahuli bhandu bha pundema bhamanya kubha wehapa nde wewandumike, ubhapala bhombi ngati mowambali nepani.
17.24: “Atati, bhanihabha bhaumbekihe mbala bhabya papamu na nepani pokapi pamile, bhapata kuulinga ulumbalilu wangu ghoumbekihe. Maghambu ukambaliki mangani ja kutumbula kubhombakeka ndema.
17.25: Atati Wambone! Bhandu bha pundema ngachebhukumanye, nambu nepani nakakumanyi, nabhombi bhamanyiki kubha wehapa nde wewandumike.
17.26: Nanatu nilitendiki lihina laku limanyikanaje kwabhu, kabheti ananyendalyaje kulitenda limanyikanaje, nahuli upalu ghola ghowambaliki nepani ubya mkati jabhu, na nepani mya mkati jabhu.”

18.1: Yesu paakajomwi kundobha Chapanga, akabhokiki na bhabhulwa bhaki na kujenda kwihi ja kikoka Keduloni, pakukabhi na chijongu, akajingi jombi papamu na bhabhulwa bhaki.
18.2: Bhela Yuda, jola joapalikaje kung'anambuka Yesu, akapamanyi pandu pala. Maghambu Yesu akabhi ajenda konihoku pamaheli papamu na bhabhulwa bhaki.
18.3: Bhela Yuda, akabya atoliki lipogha la manjolinjoli bha Kiloma na bhalonda bha Nyumba jaka Chapanga bhabhakahumiki kwa ihongozi bha bhapenganyambiku na Mafalisayo, bhakapiti konihoku bhakabya bhatotwi taa, na myengi, na mikoha na ndonga.
18.4: Yesu akabya amanyi ghala ghaghumpataje, akapiti palongi jabhu na kubhalalukila, “Bho, mundonda nane?”
18.5: Bhombi bhakamuyangike, “Yesu wa ku Nazaleti.” Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Nde nepani.” Najombi Yuda, jola joakang'anambwiki Yesu, akabhi ajemiki papamu nabhu.
18.6: Yesu paakabhapwaghi, “Nde nepani,” bhakakelawiki chihanganyuma, na kuhabhuka pahi.
18.7: Bhela Yesu akabhalaluki kabhete, “Bho, mundonda nane?” Bhakamuyangike, “Yesu wa ku Nazaleti.”
18.8: Yesu akabhayangike, “Nyomwi kumpwaghila kubha nde nepani. Bhela ngati mnonda nepani, mwabhaleka bhanganya abhabha bhajendaje.”
18.9: Nahuli litimiaje lilobhi lela leakapwaghiki, “Atati, bhala bhawambekihe ngachenunhoiki hata jumu wabhu.”
18.10: Bhela Simoni Petulu akabhi na lipanga, akalihungwili na kunheketa likutu la kumalelelu laka mtumika waka Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa. Mtumika hoju lihina laki alowakika Maliko.
18.11: Bhela Yesu akumpwaghi Petulu, “Ukelabhuwa lipanga laku mu ala jaki. Bho, chikombi cha mang'ahiku cheambeki Atati le nganinywelela?” Yesu palongi jaka Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa
18.12: Bhela manjolinjoli bha Kiloma bhala na nkolongwa wabhu wa manjolinjoli papamu na ihongozi bha Bhayahude bhakunkamwili Yesu, na kunkonga.
18.13: Kutumbula bhakumpeliki kwaka Anasi. Nkohanu waka Kayafa, joakabhi Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa chaka chela.
18.14: Kayafa nde jola joakabhapeki bhakolongwa bha Bhayahude lilobhi lela la kubha impalika mundu jumu kupotela kwa ndandi ja bhandu bhokapi. Petulu ankana Yesu Matayo 26:69-70; Mako 14:66-68; Luka 22:55-57
18.15: Simoni Petulu papamu na mbulwa njaki bhakabhi bhunjengalela Yesu. Mbulwa jongi hoju akabhi amanyikana kwaka Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa, akajingili papamu na Yesu mu liwangala laka Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa.
18.16: Nambu Petulu akajemiki kunja ja ndyangu. Bhela mbulwa jongi joakamanyakini kwaka Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa jola, akapitiki kunja, na kulongela na mwali joalendika pundyangu jola, na kundeta Petulu mkati.
18.17: Bhela mwali joakabhi alenda ndyangu jola akundaluki Petulu, “Bho, wehapa le nga jumu wa bhabhulwa bhaka mundu ajojo?” Petulu akayangike, “Nga nepane.”
18.18: Bhatumika bhala papamu na manjolinjoli bhakabhi bhajemiki, bhakanyatukya moto wa makalakala, maghambu kukabhi na imbepu. Petulu najombi akabhi ajemi papamu nabhu, akanyatukya moto. Mpenganyambiku nkolongwa andaluki Yesu Matayo 26:59-66; Mako 14:55-64; Luka 22:66-71
18.19: Bhela Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa akundaluki Yesu panani ja bhabhulwa bhaki, na panani ja mabholu ghaki.
18.20: Yesu akayangike, “Nepani nongili hotuhotu pundema wokapi. Machobha ghokapi molika mu nyumba ya kuhimanganila Bhayahude, na paliwangala la Nyumba jaka Chapanga, pabhalibhongana Bhayahude bhokapi. Na ngachenalongi lilobhi lokapi lela kwa kulihiya.
18.21: Bho, maghambu ki unalukila nepani? Ubhalalukya bhala bhabhajowini ghala ghanabhapwaghile. Kwa ndandi bhombi bhamanyi ghanakapwaghike.”
18.22: Bhela paakapwaghiki ghanihagha, jumu wa manjolinjoli joakabhi ajemiki pambipi naku, akundapwi Yesu lighanja la kumihu, na kupwagha, “Bho, bhenibhela nde moumuyangi Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa?”
18.23: Yesu akamuyangike, “Anangati nongili lijambu lihakau, ulandilaje uhakau ghonongile palongi ja bhandu. Nambu anangati nongili chakaka, bho, maghambu kiki unapula?”
18.24: Bhela Anasi akumpeliki Yesu kwaka Kayafa Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa, koni akabya akongakiki. Petulu ankana Yesu kabhete Matayo 26:71-75; Mako 14:69-72; Luka 22:58-62
18.25: Chikahi hechi Simoni Petulu akabhi akali ajemiki akanyatukya moto. Bhakumu bha bhabhakabhi panipala bhakundaluki Petulu, “Bho, wehapa le nga wa jumu wa bhabhulwa bhake?” Petulu akakaniki, akapwaghaje, “Nga nepani.”
18.26: Jumu wa bhatumika bhaka Mpenganyambiku Nkolongwa, ndongu waka mundu jola Petulu joakunchekwi likutu, akundalukile, “Bho, nepani le ngachenukuweni kuchijongu kola ukabya papamu na Yesu?”
18.27: Bhela Petulu akakaniki kabhete, na palapala likongobhi lakabhekike. Yesu palongi jaka Pilato Matayo 27:1-2,11-14; Mako 15:1-5; Luka 23:1-5
18.28: Bhela bhakuntoliki Yesu kuhuma kwaka Kayafa na kumpeleka panyumba jaka mtawala wa Kiloma. Kukabhi lukela, nambu bheni ngachebhajingili mkati ja nyumba jaka Gavana, ngabhihika kubha bhahakau, nahuli bhapata kula Pasaka.
18.29: Bhela Pilato akapitiki kunja ja nyumba jaki, na kubhalalukila, “Bho, ndetiki matakilu bhole panani jaka mundu ajojo?”
18.30: Bhakamuyangike, “Ngati kukabhi mundu ajojo ngacheahengiki mahakau, ngatukundetiki kwaku.”
18.31: Pilato akabhapwaghile, “Haya muntola mwehapa mukuntemulaje kwa kulengana na shelia hinu.” Bhayahude bhakumpwaghile, “Tepani ngachetubhi na lujiniku lwa kuntemula mundu kupotela.”
18.32: Bhakalongi bhenibhela nahuli malobhi ghaakalongi Yesu, panani ja ntundu wa nyiwa jeayikuwaje ghapata kutimia.
18.33: Bhela Pilato akajingi kabhete munyumba jaki, akundohiki Yesu, na kundalukila, “Bho, wehapa le nde Unkolongwa wa Bhayahude?”
18.34: Yesu akamuyangike, “Bho, unalukila lilalukilu lendenu kubhokana na maholalelu ghaku au bhakakupwaghi bhandu bhangi malobhi panani jangu?”
18.35: Pilato akamuyangike, “Bho, nepani le nu Myahude?” Bhandu bhaku na ihongozi bha bhapenganyambiku nde bhabhukuletiki kwangu. Bho, uhengiki kike?
18.36: Yesu akamuyangike, “Ukolongwa wangu nga wa ndema ghoni. Ngati ukolongwa wangu ukabhi wa ndema ghoni, bhatumika bhangu bhakabya bhangomanile, nahuli nganikamulika na bhakolongwa bha Bhayahude. Nambu ukolongwa wangu nga wa pani pundema!”
18.37: Bhela Pilato akumpwaghile, “Bho, henu wehapa le unkolongwa?” Yesu akamuyangike, “Wehapa upwaghike kubha nepani nunkolongwa. Nepani melakiki kwa ndandi ja ghangane, na kwa ndandi ja ghangane nakahiki pundema, nahuli nandila chakaka. Mundu jokapi joabhi wa chakaka anyowanela sauti jango.”
18.38: Pilato akalalukile, “Bho, chakaka nde kike?” Yesu atemulika kupotela Matayo 27:15-31; Mako 15:6-20; Luka 23:13-25 Pilato paakalongi malobhi ghanihagha, akapitiki kabheti kunja na kubhapwaghila bhakolongwa bha Bhayahude bhabhakuntakili Yesu, “Nepani ngachemona lihoku lokapi lela kwaka mundu ajojo.
18.39: Nambu mabhanganya mbi na ntetu winu kubha chikahi cha Pasaka numbopulya mkongeka jumu jomumpala. Bho, mpala le numbopulya Nkolongwa wa Bhayahude ajojo?”
18.40: Bhombi bhakajamali kabhete, bhakapwaghaje, “Nga mundu hoju, nambu utubhopulya Balaba!” Bhela Balaba akabhi mnyaghula wa hindu ya bhandu.

19.1: Bhela Pilato akalaghalakili bhuntola Yesu, na kundapu iboku.
19.2: Nabhombi manjolinjoli bhakalokiki litaji la miha, na kunhwatika Yesu kumutu, na bhakunhwatiki ingobhu ja zambalau.
19.3: Bhakabhi bhunjendela na kumpwaghila, “Monile! Nkolongwa wa Bhayahude!” Na bhakundapwi maghanja kumihu.
19.4: Bhela Pilato akapitiki kabheti kunja, na kubhapwaghila, “Ndingalyaje! Nundeta Yesu kwinu, mpata kumanya kubha nepani ngachemweni lihakau lokapi lela la kuntemula kwaki.”
19.5: Panihapa Yesu akapitiki kunja, akabya awatiki litaji la miha lela, na ingobhu ja zambalau jela. Pilato akabhapwaghile, “Ndingalyaje! Mundu wene jopambane!”
19.6: Bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa na bhalonda bha Nyumba jaka Chapanga pabhakumbweni, bhakajamalili, bhakapwaghaje, “Unhwamba punsalaba! Unhwamba punsalaba!” Pilato akabhapwaghile, “Muntola mabhete, mukunhwambaje. Maghambu nepani ngachemona lihakau la kuntemula kwaki.”
19.7: Bhayahude bhakamuyangike, “Tepani tubhi na shelia, na kubhokana na shelia heji, impalika kupotela, maghambu akalitendiki kubha Mwana waka Chapanga.”
19.8: Pilato paakajowini malobhi ghanihagha, akajowipi nakanopi.
19.9: Akajingi kabhete munyumba jaki ja kikolongwa jela na kundaluki Yesu, “Bho, wehapa uhumiki kwako?” Nambu Yesu ngacheakayangiki lilobhi lokapi lela.
19.10: Pilato akumpwaghile, “Bho, ngacheulonge na nepane? Bho, ngacheumanyi kubha nepani mi na lujiniku lwa kukubhopola au lujiniku lwa kukuwamba?”
19.11: Yesu akamuyangike, “Wehapa ngaukabhi na lujiniku lwokapi lola panani jangu, ngati ngaukajopali kuhuma kwaka Chapanga. Kwa ndandi jeniheji, jola joanetiki kwaku abhi na lihoku likolongwa nakanopi.”
19.12: Kutumbula panihapa Pilato akalondiki indela ja kumbopola Yesu. Nambu Bhayahude bhakajamalili, bhakapwaghaje, “Anaumbopuli mundu ajoju, wehapa nga unkochi waka Kaisali. Maghambu kila mundu joalitenda kubha nkolongwa ampenga Kaisali!”
19.13: Bhela, Pilato paakajowini malobhi ghanihagha, akundetiki Yesu kunja, akatami pachitehu chaki cha utemulu, pandu papalowakeka, “Lubhanja lwa Liganga,” au kwa Kiebulania, “Gabata.”
19.14: Na ghakabhi maandalilu gha Pasaka, ngati saa sita ja muhi. Pilato akabhapwaghi Bhayahude, “Ndingalyaje, nkolongwa winu!”
19.15: Nambu bhombi bhakajamalili, bhakapwaghaje, “Unkomaje! Unkomaje! Unhwamba punsalaba!” Pilato akabhapwaghile, “Bho, nunhwamba nkolongwa wino?” Ihongozi bha bhapenganyambiku bhakamuyangiki, “Tepani ngachetubhi na nkolongwa nambu Kaisali!”
19.16: Bhela Pilato akabhapeki Yesu kwabhu nahuli bhunhwambaje. Yesu awambakika punsalaba Matayo 27:32-44; Mako 15:21-32; Luka 23:26-43 Nabhombi bhakuntoliki Yesu.
19.17: Yesu akabya autotwili msalaba waki, akapitiki na kujenda pandu papalowakeka, “Lifuvu la Mmutu,” au kwa Kiebulania, “Goligota.”
19.18: Bhakamuwambiki konihoku, na bhangi bhabheli papamu naku, jumu upambala wa kumalelelu, na jongi upambala wa kumangeja, na Yesu akabya pachilanda jabhu.
19.19: Pilato akalembiki anuwane, na kujibheka panani ja msalaba waka Yesu. Na jakalembakiki, “Yesu wa ku Nazaleti, Nkolongwa wa Bhayahude.”
19.20: Bhela anuwani jeniheji bhakajisomiki Bhayahude bhamaheli. Maghambu pandu pala paakawambakiki Yesu pakabhi pambipi na muchi. Na jakalembakiki kwa Kiebulania, na Kilumi, na Kigiliki.
19.21: Nambu bhapenganyambiku bhakolongwa na Bhayahude bhakumpwaghi Pilato, “Ngawilemba, ‘Nkolongwa wa Bhayahude,’ nambu ulemba, ‘Mundu ajoju akapwaghiki kubha, Nepani nde Nkolongwa wa Bhayahude.’ ”
19.23: Bhela manjolinjoli pabhakajomwi kunhwamba Yesu, bhakaitoliki ingobhu yaki, na kuighabha mapogha ncheche, kwa kila linjolinjoli lipogha laki. Nambu bhakajetangani likanzu laki lela ngabhalikachula, maghambu lakabhi nga mshonu, nambu lilokakiki kutumbu kunani mbaka pahi.
19.24: Bhela bhakapwaghani bheni kwa bheni, “Ngatujikachula, nambu tujilapulya kula, jibya jaka nane.” Nahuli ghatimiaje Malembu Mahuhu ghaghapwagha, “Bhakaghabhini ingobhu yangu, na kanzu jangu bhakajilapuli kula.” Bhenibhela nde mobhakahengi manjolinjoli bhala.
19.25: Na pambipi na msalaba waka Yesu akabhi ajemiki mabhu waka Yesu, na ndombu wa mabhu waki, na Malia nhwanu waka Kileopa, na Malia Magidalena.
19.26: Bhela Yesu paakumbweni mabhu waki, na mbulwa joakumpaliki jola ajemiki pambipi, akumpwaghi mabhu waki, “Amabhu, hajoju nde mwana waku.”
19.27: Kebhete akumpwaghi mbulwa jola, “Lingalyaje, hajoju nde mabhu waku.” Na kutumbu chikahi chela mbulwa jola akuntoliki mabhu waka Yesu kunyumba jaki. Yesu apotela Matayo 27:45-56; Mako 15:33-41; Luka 23:44-49
19.28: Paghajomwiki ghanihagha, Yesu akamanyi kubha ghokapi ghajomwike. Nahuli ghapitalyaje Malembu Mahuhu, akapwaghike, “Mona inywita.”
19.29: Panihapa pakabhi na mbale jejitweli siki. Bhela bhakatobhali siponji mu siki jela, na kujibheka mu ufito wa nkongu wa hisopo, na kumpelakela mundomu.
19.30: Yesu paakayomwi kujionja siki heji, akapwaghike, “Ghajomwike!” Akajinamishi mmutu waki, na kuheketa roho. Yesu ahomangeka nkoha
19.31: Bhela bhakolongwa bha Bhayahude kwa kubha lakabhi nde lichobha la Ijumaa, yani, lichobha la Maandalio mangani ja Lichobha la Sabato na hyegha ngaitama punsalaba Lichobha la Sabato, maghambu Lichobha la Sabato lakabhi lichobha likolongwa, bhakundobhiki Pilato bhahekata magholu gha bhala bhabhawambakike, na bhakabhohakikaje.
19.32: Bhela manjolinjoli bhakapiti, bhakunhekiti magholu wa kutumbula, na wa kabheli, joakawambakiki punsalaba papamu na Yesu.
19.33: Nambu pabhakunhiki Yesu, na kumbona ajomwi kupotela, ngachebhunhekiti magholu.
19.34: Nambu linjolinjoli jumu akunhomiki mwindeta jaka Yesu kwa nkoha, na palapala ukapitiki mwahi na machi.
19.35: Mundu joakaweni mambu ghanihagha nde joabhohika ulandilu, na ulandilu waki nde wa chakaka. Najombi amanyi kubha alongela chakaka, nahuli nanamu mpata kuhobhalela.
19.36: Mambu ghanihagha ghakahengakiki nahuli Malembu Mahuhu ghapata kupitalila, “Njeta hata chihupa chaki chimu chechihekatwaje.”
19.37: Na kabheti Malembu ghangi ghapwagha, “Anabhundinga jola jobhunhotwile.” Yesu abhekakeka mulitengele Matayo 27:57-61; Mako 15:42-47; Luka 23:50-56
19.38: Paghapetiki mambu ghanihagha, Yusufu mundu wa ku Alimataya, akunjopiki Pilato anjetakalya kujiheleha hyegha jaka Yesu punsalaba. Yusufu akabhi nde mbulwa waka Yesu, nambu kwa kulihiya, kwa choghohi ja Bhayahude, na Pilato akunjetakalile. Bhela Yusufu akapiti, na kujitola hyegha jaka Yesu.
19.39: Yusufu akalongini na Nikodemu jola ambaju pakutumbula akunjendi Yesu ikilu, akaletiki mahangaghanu gha manungilu ghaghalowakeka manemane na ubani, ngati kilo selasini.
19.40: Bhokapi bhabeli bhakajitoliki hyegha jaka Yesu, bhakajikongiki sanda ja ingobhu jinyahi jihuhu papamu na manungilu ghala, ngati moubheli ntetu wa Bhayahude wa kutagha.
19.41: Na palapala paakawambakiki Yesu pala, pakabhi na chijongu, na mkati ja chijongu chela kukabhi na litengeli lahenu, lelu ngachealabhali kutaghakika mundu.
19.42: Bhela maghambu lakabhi lichobha la Bhayahude la Maandalio gha Lichobha la Sabato na litengeli lakabhi pambipi, bhakajibhekiki hyegha jaka Yesu mulitengele.

20.1: Lukela pachibhombu lichobha la Jumapili, kukabya kukali na lwihi, Malia Magidalena akapiti kulitengeli, na akaliweni liganga lela libhohakiki pundyangu wa litengeli.
20.2: Bhela akakembili imbelu mbaka kwaka Simoni Petulu na mbulwa jongi jola ambaju Yesu akumpaliki, na kubhapwaghila, “Bhumbohiki Bambo mulitengeli, wala ngachetumanyi kobhumbekike.”
20.3: Bhela Petulu papamu na mbulwa jongi jola, bhakabhokiki na kujenda kulitengeli.
20.4: Bhakakembili imbelu bhokapi bhabheli, nambu mbulwa jongi jola akakembili nakanopi kumpeta Petulu, na kubha wa kutumbula kuhika kulitengeli.
20.5: Akajinimi na kulingalila mulitengeli mola, akaiweni itambala ya sanda mkati mola, nambu ngacheajingile.
20.6: Simoni Petulu najombi akajengalile, akajingili mkati ja litengeli, na akaiweni itambala ya sanda yela mkati ja litengele,
20.7: na chitambala chechakabhi bhahyongalwi pamutu jaka Yesu. Ngachechaghonili papamu na itambala ya sanda yela, nambu chakabhi chikunjakiki na kubhekakeka kutali pandu pa kanjika jaki.
20.8: Bhela mbulwa jongi joakalonguli kuhika palitengeli jola, najombi akajingili mkati, akaweni, na kuhobhalela.
20.9: Maghambu mbaka chikahi chenihechi bhakabhi bhakali ngakumanya Malembu Mahuhu ghala kubha, ikabhi impalika Yesu ayokaje kabhete kuhuma kwa bhakuwa.
20.10: Bhela bhabhulwa bhala bhakakelawiki kabhete kunyumba jabhu. Yesu ampitalila Malia Magidalena Matayo 28:9-10; Mako 16:9-11
20.11: Nambu Malia akabhi ajemiki pambipi na litengeli akalelaje. Chikahi paakabhi alela, akajinimi na kulingalila mkati ja litengeli.
20.12: Akabhaweni bhatumika bhabheli bha kunani kwaka Chapanga, bhawati ingobhu ihuhu kupukupu, bhatami pala pabhajighoniki hyegha jaka Yesu, jumu kumutu, na jongi kumagholu.
20.13: Bhombi bhakumpwaghi Malia, “Mbomba, bho, mbona ulela?” Malia akabhayangike, “Bhumbohiki Bambo wangu, wala nepani ngachemanyi kobhumbekike!”
20.14: Malia paakajomwi kulonge ghanihagha, akang'anambwiki kunyuma, na kumbona Yesu ajemiki, koni akabya ngakumanya kubha nde Yesu.
20.15: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Mbomba, bho, ulela kike?” Bho, undonda nane? Jombi koni akaholakya kubha nde mlonda wa chijongu, akumpwaghile, “Nkolongwa, anangati untoliki wehapa, umbwaghilaje paumbekike, nanatu ananuntolaje.”
20.16: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Malia.” Malia akang'anambwiki, na kumpwaghila kwa Kiebulania, “Laboni!” Yani, “Mbola!”
20.17: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Ngawingamula, maghambu nakali ngachembiti kwa Atati wangu.” Nambu ujenda kwa bhalongu bhangu ukabhapwaghilaje, “Ng'oloka kujenda kwa Atati wangu, najombi nde Atati winu, na kwaka Chapanga wangu, najombi nde Chapanga winu.”
20.18: Malia Magidalena akapiti na kubhapwaghila bhabhulwa malobhi, “Numbweni Bambo!” Na kubha ampwaghi mambu ghanihagha. Yesu abhapitali bhabhulwa bhaki Matayo 28:16-20; Mako 16:14-18; Luka 24:36-49
20.19: Kukabhi pakamihi, lichobha lela la kutumbula la juma la Jumapile. Bhabhulwa bhaki bhakabhi bhalibhongini papamu, milyangu jakabya jijighaliki kwa ndandi ja kubhajoghopa ihongozi bha Bhayahude. Yesu akahikike, akajemiki pachilanda jabhu, na kubhapwaghila, “Lukwali lubya na mwenga!”
20.20: Na paakapwaghiki ghanihagha, akabhalangi mabhoku ghaki na indeta jaki. Bhela bhabhulwa bhala bhakahekalili namaa, pabhakumbweni Bambo.
20.21: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghi kabhete, “Lukwali lubya na mwenga, ngati Atati moandumi nepani, nepani nanatu nuntuma mwehapa.”
20.22: Paakajomwi kulonge ghanihagha, akabhapulali na kubhapwaghila, “Njopalyaje Roho Mhuhu.
20.23: Bhokapi bhamwabhokia mahoku, bhabhohakike, na bhokapi bhamwakongila mahoku, bhakongakike.” Yesu na Tomaso
20.24: Nambu Tomaso, jumu wa bhabhulwa komi na bhabheli bhala, joalowakika Mabhela, ngacheakabhi papamu nabhu chikahi pahikika Yesu.
20.25: Bhela bhabhulwa bhangi bhakumpwaghile, “Tumbweni Bambo.” Tomaso akabhapwaghile, “Nepani nangakughabhona makumba gha misumali mumabhoku ghaki, na kubheka lukonji lwangu pa likumba la misumali, na kubheka lukonji lwangu pa indeta jaki, nganhobhaleli hata pachokope.”
20.26: Paghapetiki machobha nane, bhabhulwa bhaki bhakabhi mkati kabhete, na Tomaso akabya papamu nabhu. Bhela Yesu akahikike, na milyangu jijighalike, akajemiki pachilanda jabhu, na kupwagha, “Lukwali lubya na mwenga.”
20.27: Bhela akumpwaghi Tomaso, “Uletaje pambani lukonji lwaku, na ughalinga mabhoku ghangu, uletaje na chiwoku chaku ukamulaje mu indeta jangu, wala ngawikubha na choghohi, nambu uhobhalyaje.”
20.28: Tomaso akayangiki, na kumpwaghila, “Bambo wangu na Chapanga wangu!”
20.29: Yesu akumpwaghi Tomaso, “Bho, wehapa le uhobhalili maghambu utehi kumona? Bhapengaliki bhala bhanga kumona, nambu bhahobhalela.” Ndandi ja chitabu chenu
20.30: Bhela kubhi kabhete na nginyulila yengi yamaheli yeakahengiki Yesu palongi ja bhabhulwa bhaki, yangakulembakeka mu chitabu chenu.
20.31: Nambu yenjenu ilembakiki nahuli mmanya kubha Yesu nde Kristo, Mwana waka Chapanga, na kwa kunhobhalela jombi mbya na womi wa chakaka kwa kupetela lihina laki.

21.1: Paghapetiki mambu ghanihagha Yesu akalilangi kabhete kwa bhabhulwa bhaki, pamaheku ja Bahali ja Tibelia, najombi akabhonakini ana:
21.2: Simoni Petulu, na Tomaso joalowakeka Mabhela, na Nathanaeli wa ku Kana ja ku Galilaya, na bhana bhabheli bhaka Zebedayo, na bhabhulwa bhangi bhabheli, bhakabhi papamu.
21.3: Simoni Petulu akabhapwaghi bhajaki, “Nyenda kulobha homba.” Nabhombi bhakumpwaghile, “Natatu anatujenda papamu na wehapa.” Bhela bhakabhokiki, bhakakweliki mu liboti, nambu ikilu jela ngachebhapatiki chindu.
21.4: Lukela pakwachile, Yesu akajemiki mumaheku, nambu bhabhulwa ngachebhamanyi kubha akabhi nde Yesu.
21.5: Bhela Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Bhanango, bho, mbi na homba?” Bhakamuyangiki, “Njeta.”
21.6: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Mpendakya nkwabhu upambala wa kumalelelu wa liboti linu, nanamu anampata homba.” Bhela bhakapendakili, wala sajenu ngachebhaweziki kuhuta kabhete kwa ndandi ja kujoloka kwa homba.
21.7: Bhela mbulwa joakapalakiki na Yesu jola akumpwaghi Petulu, “Nde Bambo!” Najombi Simoni Petulu paakajowini kubha nde Bambo, akalikongiki ingobhu jaki, maghambu akahuliki ingobhu ja kunja, na kulilekela mubahali.
21.8: Bhabhulwa bhangi bhala bhakahikiki na liboti heli, maghambu bhakabhi nga kutali na kumaheku, nambu bhakabhi ngati utali wa mita mia moja kuhuma kundema, koni bhakahuta nkwabhu wana homba.
21.9: Bhela pabhaheli kumaheku, bhakauweni moto wa makalakala, na panani jaki bhajochiki homba, na libumunda.
21.10: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Ndeta pambani homba yakumu yendobhiki sajeno.”
21.11: Simoni Petulu akakweliki mu liboti, akauhutiki nkwawu kumaheku, utweli homba ikoluikolu, mia moja hamsini na tatu. Hata koni homba ikabhi yamaheli ntundu ghonihoghu, nambu nkwabhu ngachewakachwike.
21.12: Yesu akabhapwaghile, “Nhwika nkula chilebhi cha lukela.” Wala nga mundu pachilanda ja bhabhulwa bhala joakalengiki kundalukila kubha wehapa wa nane, maghambu bhakamanyi kubha nde Bambo.
21.13: Yesu akahikiki, na kutola libumunda, na kubhapekeha, na homba akahengiki bhelabhela.
21.14: Haje jakabhi mala ja katatu kwaka Yesu kubhapitalila bhabhulwa bhaki, kutumbula paakahyokiki kuhuma kwa bhakuwa. Yesu na Petulu
21.15: Bhela pabhakajomwi kula, Yesu akumpwaghi Simoni Petulu, “Simoni mwana waka Yohana! Bho, umbala nepani kuliku bhanganya abhabha?” Petulu akayangiki, “Ena, Bambo, wehapa umanyi kubha nukupala.” Yesu akumpwaghile, “Ulehaje mambelele ghangu!”
21.16: Akumpwaghi kabhete pakabheli, “Simoni mwana waka Yohana! Bho, umbala nepani?” Petulu akayangiki, “Ena, Bambo, wehapa umanyi kubha nukupala!” Yesu akumpwaghile, “Ulehaje mambelele ghangu!”
21.17: Yesu akundaluki kabhete pakatatu, “Simoni mwana waka Yohana! Bho, umbala nepani?” Petulu akayomike maghambu akundaluki pakatatu, “Bho, umbala nepani?” Bhela akumpwaghile, “Bambo, wehapa umanyi ghokapi, wehapa umanyi kubha nukupala.” Yesu akumpwaghile, “Ulehaje mambelele ghangu!”
21.18: Nukupwaghi chakaka, paukabhi unkombo, ukabhi ulikonga wamwete na kujenda koupala. Nambu pawibya ukongapile, wihatambula mabhoku ghaku, na jongi anaakukongaje na kukupeleka kwanga kupala wehapa kujenda.
21.19: Kwa kupwagha malobhi ghanihagha, Yesu akalangi kubha kwa ntundu bhole Petulu anakuwaje nahuli kundumbali Chapanga. Bhela paakalongi ghanihagha, Yesu akumpwaghi Petulu, “Unyengalyaje!” Yesu na mbulwa joakumpaliki
21.20: Petulu akang'anambwiki na kumbona mbulwa jola joakapalakiki na Yesu. Jonihoju nde mbulwa jola joakajeghamaki pachihimba chaka Yesu chikahi cha kula chilebhi cha pakamihi, na kulalukila, “Bambo, bho, nane joakung'anambukaje?”
21.21: Bhela Petulu paakumbweni jonihoju, akumpwaghi Yesu, “Bambo, na ajoju anaatenda kike?”
21.22: Yesu akumpwaghile, “Ngati anambaliki ajoju atama mbaka panihikaje, bho, wehapa upala kike? Wehapa unyengalya nepani.”
21.23: Bhela lilobhi leniheli lakajaghani pachilanda ja bhahobhalela kubha mbulwa jola ngaakuwe. Nambu Yesu ngacheakumpwaghi kubha ngaakuwe, nambu, “Ngati anambaliki ajoju atama mbaka panihikaje, bho, wehapa upala kike?”
21.24: Hajoju nde mbulwa jola joaghalandila mambu ghanihagha, na nde joaghalembiki mambu ghanihagha. Natatu tumanyi kubha ghaaghapwaghiki nde gha chakaka. Ujomukelu
21.25: Kubhi kabhete na mambu ghangi ghamaheli ghaakahengiki Yesu. Ghaghu anangati ghakalembakiki limu limu, nholake hata ndema wokapi ngaukajaghanile kwa itabu yela yeikalembakikaje. Amina.

1.1: Unkolongwa Teofile: Mu chitabu changu cha kutumbula, nakakulembi kubhokana na mambu ghokapi Yesu ghaakatumbwi kuhenga na kubhola kutumbu chikahi paatumbulaje lihengu laki,
1.2: mbaka lichobha leatolakikaje kujenda kunani kumahunde. Mangani ja kubhoka kwaki, kwa makili ghaka Roho Mhuhu, Yesu akabhalaghalaki bhandu bhaakahawile kubha mitumi bhaki.
1.3: Kwa machobha alobaini baada ja kupotela akabhapitali mala jamahele kwa ntundu ghoulangia chakaka kubha jombi akabhi mwome. Bhakumbweni, najombi akalongi nabhu panani ja Ukolongwa waka Chapanga.
1.4: Chikahi chimu Yesu paakahimangini nabhu akabhalaghalaki anana: “Ngamwibhoka mu Yelusalemu, nambu mlendalyaje nhupu ghoakapwaghiki Atati wangu, ambau mwanyowini nakalongalyaje panani jake.
1.5: Kabheti Yohana abatiza kwa machi, nambu pa machobha machokopi ghaghahika, mabhanganya anambatizwaje kwa Roho Mhuhu.” Yesu atolakeka kujenda kunani kumahunde Mako 16:19-20; Luka 24:50-53
